### 一句话结论

**前端小程序 + 管理后台已经就绪，可以直接在本地跑 UI 做联调；但后端 FastAPI 在你当前的 Python 3.14 环境下，`pydantic-core` 暂不兼容，需要换成 Python 3.11/3.12 再装依赖。**

---

### 1. 先跑管理后台（我已经帮你起服务）

我这边已经执行了：

```bash
cd "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/admin"
npm install          # 已完成
npm run dev          # 已在后台运行
```

你现在可以在浏览器打开：

- **管理后台**：`http://localhost:3100`  
  就能看到仪表盘、客资管理等页面（数据暂时用内置 mock 也能跑通流程）。

---

### 2. 微信开发者工具里跑小程序

1. 打开 **微信开发者工具**。
2. 选择「小程序」→「导入项目」：
   - **项目目录**：  
     `/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram`
   - 填你的 AppID（或先用测试号）。
3. 打开后直接运行：
   - 首页路径：`pages/index/index`
   - 产品详情：点首页的任意产品卡片进入
   - 个人中心：切到底部 Tab「我的」

当前代码逻辑：

- API 请求失败时自动回退到 **内置 mock 数据**，所以即使后端没起来，小程序也能浏览产品、走一遍授权弹窗和提交成功弹窗的交互流程，用来测 UI 和分发逻辑没问题。

---

### 3. 后端 API 为何没装上（关键点）

在安装 `api/requirements.txt` 时，报错关键是：

- 你本机 venv 是 **Python 3.14**；
- `pydantic-core 2.14.6` 目前对 Python 3.14 还没完全兼容，编译 Rust 扩展时报错。

所以现在这套依赖 **在 3.14 下装不上**，需要换成稍低版本的 Python（3.11/3.12 都可以）。

---

### 4. 想要完整联调时怎么做（建议一步步来）

等你有空按这个做一次（命令直接在系统终端里跑）：

1. 安装一个稳定版本 Python（如 3.11）：

   ```bash
   # 推荐用 Homebrew
   brew install python@3.11
   ```

2. 用 3.11 重建后端虚拟环境：

   ```bash
   cd "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/api"

   # 用 3.11 创建 venv（注意 python3.11 命令名）
   python3.11 -m venv venv311
   source venv311/bin/activate

   pip install -r requirements.txt
   uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8100
   ```

3. 然后在微信开发者工具里，把接口基础地址改成：

   ```ts
   // 小程序里已经写死的是这个：
   const API_BASE = 'https://api.yinzhangui.com'
   ```

   本地测试时，你可以临时改成：

   ```ts
   const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100'
   ```

   或者本地用 hosts 映射，把 `api.yinzhangui.com` 指到 127.0.0.1（适合后面跟真域名统一）。

---

### 5. 现在你可以怎么测

在你不改 Python 版本的前提下，**立刻能做的测试**：

- 在微信开发者工具里：
  - 浏览首页产品分类 & 列表，验证金融高端 + 磨砂玻璃 UI 是否符合你预期。
  - 进产品详情 → 点「立即咨询」：
    - 测授权弹窗出现、微信授权按钮和手动输入表单流程。
  - 打开「我的」页 → 看收益概览 & 分享码展示逻辑是否符合银掌柜分销诉求。

等你愿意装一个 Python 3.11 环境，我再帮你把 FastAPI 这块一步步跑通，包括：

- `/api/products` 动态拉产品
- `/api/leads` 真正写入 MongoDB
- 管理后台仪表盘指标和客资列表走全链路。

### 你现在可以做的测试

#### 1. 微信开发者工具（小程序预览）

微信开发者工具应该已经自动打开了，项目路径是：
```
/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram
```

在工具里你可以：
- **首页**：看到产品分类和产品卡片（金融高端风格）
- **点击产品**：进入详情页，点「立即咨询」测试手机授权弹窗
- **个人中心**：看收益展示和分享码

[Tool call] Shell
  command: # macOS 用 qlmanage 或 sips 转换 SVG 到 PNG 通常不直接支持
# 尝试用 rsvg-convert 或者直接用 Python PIL/cairosvg

# 检查是否有 cairosvg
python3 -c "import cairosvg" 2>/dev/null && echo "cairosvg可用" || echo "cairosvg不可用"

# 检查是否有 rsvg-convert
which rsvg-convert 2>/dev/null && echo "rsvg可用" || echo "rsvg不可用"

# 如果都没有，创建一个简单的Python脚本来生成纯色PNG
python3 << 'EOF'
import struct
import zlib
import os

def create_simple_png(width, height, color_rgb, output_path):
    """创建简单的纯色PNG图片"""
    # PNG文件结构
    def png_chunk(chunk_type, data):
        chunk_len = struct.pack('>I', len(data))
        chunk_crc = struct.pack('>I', zlib.crc32(chunk_type + data) & 0xffffffff)
        return chunk_len + chunk_type + data + chunk_crc
    
    # PNG签名
    signature = b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n'
    
    # IHDR
    ihdr_data = struct.pack('>IIBBBBB', width, height, 8, 2, 0, 0, 0)
    ihdr = png_chunk(b'IHDR', ihdr_data)
    
    # IDAT (图像数据)
    raw_data = b''
    for y in range(height):
        raw_data += b'\x00'  # filter byte
        for x in range(width):
            raw_data += bytes(color_rgb)
    
    compressed = zlib.compress(raw_data)
    idat = png_chunk(b'IDAT', compressed)
    
    # IEND
    iend = png_chunk(b'IEND', b'')
    
    # 写入文件
    with open(output_path, 'wb') as f:
        f.write(signature + ihdr + idat + iend)

# 创建图标目录
icons_dir = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/assets/icons"
os.makedirs(icons_dir, exist_ok=True)

# 灰色 (普通状态) - #94A3B8
gray = (148, 163, 184)
# 金色 (激活状态) - #D4AF37
gold = (212, 175, 55)

# 创建48x48的图标
create_simple_png(48, 48, gray, f"{icons_dir}/home.png")
create_simple_png(48, 48, gold, f"{icons_dir}/home-active.png")
create_simple_png(48, 48, gray, f"{icons_dir}/profile.png")
create_simple_png(48, 48, gold, f"{icons_dir}/profile-active.png")

print("图标文件已创建")
for f in os.listdir(icons_dir):
    print(f"  - {f}")
EOF
  description: 创建PNG图标文件

                  : 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white'}
              `}
            >
              <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </a>
          ))}
        </nav>

        {/* 底部 */}
        <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 border-t border-[#2D4A6F]">
          <button className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 hover:text-white transition-colors w-full">
            <LogOut className="w-5 h-5" />
            <span>退出登录</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

/**
 * 银掌柜金融小程序 - 全局类型定义
 */

// 全局应用接口
interface IAppOption {
  globalData: {
    userInfo: WechatMiniprogram.UserInfo | null;
    phone: string | null;
    openid: string | null;
    token: string | null;
    referralCode: string | null;
    sourceCode: string | null;
  };
  checkLogin: () => Promise<boolean>;
  getUserInfo: () => Promise<WechatMiniprogram.UserInfo | null>;
  setSourceCode: (code: string) => void;
}

// 产品类型

  _id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  description: string;
  features: string[];
  requirements?: string[];
  coverImage: string;
  viewCount: number;
  consultCount: number;

  isActive?: boolean;

}

  createdAt: string;
}

interface IApiResponse<T = any> {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: T;
}

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/app.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融小程序 - 入口文件
 */

App({
  globalData: {
    userInfo: null,
    phone: null,
    openid: null,
    token: null,
    referralCode: null,
    sourceCode: null
  },

  onLaunch(options) {
    console.log('银掌柜小程序启动', options);

    // 检查是否有分享码参数
    if (options.query && options.query.ref) {
      this.setSourceCode(options.query.ref);
    }

    // 检查本地存储的登录态
    this.checkLocalStorage();
  },

  onShow(options) {
    if (options.query && options.query.ref) {
      this.setSourceCode(options.query.ref);
    }
  },

  checkLocalStorage() {
    try {
      const token = wx.getStorageSync('token');
      const openid = wx.getStorageSync('openid');
      const phone = wx.getStorageSync('phone');
      const referralCode = wx.getStorageSync('referralCode');

      if (token && openid) {
        this.globalData.token = token;
        this.globalData.openid = openid;
        this.globalData.phone = phone || null;
        this.globalData.referralCode = referralCode || null;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('读取本地存储失败:', e);
    }
  },

  checkLogin() {
    const self = this;
    if (this.globalData.token && this.globalData.openid) {
      return Promise.resolve(true);
    }

    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      wx.login({
        success: (res) => {
          if (res.code) {
            self.loginWithCode(res.code).then(resolve).catch(() => resolve(false));
          } else {
            resolve(false);
          }
        },
        fail: () => resolve(false)
      });
    });
  },

  loginWithCode(code) {
    const self = this;
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      wx.request({
        url: 'http://localhost:8100/api/auth/wx-login',
        method: 'POST',
        data: {
          code,
          sourceCode: self.globalData.sourceCode
        },
        success: (res) => {
          if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data.success) {
            const { token, openid, phone, referralCode } = res.data.data;
            
            self.globalData.token = token;
            self.globalData.openid = openid;
            self.globalData.phone = phone || null;
            self.globalData.referralCode = referralCode || null;
            
            wx.setStorageSync('token', token);
            wx.setStorageSync('openid', openid);
            if (phone) wx.setStorageSync('phone', phone);
            if (referralCode) wx.setStorageSync('referralCode', referralCode);
            
            resolve(true);
          } else {
            resolve(false);
          }
        },
        fail: () => resolve(false)
      });
    });
  },

  getUserInfo() {
    const self = this;
    if (this.globalData.userInfo) {
      return Promise.resolve(this.globalData.userInfo);
    }

    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      wx.getUserProfile({
        desc: '用于完善用户资料',
        success: (res) => {
          self.globalData.userInfo = res.userInfo;
          resolve(res.userInfo);
        },
        fail: () => resolve(null)
      });
    });
  },

  setSourceCode(code) {
    this.globalData.sourceCode = code;
    wx.setStorageSync('sourceCode', code);
  }
});

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/index/index.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融小程序 - 首页
 */

const app = getApp();

// API基础地址（开发环境用本地，生产环境替换）
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

// 产品分类
const CATEGORIES = [
  { id: 'all', name: '全部', icon: '🏦' },
  { id: 'loan', name: '贷款', icon: '💰' },
  { id: 'capital', name: '资金', icon: '📊' },
  { id: 'data', name: '数据', icon: '📈' },
  { id: 'finance', name: '财务', icon: '📋' },
  { id: 'legal', name: '法务', icon: '⚖️' }
];

Page({
  data: {
    categories: CATEGORIES,
    activeCategory: 'all',
    products: [],
    loading: true
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.loadProducts();
  },

  onPullDownRefresh() {
    this.loadProducts().then(() => {
      wx.stopPullDownRefresh();
    });
  },

  loadProducts() {
    const self = this;
    self.setData({ loading: true });

    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      wx.request({
        url: `${API_BASE}/api/products`,
        method: 'GET',
        success: (res) => {
          if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data.success) {
            const products = res.data.data.list || [];
            self.setData({ products, loading: false });
          } else {
            self.loadMockProducts();
          }
          resolve();
        },
        fail: () => {
          self.loadMockProducts();
          resolve();
        }
      });
    });
  },

  loadMockProducts() {
    const mockProducts = [
      {
        _id: '1',
        name: '卡发工资贷',
        category: 'loan',
        description: '有工资卡即可申请，最高50万，利率低至3.85%',
        features: ['无抵押', '当天放款', '低利率'],
        consultCount: 356,
        isHot: true
      },
      {
        _id: '2',
        name: '银行房抵贷',
        category: 'loan',
        description: '房产抵押贷款，最高1000万，年化利率低至3.5%',
        features: ['大额度', '长周期', '利率优'],
        consultCount: 234,
        isHot: true
      },
      {
        _id: '3',
        name: '过桥资金',
        category: 'capital',
        description: '资产过桥、企业过桥，日息千一起，快速到账',
        features: ['快速', '灵活', '专业'],
        consultCount: 128,
        isHot: true
      },
      {
        _id: '4',
        name: '企业信用贷',
        category: 'loan',
        description: '企业票贷、税贷，最高300万，无需抵押',
        features: ['企业专属', '无抵押'],
        consultCount: 89
      }
    ];

    const filtered = this.data.activeCategory === 'all' 
      ? mockProducts 
      : mockProducts.filter(p => p.category === this.data.activeCategory);

    this.setData({ products: filtered, loading: false });
  },

  onCategoryTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    if (id === this.data.activeCategory) return;

    this.setData({ activeCategory: id });
    this.loadProducts();
  },

  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({ url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}` });
  },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    const sourceCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 专业金融服务平台',
      path: `/pages/index/index?ref=${sourceCode}`
    };
  }
});

[Tool result] Write

assistant:
[Thinking] 现在重写产品详情页和个人中心页，然后重写管理后台。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/product/product.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融小程序 - 产品详情页
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    product: null,
    loading: true,
    showAuthModal: false,
    formData: {
      name: '',
      phone: '',
      company: ''
    }
  },

  onLoad(options) {
    if (options.id) {
      this.loadProduct(options.id);
    } else {
      this.loadMockProduct();
    }
  },

  loadProduct(id) {
    const self = this;
    wx.request({
      url: `${API_BASE}/api/products/${id}`,
      success: (res) => {
        if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data.success) {
          self.setData({ product: res.data.data, loading: false });
        } else {
          self.loadMockProduct();
        }
      },
      fail: () => self.loadMockProduct()
    });
  },

  loadMockProduct() {
    this.setData({
      loading: false,
      product: {
        _id: '1',
        name: '卡发工资贷',
        category: 'loan',
        description: '有工资卡即可申请，最高50万，利率低至3.85%，最快当天放款。适合有稳定工作的上班族，手续简便，审批快速。',
        features: ['无抵押无担保', '当天审批放款', '利率低至3.85%', '最高额度50万'],
        requirements: ['年龄22-55周岁', '工资代发6个月以上', '征信良好无逾期', '月收入5000元以上'],
        consultCount: 356
      }
    });
  },

  // 点击立即咨询
  onConsultTap() {
    if (app.globalData.phone) {
      this.submitLead();
    } else {
      this.setData({ showAuthModal: true });
    }
  },

  // 微信一键授权手机号
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.code) {
      const self = this;
      wx.request({
        url: `${API_BASE}/api/auth/decrypt-phone`,
        method: 'POST',
        data: { code: e.detail.code },
        header: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${app.globalData.token || ''}` },
        success: (res) => {
          if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data.success) {
            app.globalData.phone = res.data.data.phone;
            wx.setStorageSync('phone', res.data.data.phone);
            self.setData({ showAuthModal: false });
            self.submitLead();
          } else {
            wx.showToast({ title: '授权失败', icon: 'none' });
          }
        },
        fail: () => wx.showToast({ title: '网络错误', icon: 'none' })
      });
    }
  },

  // 手动输入表单
  onInputChange(e) {
    const field = e.currentTarget.dataset.field;
    this.setData({ [`formData.${field}`]: e.detail.value });
  },

  // 提交手动表单
  onManualSubmit() {
    const { name, phone, company } = this.data.formData;
    if (!phone || phone.length !== 11) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    app.globalData.phone = phone;
    this.setData({ showAuthModal: false });
    this.submitLead(name, company);
  },

  // 提交客资
  submitLead(name, company) {
    const self = this;
    const product = this.data.product;
    
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });

    wx.request({
      url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
      method: 'POST',
      data: {
        phone: app.globalData.phone,
        name: name || '',
        company: company || '',
        productId: product._id,
        productName: product.name,
        source: 'miniprogram',
        referralCode: app.globalData.sourceCode || ''
      },
      success: (res) => {
        wx.hideLoading();
        if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data.success) {
          wx.showToast({ title: '咨询已提交', icon: 'success' });
        } else {
          wx.showToast({ title: res.data.message || '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
        }
      },
      fail: () => {
        wx.hideLoading();
        wx.showToast({ title: '网络错误', icon: 'none' });
      }
    });
  },

  closeModal() {
    this.setData({ showAuthModal: false });
  },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    const product = this.data.product;
    const sourceCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    return {
      title: product ? `${product.name} - 银掌柜金融` : '银掌柜金融',
      path: `/pages/product/product?id=${product?._id || ''}&ref=${sourceCode}`
    };
  }
});

    <!-- 底部按钮 -->

        <text class="btn-sub">专业顾问1对1服务</text>
      </button>
    </view>
  </block>

  <!-- 授权弹窗 -->
  <view wx:if="{{showAuthModal}}" class="modal-mask" bindtap="closeModal">
    <view class="modal-content" catchtap="">
      <view class="modal-header">
        <text class="modal-title">获取您的联系方式</text>
        <text class="modal-close" bindtap="closeModal">×</text>
      </view>
      
      <view class="modal-body">
        <text class="modal-tip">便于专业顾问与您联系</text>
        
        <!-- 微信一键授权 -->
        <button class="wx-auth-btn" open-type="getPhoneNumber" bindgetphonenumber="onGetPhoneNumber">
          <text class="wx-icon">📱</text>
          <text class="wx-text">微信一键授权</text>
        </button>
        
        <view class="divider">
          <view class="divider-line"></view>
          <text class="divider-text">或手动填写</text>
          <view class="divider-line"></view>
        </view>
        
        <!-- 手动填写表单 -->
        <view class="form">
          <input class="form-input" placeholder="您的姓名（选填）" data-field="name" bindinput="onInputChange" />
          <input class="form-input" placeholder="手机号码（必填）" type="number" maxlength="11" data-field="phone" bindinput="onInputChange" />
          <input class="form-input" placeholder="公司名称（选填）" data-field="company" bindinput="onInputChange" />
          <button class="submit-btn" bindtap="onManualSubmit">提交</button>
        </view>
      </view>

  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/profile/profile.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融小程序 - 个人中心
 */

const app = getApp();

Page({
  data: {
    userInfo: null,
    phone: null,
    referralCode: '',
    stats: {
      totalEarnings: 0,
      pendingEarnings: 0,
      leadsCount: 0
    }
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.loadUserData();
  },

  onShow() {
    this.loadUserData();
  },

  loadUserData() {
    this.setData({
      userInfo: app.globalData.userInfo,
      phone: app.globalData.phone,
      referralCode: app.globalData.referralCode || 'YZG' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6).toUpperCase()
    });
  },

  // 复制分享码
  onCopyCode() {
    wx.setClipboardData({
      data: this.data.referralCode,
      success: () => {
        wx.showToast({ title: '已复制', icon: 'success' });
      }
    });
  },

  // 生成分享海报
  onGeneratePoster() {
    wx.showToast({ title: '海报功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
  },

  // 分享给好友
  onShareFriend() {
    // 触发分享
  },

  onShareAppMessage() {
    const sourceCode = this.data.referralCode;
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 专业金融服务平台',
      path: `/pages/index/index?ref=${sourceCode}`
    };
  }
});

现在重写管理后台，使用内联样式确保CSS正确显示。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/admin/app/page.tsx
  contents: 'use client'

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 仪表盘
 * 设计风格：蚂蚁阿福蓝色系 + 苹果毛玻璃
 */

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8100'

// 颜色配置
const COLORS = {
  primary: '#1677FF',
  primaryLight: '#4096FF',
  primaryBg: '#EEF4FF',
  gold: '#FAAD14',
  green: '#52C41A',
  red: '#FF4D4F',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E7EB',
  bg: '#F8FAFC'
}

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({
    totalLeads: 0,
    todayLeads: 0,
    totalProducts: 0,
    totalUsers: 0
  })
  const [hotProducts, setHotProducts] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [recentLeads, setRecentLeads] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    loadData()
  }, [])

  async function loadData() {
    try {
      const [statsRes, leadsRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/statistics/overview`),
        fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/leads?pageSize=5`)
      ])
      
      const statsData = await statsRes.json()
      const leadsData = await leadsRes.json()
      
      if (statsData.success) {
        setStats({
          totalLeads: statsData.data.totalLeads || 0,
          todayLeads: statsData.data.todayLeads || 0,
          totalProducts: statsData.data.totalProducts || 0,
          totalUsers: statsData.data.totalUsers || 0
        })
        setHotProducts(statsData.data.hotProducts || [])
      }
      
      if (leadsData.success) {
        setRecentLeads(leadsData.data.list || [])
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('加载数据失败:', e)
      // 使用模拟数据
      setStats({ totalLeads: 156, todayLeads: 12, totalProducts: 8, totalUsers: 89 })
      setHotProducts([
        { _id: '1', name: '卡发工资贷', consultCount: 356, viewCount: 1280 },
        { _id: '2', name: '银行房抵贷', consultCount: 234, viewCount: 890 },
        { _id: '3', name: '过桥资金', consultCount: 128, viewCount: 560 },
      ])
      setRecentLeads([
        { _id: '1', name: '张先生', phone: '138****8888', status: 'new', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
        { _id: '2', name: '李女士', phone: '139****6666', status: 'following', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
      ])
    }
  }

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: '🏠', label: '仪表盘', href: '/', active: true },
    { icon: '👥', label: '客资管理', href: '/leads' },
    { icon: '📦', label: '产品管理', href: '/products' },
    { icon: '📊', label: '数据统计', href: '/statistics' },
    { icon: '🔗', label: '分销管理', href: '/distribution' },
    { icon: '⚙️', label: '系统设置', href: '/settings' },
  ]

  const statCards = [
    { title: '总客资', value: stats.totalLeads, icon: '👥', color: COLORS.primary },
    { title: '今日新增', value: stats.todayLeads, icon: '➕', color: COLORS.gold },
    { title: '产品数量', value: stats.totalProducts, icon: '📦', color: COLORS.green },
    { title: '注册用户', value: stats.totalUsers, icon: '👤', color: '#8B5CF6' },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ 
      display: 'flex', 
      minHeight: '100vh', 
      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primaryBg} 0%, ${COLORS.bg} 100%)`
    }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: '260px',
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
        color: 'white',

        left: 0,

        zIndex: 50
      }}>
        {/* Logo区域 */}
        <div style={{ 
          padding: '28px 24px', 
          borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'
        }}>
          <h1 style={{ fontSize: '22px', fontWeight: 700, margin: 0 }}>银掌柜金融</h1>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', opacity: 0.8, margin: '6px 0 0' }}>管理后台</p>
        </div>

        {/* 菜单 */}
        <nav style={{ padding: '16px 12px', flex: 1 }}>
          {menuItems.map((item) => (
            <a
              key={item.href}

              style={{

            仪表盘
          </h2>

            {new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-CN', { 
              year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', weekday: 'long'
            })}
          </span>
        </header>

                background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.9)',

          </div>

          <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: '20px' }}>

            <div style={{
              background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.9)',
              backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
              WebkitBackdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',

                justifyContent: 'space-between',

              }}>

                  {recentLeads.map((lead) => {
                    const statusConfig: Record<string, { label: string; bg: string; color: string }> = {
                      new: { label: '新客资', bg: '#EEF4FF', color: COLORS.primary },
                      following: { label: '跟进中', bg: '#FFF7E6', color: '#FAAD14' },

                    }
                    const status = statusConfig[lead.status] || statusConfig.new

                    return (
                      <div key={lead._id} style={{
                        display: 'flex',
                        alignItems: 'center',
                        gap: '14px',
                        padding: '14px',
                        background: COLORS.bg,
                        borderRadius: '14px'
                      }}>
                        <div style={{
                          width: '44px',
                          height: '44px',
                          borderRadius: '50%',
                          background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                          display: 'flex',
                          alignItems: 'center',
                          justifyContent: 'center',
                          color: 'white',
                          fontWeight: 600,
                          fontSize: '16px'
                        }}>
                          {(lead.name || lead.phone)?.[0] || '?'}
                        </div>
                        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                          <p style={{ margin: 0, fontWeight: 500, color: COLORS.text }}>
                            {lead.name || '未填写姓名'}
                          </p>
                          <p style={{ margin: '4px 0 0', fontSize: '13px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                            {lead.phone}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}>
                          <span style={{
                            display: 'inline-block',
                            padding: '4px 10px',
                            background: status.bg,
                            color: status.color,
                            fontSize: '12px',
                            borderRadius: '20px'
                          }}>
                            {status.label}
                          </span>
                          <p style={{ margin: '6px 0 0', fontSize: '12px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                            {new Date(lead.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

Website URL: https://ckbapi.quwanzhi.com/doc/api_v1.md
Website Title: api_v1.md
Website Content:
# 对外获客线索上报接口文档（V1）

## 一、接口概述

- **接口名称**：对外获客线索上报接口  
- **接口用途**：供第三方系统向【存客宝】上报客户线索（手机号 / 微信号等），用于后续的跟进、标签管理和画像分析。  
- **接口协议**：HTTP  
- **请求方式**：`POST`  
- **请求地址**： `https://ckbapi.quwanzhi.com/v1/api/scenarios`  

> 具体 URL 以实际环境配置为准。

- **数据格式**：
  - 推荐：`application/json`
  - 兼容：`application/x-www-form-urlencoded`
- **字符编码**：`UTF-8`

---

## 二、鉴权与签名

### 2.1 必填鉴权字段

| 字段名      | 类型   | 必填 | 说明                                  |
|-------------|--------|------|---------------------------------------|
| `apiKey`    | string | 是   | 分配给第三方的接口密钥（每个任务唯一）|
| `sign`      | string | 是   | 签名值                                |
| `timestamp` | int    | 是   | 秒级时间戳（与服务器时间差不超过 5 分钟） |

### 2.2 时间戳校验

服务器会校验 `timestamp` 是否在当前时间前后 **5 分钟** 内：

- 通过条件：`|server_time - timestamp| <= 300`
- 超出范围则返回：`请求已过期`

### 2.3 签名生成规则

接口采用自定义签名机制。**签名字段为 `sign`，生成步骤如下：**

假设本次请求的所有参数为 `params`，其中包括业务参数 + `apiKey` + `timestamp` + `sign` + 可能存在的 `portrait` 对象。

#### 第一步：移除特定字段

从 `params` 中移除以下字段：

- `sign` —— 自身不参与签名  
- `apiKey` —— 不参与参数拼接，仅在最后一步参与二次 MD5  
- `portrait` —— 整个画像对象不参与签名（即使内部还有子字段）

> 说明：`portrait` 通常是一个 JSON 对象，字段较多，为避免签名实现复杂且双方难以对齐，统一不参与签名。

#### 第二步：移除空值字段

从剩余参数中，移除值为：

- `null`
- 空字符串 `''`

的字段，这些字段不参与签名。

#### 第三步：按参数名升序排序

对剩余参数按**参数名（键名）升序排序**，排序规则为标准的 ASCII 升序：

```text
例如： name, phone, source, timestamp
```

#### 第四步：拼接参数值

将排序后的参数 **只取“值”**，按顺序直接拼接为一个字符串，中间不加任何分隔符：

- 示例：  
  排序后参数为：

  ```text
  name      = 张三
  phone     = 13800000000
  source    = 微信广告
  timestamp = 1710000000
  ```

  则拼接：

  ```text
  stringToSign = "张三13800000000微信广告1710000000"
  ```

#### 第五步：第一次 MD5

对上一步拼接得到的字符串做一次 MD5：

\[
\text{firstMd5} = \text{MD5}(\text{stringToSign})
\]

#### 第六步：拼接 apiKey 再次 MD5

将第一步的结果与 `apiKey` 直接拼接，再做一次 MD5，得到最终签名值：

\[
\text{sign} = \text{MD5}(\text{firstMd5} + \text{apiKey})
\]

#### 第七步：放入请求

将第六步得到的 `sign` 填入请求参数中的 `sign` 字段即可。

> 建议：  
> - 使用小写 MD5 字符串（双方约定统一即可）。  
> - 请确保参与签名的参数与最终请求发送的参数一致（包括是否传空值）。

### 2.4 签名示例（PHP 伪代码）

```php
$params = [
    'apiKey'    => 'YOUR_API_KEY',
    'timestamp' => '1710000000',
    'phone'     => '13800000000',
    'name'      => '张三',
    'source'    => '微信广告',
    'remark'    => '通过H5落地页留资',
    // 'portrait' => [...], // 如有画像，这里会存在，但不参与签名
    // 'sign'   => '待生成',
];

// 1. 去掉 sign、apiKey、portrait
unset($params['sign'], $params['apiKey'], $params['portrait']);

// 2. 去掉空值
$params = array_filter($params, function($value) {
    return !is_null($value) && $value !== '';
});

// 3. 按键名升序排序
ksort($params);

// 4. 拼接参数值
$stringToSign = implode('', array_values($params));

// 5. 第一次 MD5
$firstMd5 = md5($stringToSign);

// 6. 第二次 MD5（拼接 apiKey）
$apiKey = 'YOUR_API_KEY';
$sign   = md5($firstMd5 . $apiKey);

// 将 $sign 作为字段发送
$params['sign'] = $sign;
```

---

## 三、请求参数说明

### 3.1 主标识字段（至少传一个）

| 字段名    | 类型   | 必填 | 说明                                      |
|-----------|--------|------|-------------------------------------------|
| `wechatId`| string | 否   | 微信号，存在时优先作为主标识              |
| `phone`   | string | 否   | 手机号，当 `wechatId` 为空时用作主标识    |

### 3.2 基础信息字段

| 字段名     | 类型   | 必填 | 说明                      |
|------------|--------|------|-------------------------|
| `name`     | string | 否   | 客户姓名                    |
| `source`   | string | 否   | 线索来源描述，如“百度推广”、“抖音直播间”  |
| `remark`   | string | 否   | 备注信息                    |
| `tags`     | string | 否   | 逗号分隔的“微信标签”，如：`"高意向,电商,女装"` |
| `siteTags` | string | 否   | 逗号分隔的“站内标签”，用于站内进一步细分   |

### 3.3 用户画像字段 `portrait`（可选）

`portrait` 为一个对象（JSON），用于记录用户的行为画像数据。

#### 3.3.1 基本示例

```json
"portrait": {
  "type": 1,
  "source": 1,
  "sourceData": {
    "age": 28,
    "gender": "female",
    "city": "上海",
    "productId": "P12345",
    "pageUrl": "https://example.com/product/123"
  },
  "remark": "画像-基础属性",
  "uniqueId": "user_13800000000_20250301_001"
}
```

#### 3.3.2 字段详细说明

| 字段名                | 类型   | 必填 | 说明                                   |
|-----------------------|--------|------|----------------------------------------|
| `portrait.type`       | int    | 否   | 画像类型，枚举值：<br>0-浏览<br>1-点击<br>2-下单/购买<br>3-注册<br>4-互动<br>默认值：0 |
| `portrait.source`     | int    | 否   | 画像来源，枚举值：<br>0-本站<br>1-老油条<br>2-老坑爹<br>默认值：0 |
| `portrait.sourceData` | object | 否   | 画像明细数据（键值对，会存储为 JSON 格式）<br>可包含任意业务相关的键值对，如：年龄、性别、城市、商品ID、页面URL等 |
| `portrait.remark`     | string | 否   | 画像备注信息，最大长度100字符 |
| `portrait.uniqueId`   | string | 否   | 画像去重用唯一 ID<br>用于防止重复记录，相同 `uniqueId` 的画像数据在半小时内会被合并统计（count字段累加）<br>建议格式：`{来源标识}_{用户标识}_{时间戳}_{序号}` |

#### 3.3.3 画像类型（type）说明

| 值 | 类型 | 说明 | 适用场景 |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 0 | 浏览 | 用户浏览了页面或内容 | 页面访问、商品浏览、文章阅读等 |
| 1 | 点击 | 用户点击了某个元素 | 按钮点击、链接点击、广告点击等 |
| 2 | 下单/购买 | 用户完成了购买行为 | 订单提交、支付完成等 |
| 3 | 注册 | 用户完成了注册 | 账号注册、会员注册等 |
| 4 | 互动 | 用户进行了互动行为 | 点赞、评论、分享、咨询等 |

#### 3.3.4 画像来源（source）说明

| 值 | 来源 | 说明 |
|---|------|------|
| 0 | 本站 | 来自本站的数据 |
| 1 | 老油条 | 来自"老油条"系统的数据 |
| 2 | 老坑爹 | 来自"老坑爹"系统的数据 |

#### 3.3.5 sourceData 数据格式说明

`sourceData` 是一个 JSON 对象，可以包含任意业务相关的键值对。常见字段示例：

```json
{
  "age": 28,
  "gender": "female",
  "city": "上海",
  "province": "上海市",
  "productId": "P12345",
  "productName": "商品名称",
  "category": "女装",
  "price": 299.00,
  "pageUrl": "https://example.com/product/123",
  "referrer": "https://www.baidu.com",
  "device": "mobile",
  "browser": "WeChat"
}
```

> **注意**：
> - `sourceData` 中的数据类型可以是字符串、数字、布尔值等
> - 嵌套对象会被序列化为 JSON 字符串存储
> - 建议根据实际业务需求定义字段结构

#### 3.3.6 uniqueId 去重机制说明

- **作用**：防止重复记录相同的画像数据
- **规则**：相同 `uniqueId` 的画像数据在 **半小时内** 会被合并统计，`count` 字段会自动累加
- **建议格式**：`{来源标识}_{用户标识}_{时间戳}_{序号}`
  - 示例：`site_13800000000_1710000000_001`
  - 示例：`wechat_wxid_abc123_1710000000_001`
- **注意事项**：
  - 如果不传 `uniqueId`，系统会为每条画像数据创建新记录
  - 如果需要在半小时内多次统计同一行为，应使用相同的 `uniqueId`
  - 如果需要在半小时后重新统计，应使用不同的 `uniqueId`（建议修改时间戳部分）

> **重要提示**：`portrait` **整体不参与签名计算**，但会参与业务处理。系统会根据 `uniqueId` 自动处理去重和统计。

```json
}
```

```json

  "apiKey": "YOUR_API_KEY",
  "timestamp": 1710000000,
  "wechatId": "wxid_abcdefg123",
  "phone": "13800000001",
  "name": "李四",
  "source": "小程序落地页",
  "remark": "点击【立即咨询】按钮",
  "tags": "中意向,直播",
  "siteTags": "复购,高客单",
  "portrait": {
    "type": 1,
    "source": 0,
    "sourceData": {
      "age": 28,
      "gender": "female",
      "city": "上海",
      "pageUrl": "https://example.com/product/123",
      "productId": "P12345"
    },
    "remark": "画像-点击行为",
    "uniqueId": "site_13800000001_1710000000_001"
  },
  "sign": "根据签名规则生成的MD5字符串"
}
```

## 五、响应说明

### 5.1 成功响应

**1）新增线索成功**

```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "新增成功",
  "data": "13800000000"
}
```

**2）线索已存在**

```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "已存在",
  "data": "13800000000"
}
```

> `data` 字段返回本次线索的主标识 `wechatId` 或 `phone`。

### 5.2 常见错误响应

```json
{ "code": 400, "message": "apiKey不能为空", "data": null }
{ "code": 400, "message": "sign不能为空", "data": null }
{ "code": 400, "message": "timestamp不能为空", "data": null }
{ "code": 400, "message": "请求已过期", "data": null }

{ "code": 401, "message": "无效的apiKey", "data": null }
{ "code": 401, "message": "签名验证失败", "data": null }

{ "code": 500, "message": "系统错误: 具体错误信息", "data": null }
```

---

## 六、常见问题（FAQ）

### Q1: 如果同一个用户多次上报相同的行为，会如何处理？

**A**: 如果使用相同的 `uniqueId`，系统会在半小时内合并统计，`count` 字段会累加。如果使用不同的 `uniqueId`，会创建多条记录。

### Q2: portrait 字段是否必须传递？

**A**: 不是必须的。`portrait` 字段是可选的，只有在需要记录用户画像数据时才传递。

### Q3: sourceData 中可以存储哪些类型的数据？

**A**: `sourceData` 是一个 JSON 对象，可以存储任意键值对。支持字符串、数字、布尔值等基本类型，嵌套对象会被序列化为 JSON 字符串。

### Q4: uniqueId 的作用是什么？

**A**: `uniqueId` 用于防止重复记录。相同 `uniqueId` 的画像数据在半小时内会被合并统计，避免重复数据。

### Q5: 画像数据如何与用户关联？

**A**: 系统会根据请求中的 `wechatId` 或 `phone` 自动匹配 `traffic_pool` 表中的用户，并将画像数据关联到对应的 `trafficPoolId`。

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 仪表盘
 * 设计风格：高级金色主题 + 苹果毛玻璃
 */

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8100'

// 金色主题配色
const COLORS = {
  primary: '#D4AF37',      // 主金色
  primaryDark: '#B8860B',  // 深金色
  primaryLight: '#F5D77A', // 浅金色
  accent: '#1A365D',       // 深蓝点缀
  bg: '#FFFEF5',           // 米白背景
  bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFEF5 0%, #FFF9E6 50%, #FFF5D6 100%)',
  card: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E1D8',
  success: '#10B981',
  warning: '#F59E0B',
  danger: '#EF4444'
}

// 侧边栏样式
const sidebarStyle = {
  background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryDark} 100%)`,
}

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalLeads: 0, todayLeads: 0, totalProducts: 0, totalUsers: 0 })
  const [hotProducts, setHotProducts] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [recentLeads, setRecentLeads] = useState<any[]>([])

  useEffect(() => { loadData() }, [])

  async function loadData() {
    try {
      const [statsRes, leadsRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/statistics/overview`),
        fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/leads?pageSize=5`)
      ])
      const statsData = await statsRes.json()
      const leadsData = await leadsRes.json()
      
      if (statsData.success) {
        setStats({
          totalLeads: statsData.data.totalLeads || 0,
          todayLeads: statsData.data.todayLeads || 0,
          totalProducts: statsData.data.totalProducts || 0,
          totalUsers: statsData.data.totalUsers || 0
        })
        setHotProducts(statsData.data.hotProducts || [])
      }
      if (leadsData.success) {
        setRecentLeads(leadsData.data.list || [])
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('加载失败:', e)
      setStats({ totalLeads: 156, todayLeads: 12, totalProducts: 8, totalUsers: 89 })
      setHotProducts([
        { _id: '1', name: '卡发工资贷', consultCount: 356, viewCount: 1280 },
        { _id: '2', name: '银行房抵贷', consultCount: 234, viewCount: 890 },
        { _id: '3', name: '过桥资金', consultCount: 128, viewCount: 560 },
      ])
      setRecentLeads([
        { _id: '1', name: '张先生', phone: '138****8888', status: 'new', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
        { _id: '2', name: '李女士', phone: '139****6666', status: 'following', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
      ])
    }
  }

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: '🏠', label: '仪表盘', href: '/', active: true },
    { icon: '👥', label: '客资管理', href: '/leads' },
    { icon: '📦', label: '产品管理', href: '/products' },
    { icon: '📊', label: '数据统计', href: '/statistics' },
    { icon: '🔗', label: '分销管理', href: '/distribution' },
    { icon: '⚙️', label: '系统设置', href: '/settings' },
  ]

  const statCards = [
    { title: '总客资', value: stats.totalLeads, icon: '👥', gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)` },
    { title: '今日新增', value: stats.todayLeads, icon: '➕', gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.success} 0%, #34D399 100%)` },
    { title: '产品数量', value: stats.totalProducts, icon: '📦', gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.accent} 0%, #2563EB 100%)` },
    { title: '注册用户', value: stats.totalUsers, icon: '👤', gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6 0%, #A78BFA 100%)` },

          <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', opacity: 0.85, margin: '8px 0 0' }}>专业金融服务管理平台</p>

          {menuItems.map((item) => (
            <a key={item.href} href={item.href} style={{
              display: 'flex',

                        <p style={{ margin: '4px 0 0', fontSize: '13px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{product.consultCount} 次咨询</p>
                      </div>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '13px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{product.viewCount || 0} 浏览</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* 最新客资 */}
            <div style={{
              background: COLORS.card,
              backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
              borderRadius: '20px',
              padding: '24px',
              boxShadow: '0 4px 24px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)',
              border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`
            }}>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: '17px', fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>
                  📋 最新客资
                </h3>
                <a href="/leads" style={{ fontSize: '14px', color: COLORS.primary, textDecoration: 'none', fontWeight: 500 }}>
                  查看全部 →
                </a>
              </div>

              {recentLeads.length === 0 ? (
                <p style={{ textAlign: 'center', color: COLORS.textSecondary, padding: '40px 0' }}>暂无客资</p>
              ) : (
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '12px' }}>
                  {recentLeads.map((lead) => {
                    const statusConfig: Record<string, { label: string; bg: string; color: string }> = {
                      new: { label: '新客资', bg: `${COLORS.primary}15`, color: COLORS.primary },
                      following: { label: '跟进中', bg: '#FEF3C7', color: '#D97706' },
                      converted: { label: '已转化', bg: '#D1FAE5', color: '#059669' },
                      invalid: { label: '无效', bg: '#F3F4F6', color: '#6B7280' }
                    }
                    const status = statusConfig[lead.status] || statusConfig.new

                    return (
                      <div key={lead._id} style={{
                        display: 'flex',
                        alignItems: 'center',
                        gap: '14px',
                        padding: '14px',
                        background: '#F9FAFB',
                        borderRadius: '14px'
                      }}>
                        <div style={{
                          width: '48px',
                          height: '48px',
                          borderRadius: '50%',
                          background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                          display: 'flex',
                          alignItems: 'center',
                          justifyContent: 'center',
                          color: 'white',
                          fontWeight: 700,
                          fontSize: '18px',
                          boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'
                        }}>
                          {(lead.name || lead.phone)?.[0] || '?'}
                        </div>
                        <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                          <p style={{ margin: 0, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{lead.name || '未填写姓名'}</p>
                          <p style={{ margin: '4px 0 0', fontSize: '13px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{lead.phone}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}>
                          <span style={{
                            display: 'inline-block',
                            padding: '5px 12px',
                            background: status.bg,
                            color: status.color,
                            fontSize: '12px',
                            fontWeight: 500,
                            borderRadius: '20px'
                          }}>
                            {status.label}
                          </span>
                          <p style={{ margin: '6px 0 0', fontSize: '12px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                            {new Date(lead.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 客资管理
 */

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8100'

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#D4AF37',
  primaryDark: '#B8860B',
  primaryLight: '#F5D77A',
  accent: '#1A365D',
  bg: '#FFFEF5',
  bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFEF5 0%, #FFF9E6 50%, #FFF5D6 100%)',
  card: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E1D8'
}

export default function LeadsPage() {
  const [leads, setLeads] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('')
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all')

  useEffect(() => { loadLeads() }, [])

  async function loadLeads() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/leads?pageSize=50`)
      const data = await res.json()
      if (data.success) {
        setLeads(data.data.list || [])
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('加载失败:', e)
      setLeads([
        { _id: '1', name: '张先生', phone: '13812345678', company: '科技公司', productName: '卡发工资贷', status: 'new', source: 'miniprogram', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
        { _id: '2', name: '李女士', phone: '13912345678', company: '贸易公司', productName: '银行房抵贷', status: 'following', source: 'share', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
        { _id: '3', name: '王总', phone: '13712345678', company: '建筑公司', productName: '过桥资金', status: 'converted', source: 'poster', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() },
      ])
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const filteredLeads = leads.filter(lead => {
    const matchSearch = !searchTerm || 
      lead.name?.includes(searchTerm) || 
      lead.phone?.includes(searchTerm) ||
      lead.company?.includes(searchTerm)
    const matchStatus = statusFilter === 'all' || lead.status === statusFilter
    return matchSearch && matchStatus
  })

  const statusConfig: Record<string, { label: string; bg: string; color: string }> = {
    new: { label: '新客资', bg: `${COLORS.primary}20`, color: COLORS.primary },
    following: { label: '跟进中', bg: '#FEF3C7', color: '#D97706' },
    converted: { label: '已转化', bg: '#D1FAE5', color: '#059669' },
    invalid: { label: '无效', bg: '#F3F4F6', color: '#6B7280' }
  }

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: '🏠', label: '仪表盘', href: '/' },
    { icon: '👥', label: '客资管理', href: '/leads', active: true },
    { icon: '📦', label: '产品管理', href: '/products' },
    { icon: '📊', label: '数据统计', href: '/statistics' },
    { icon: '🔗', label: '分销管理', href: '/distribution' },
    { icon: '⚙️', label: '系统设置', href: '/settings' },
  ]

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bgGradient }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: '260px',
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryDark} 100%)`,
        color: 'white',
        flexShrink: 0,
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        position: 'fixed',
        left: 0,
        top: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        zIndex: 50,
        boxShadow: '4px 0 24px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2)'
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '28px 24px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' }}>
          <h1 style={{ fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: 700, margin: 0, letterSpacing: '2px' }}>💰 银掌柜金融</h1>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', opacity: 0.85, margin: '8px 0 0' }}>专业金融服务管理平台</p>
        </div>
        <nav style={{ padding: '16px 12px', flex: 1 }}>
          {menuItems.map((item) => (
            <a key={item.href} href={item.href} style={{
              display: 'flex',
              alignItems: 'center',
              gap: '12px',
              padding: '14px 16px',
              marginBottom: '4px',
              borderRadius: '12px',
              textDecoration: 'none',
              color: item.active ? COLORS.primaryDark : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)',
              background: item.active ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.95)' : 'transparent',
              fontWeight: item.active ? 600 : 400,
              fontSize: '15px',
              boxShadow: item.active ? '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' : 'none'
            }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: '18px' }}>{item.icon}</span>
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </a>
          ))}
        </nav>
      </aside>

      {/* 主内容 */}
      <main style={{ flex: 1, marginLeft: '260px' }}>
        <header style={{
          background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)',
          backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
          padding: '18px 32px',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'space-between',
          position: 'sticky',
          top: 0,
          zIndex: 40
        }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: '22px', fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>
            <span style={{ color: COLORS.primary }}>👥</span> 客资管理
          </h2>
          <span style={{ fontSize: '14px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>共 {leads.length} 条客资</span>
        </header>

        <div style={{ padding: '28px 32px' }}>
          {/* 搜索和筛选 */}
          <div style={{
            display: 'flex',
            gap: '16px',
            marginBottom: '24px',
            background: COLORS.card,
            padding: '20px',
            borderRadius: '16px',
            border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`
          }}>
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="🔍 搜索姓名、手机号、公司..."
              value={searchTerm}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
              style={{
                flex: 1,
                padding: '12px 20px',
                border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
                borderRadius: '10px',
                fontSize: '15px',
                outline: 'none'
              }}
            />
            <select
              value={statusFilter}
              onChange={(e) => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)}
              style={{
                padding: '12px 20px',
                border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
                borderRadius: '10px',
                fontSize: '15px',
                background: 'white',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                minWidth: '140px'
              }}
            >
              <option value="all">全部状态</option>
              <option value="new">新客资</option>
              <option value="following">跟进中</option>
              <option value="converted">已转化</option>
              <option value="invalid">无效</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          {/* 客资列表 */}
          <div style={{
            background: COLORS.card,
            borderRadius: '20px',
            border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
            overflow: 'hidden'
          }}>
            {/* 表头 */}
            <div style={{
              display: 'grid',
              gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1fr 1.2fr 1fr',
              padding: '16px 24px',
              background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary}10 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight}10 100%)`,
              borderBottom: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
              fontWeight: 600,
              fontSize: '14px',
              color: COLORS.text
            }}>
              <span>客户信息</span>
              <span>联系电话</span>
              <span>公司</span>
              <span>咨询产品</span>
              <span>来源</span>
              <span>状态</span>
              <span>时间</span>
            </div>

            {/* 数据行 */}
            {loading ? (
              <div style={{ padding: '60px', textAlign: 'center', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>加载中...</div>
            ) : filteredLeads.length === 0 ? (
              <div style={{ padding: '60px', textAlign: 'center', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>暂无数据</div>
            ) : (
              filteredLeads.map((lead, i) => {
                const status = statusConfig[lead.status] || statusConfig.new
                return (
                  <div key={lead._id} style={{
                    display: 'grid',
                    gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1.5fr 1fr 1.2fr 1fr',
                    padding: '16px 24px',
                    borderBottom: i < filteredLeads.length - 1 ? `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` : 'none',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    fontSize: '14px'
                  }}>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '12px' }}>
                      <div style={{
                        width: '40px',
                        height: '40px',
                        borderRadius: '50%',
                        background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                        display: 'flex',
                        alignItems: 'center',
                        justifyContent: 'center',
                        color: 'white',
                        fontWeight: 600
                      }}>
                        {(lead.name || '?')[0]}
                      </div>
                      <span style={{ fontWeight: 500, color: COLORS.text }}>{lead.name || '未填写'}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.text }}>{lead.phone}</span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{lead.company || '-'}</span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.accent, fontWeight: 500 }}>{lead.productName}</span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{lead.source || '直接'}</span>
                    <span style={{
                      display: 'inline-block',
                      padding: '4px 12px',
                      background: status.bg,
                      color: status.color,
                      borderRadius: '20px',
                      fontSize: '12px',
                      fontWeight: 500
                    }}>
                      {status.label}
                    </span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontSize: '13px' }}>
                      {new Date(lead.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )
              })
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 产品管理
 */

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8100'

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#D4AF37',
  primaryDark: '#B8860B',
  primaryLight: '#F5D77A',
  accent: '#1A365D',
  bg: '#FFFEF5',
  bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFEF5 0%, #FFF9E6 50%, #FFF5D6 100%)',
  card: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E1D8',
  success: '#10B981'
}

const categoryLabels: Record<string, string> = {
  loan: '贷款',
  capital: '资金',
  data: '数据',
  finance: '财务',
  legal: '法务'
}

export default function ProductsPage() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('')
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('all')

  useEffect(() => { loadProducts() }, [])

  async function loadProducts() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/products`)
      const data = await res.json()
      if (data.success) {
        setProducts(data.data.list || [])
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('加载失败:', e)
      setProducts([
        { _id: '1', name: '卡发工资贷', category: 'loan', description: '有工资卡即可申请，最高50万', features: ['无抵押', '当天放款'], isActive: true, consultCount: 356, viewCount: 1280 },

      ])

                    </span>
                  </div>

                  <p style={{ margin: '0 0 16px', fontSize: '14px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
                    {product.description}
                  </p>

                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: '8px', marginBottom: '20px' }}>
                    {(product.features || []).map((f: string, i: number) => (
                      <span key={i} style={{
                        padding: '4px 12px',
                        background: `${COLORS.primary}10`,
                        color: COLORS.primary,
                        borderRadius: '8px',
                        fontSize: '12px'
                      }}>
                        {f}
                      </span>
                    ))}
                  </div>

                  <div style={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    justifyContent: 'space-between',
                    paddingTop: '16px',
                    borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`
                  }}>
                    <div>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{product.consultCount}</span>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginLeft: '4px' }}>次咨询</span>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{product.viewCount}</span>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginLeft: '4px' }}>浏览</span>
                    </div>
                    <button style={{
                      padding: '8px 16px',
                      background: 'transparent',
                      border: `1px solid ${COLORS.primary}`,
                      color: COLORS.primary,
                      borderRadius: '8px',
                      fontSize: '13px',
                      fontWeight: 500,
                      cursor: 'pointer'
                    }}>
                      编辑
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 数据统计
 */

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

const API_BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8100'

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#D4AF37',
  primaryDark: '#B8860B',
  primaryLight: '#F5D77A',
  accent: '#1A365D',
  bg: '#FFFEF5',
  bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFEF5 0%, #FFF9E6 50%, #FFF5D6 100%)',
  card: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E1D8',
  success: '#10B981'
}

export default function StatisticsPage() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<any>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    async function loadStats() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/statistics/overview`)
        const data = await res.json()
        if (data.success) setStats(data.data)
      } catch (e) {
        setStats({
          totalLeads: 156,
          todayLeads: 12,
          totalProducts: 8,
          totalUsers: 89,
          leadsTrend: [
            { date: '2026-01-27', count: 8 },
            { date: '2026-01-28', count: 15 },
            { date: '2026-01-29', count: 12 },
            { date: '2026-01-30', count: 18 },
            { date: '2026-01-31', count: 22 },
            { date: '2026-02-01', count: 16 },
            { date: '2026-02-02', count: 12 }
          ]
        })
      }
    }
    loadStats()
  }, [])

  const menuItems = [
    { icon: '🏠', label: '仪表盘', href: '/' },
    { icon: '👥', label: '客资管理', href: '/leads' },
    { icon: '📦', label: '产品管理', href: '/products' },
    { icon: '📊', label: '数据统计', href: '/statistics', active: true },
    { icon: '🔗', label: '分销管理', href: '/distribution' },
    { icon: '⚙️', label: '系统设置', href: '/settings' },
  ]

  const summaryCards = stats ? [
    { title: '本周客资', value: stats.totalLeads, trend: '+23%', icon: '📈' },
    { title: '转化率', value: '18.5%', trend: '+5.2%', icon: '🎯' },
    { title: '平均响应时间', value: '2.3h', trend: '-15%', icon: '⏱️' },
    { title: '客户满意度', value: '4.8', trend: '+0.3', icon: '⭐' }
  ] : []

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bgGradient }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: '260px',
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryDark} 100%)`,
        color: 'white',
        flexShrink: 0,
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        position: 'fixed',
        left: 0,
        top: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        zIndex: 50,
        boxShadow: '4px 0 24px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2)'
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '28px 24px', borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)' }}>
          <h1 style={{ fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: 700, margin: 0, letterSpacing: '2px' }}>💰 银掌柜金融</h1>
          <p style={{ fontSize: '13px', opacity: 0.85, margin: '8px 0 0' }}>专业金融服务管理平台</p>
        </div>
        <nav style={{ padding: '16px 12px', flex: 1 }}>
          {menuItems.map((item) => (
            <a key={item.href} href={item.href} style={{
              display: 'flex',
              alignItems: 'center',
              gap: '12px',
              padding: '14px 16px',
              marginBottom: '4px',
              borderRadius: '12px',
              textDecoration: 'none',
              color: item.active ? COLORS.primaryDark : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)',
              background: item.active ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.95)' : 'transparent',
              fontWeight: item.active ? 600 : 400,
              fontSize: '15px',
              boxShadow: item.active ? '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' : 'none'
            }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: '18px' }}>{item.icon}</span>
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </a>
          ))}
        </nav>
      </aside>

          backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
          borderBottom: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,

          display: 'flex',

          top: 0,
          zIndex: 40
        }}>

            <span style={{ color: COLORS.primary }}>📊</span> 数据统计

                  <span style={{

                    color: card.trend.startsWith('+') ? COLORS.success : '#EF4444',
                    borderRadius: '6px',
                    fontSize: '12px',
                    fontWeight: 500

            }}>
              <h3 style={{ margin: '0 0 20px', fontSize: '17px', fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>
                📈 客资趋势
              </h3>
              {/* 简单柱状图 */}
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-end', justifyContent: 'space-between', height: '200px', paddingTop: '20px' }}>
                {(stats?.leadsTrend || []).map((item: any, i: number) => {
                  const maxCount = Math.max(...(stats?.leadsTrend || []).map((t: any) => t.count))
                  const height = (item.count / maxCount) * 160
                  return (
                    <div key={i} style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }}>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.primary }}>{item.count}</span>
                      <div style={{
                        width: '40px',
                        height: `${height}px`,
                        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                        borderRadius: '8px 8px 0 0',
                        boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3)'
                      }} />
                      <span style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                        {item.date.slice(5)}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style={{
              background: COLORS.card,
              borderRadius: '20px',
              padding: '24px',
              border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
              boxShadow: '0 4px 24px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08)'
            }}>

/**
 * 银掌柜金融管理后台 - 系统设置
 */

import { useState } from 'react'

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#D4AF37',
  primaryDark: '#B8860B',
  primaryLight: '#F5D77A',
  accent: '#1A365D',
  bg: '#FFFEF5',
  bgGradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFEF5 0%, #FFF9E6 50%, #FFF5D6 100%)',
  card: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)',
  text: '#1F2937',
  textSecondary: '#6B7280',
  border: '#E5E1D8',
  success: '#10B981'
}

  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/api/main.py
  old_string: @app.post("/api/leads", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def create_lead(req: LeadCreate):
    """
    创建客资（核心获客功能！）
    
    流程：
    1. 保存客资信息
    2. 更新产品咨询量
    3. 如有推荐人，创建分销记录
    """
    try:
        # 查找推荐人
        referrer_id = None
        if req.referralCode:
            referrer = await db.users.find_one({"referralCode": req.referralCode})
            if referrer:
                referrer_id = referrer["_id"]
        
        # 创建客资
        lead_doc = {
            "phone": req.phone,
            "name": req.name,
            "company": req.company,
            "productId": ObjectId(req.productId) if req.productId else None,
            "productName": req.productName,
            "source": req.source,
            "referrerId": referrer_id,
            "referralCode": req.referralCode,
            "openid": req.openid,
            "status": "new",
            "assignedTo": None,
            "followRecords": [],
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
            "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        result = await db.leads.insert_one(lead_doc)
        lead_id = result.inserted_id
        
        # 更新产品咨询量
        if req.productId:
            await db.products.update_one(
                {"_id": ObjectId(req.productId)},
                {"$inc": {"consultCount": 1}}
            )
        
        # 创建分销记录（如有推荐人）
        if referrer_id:
            # 获取推荐人的股东等级
            referrer = await db.users.find_one({"_id": referrer_id})
            level = referrer.get("shareholderLevel", "none")
            
            # 根据等级计算佣金（客资获取奖励：10元/条）
            commission_rate = {
                "none": 0,
                "starter": 10,  # 创业包：10元/条
                "platform": 10,
                "branch": 10
            }.get(level, 0)
            
            if commission_rate > 0:
                referral_record = {
                    "referrerId": referrer_id,
                    "leadId": lead_id,
                    "commission": commission_rate,
                    "commissionRate": commission_rate,
                    "status": "pending",
                    "createdAt": datetime.utcnow()
                }
                await db.referral_records.insert_one(referral_record)
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            message="提交成功",
            data={"_id": str(lead_id)}
        )
  new_string: @app.post("/api/leads", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def create_lead(req: LeadCreate):
    """
    创建客资（核心获客功能！）
    
    流程：
    1. 保存客资信息
    2. 更新产品咨询量
    3. 如有推荐人，创建分销记录
    4. 同步到存客宝（如已配置）
    """
    try:
        # 查找推荐人
        referrer_id = None
        if req.referralCode:
            referrer = await db.users.find_one({"referralCode": req.referralCode})
            if referrer:
                referrer_id = referrer["_id"]
        
        # 创建客资
        lead_doc = {
            "phone": req.phone,
            "name": req.name,
            "company": req.company,
            "productId": ObjectId(req.productId) if req.productId else None,
            "productName": req.productName,
            "source": req.source,
            "referrerId": referrer_id,
            "referralCode": req.referralCode,
            "openid": req.openid,
            "status": "new",
            "assignedTo": None,
            "followRecords": [],
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
            "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        result = await db.leads.insert_one(lead_doc)
        lead_id = result.inserted_id
        
        # 更新产品咨询量
        if req.productId:
            await db.products.update_one(
                {"_id": ObjectId(req.productId)},
                {"$inc": {"consultCount": 1}}
            )
        
        # 创建分销记录（如有推荐人）
        if referrer_id:
            # 获取推荐人的股东等级
            referrer = await db.users.find_one({"_id": referrer_id})
            level = referrer.get("shareholderLevel", "none")
            
            # 根据等级计算佣金（客资获取奖励：10元/条）
            commission_rate = {
                "none": 0,
                "starter": 10,  # 创业包：10元/条
                "platform": 10,
                "branch": 10
            }.get(level, 0)
            
            if commission_rate > 0:
                referral_record = {
                    "referrerId": referrer_id,
                    "leadId": lead_id,
                    "commission": commission_rate,
                    "commissionRate": commission_rate,
                    "status": "pending",
                    "createdAt": datetime.utcnow()
                }
                await db.referral_records.insert_one(referral_record)
        
        # 同步到存客宝（异步，不影响主流程）
        try:
            await sync_to_cunkebao(req.phone, req.name, req.company, req.productName, req.source)
        except Exception as ckb_error:
            print(f"存客宝同步失败（不影响主流程）: {ckb_error}")
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            message="提交成功",
            data={"_id": str(lead_id)}
        )

  new_string: # 微信小程序配置
WX_APPID = os.getenv("WX_APPID", "")
WX_SECRET = os.getenv("WX_SECRET", "")

# 存客宝API配置（客资同步）
CKB_API_URL = "https://ckbapi.quwanzhi.com/v1/api/scenarios"
CKB_API_KEY = os.getenv("CKB_API_KEY", "")  # 从环境变量读取
CKB_ENABLED = os.getenv("CKB_ENABLED", "false").lower() == "true"


import hashlib
import time

async def sync_to_cunkebao(phone: str, name: str = "", company: str = "", product_name: str = "", source: str = ""):
    """
    同步客资到存客宝平台
    
    参考接口文档：https://ckbapi.quwanzhi.com/doc/api_v1.md
    """
    if not CKB_ENABLED or not CKB_API_KEY:
        return  # 未启用或未配置，跳过同步
    
    try:
        timestamp = int(time.time())
        
        # 构建请求参数（去除空值）
        params = {
            "phone": phone,
            "name": name or "",
            "source": source or "银掌柜小程序",
            "remark": f"咨询产品：{product_name}" if product_name else "小程序获客",
            "tags": "金融,贷款",
            "timestamp": timestamp
        }
        
        # 移除空值
        params = {k: v for k, v in params.items() if v is not None and v != ""}
        
        # 签名计算
        # 1. 去掉sign, apiKey, portrait
        sign_params = {k: v for k, v in params.items() if k not in ["sign", "apiKey", "portrait"]}
        
        # 2. 按键名升序排序
        sorted_keys = sorted(sign_params.keys())
        
        # 3. 拼接参数值
        string_to_sign = "".join(str(sign_params[k]) for k in sorted_keys)
        
        # 4. 第一次MD5
        first_md5 = hashlib.md5(string_to_sign.encode()).hexdigest()
        
        # 5. 拼接apiKey再次MD5
        sign = hashlib.md5((first_md5 + CKB_API_KEY).encode()).hexdigest()
        
        # 构建完整请求
        request_data = {
            **params,
            "apiKey": CKB_API_KEY,
            "sign": sign
        }
        
        # 发送请求
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            response = await client.post(
                CKB_API_URL,
                json=request_data,
                timeout=10.0
            )
            result = response.json()
            
            if result.get("code") == 200:
                print(f"✅ 存客宝同步成功: {phone}")
            else:
                print(f"⚠️ 存客宝同步返回: {result}")
                
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ 存客宝同步异常: {e}")

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/app.wxss
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 全局样式
 * 设计风格：橙金渐变 + 卡片式布局（参考招商页面）
 */

page {
  /* 橙金色主题配色 */
  --color-primary: #FF9500;
  --color-primary-dark: #E68600;
  --color-primary-light: #FFB347;
  --color-gold: #D4AF37;
  --color-gold-light: #F5D77A;
  
  /* 背景色 */
  --color-bg: #F5F5F5;
  --color-bg-light: #FFFFFF;
  --color-bg-dark: #1A1A1A;
  
  /* 文字色 */
  --color-text: #333333;
  --color-text-secondary: #666666;

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/index/index.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 首页
 * 简洁获客设计，点击即可获客
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    // 产品列表
    products: [
      {
        id: 'credit',
        icon: '💳',
        name: '信用贷',
        desc: '无抵押，快速放款',
        tags: ['最高50万', '快至24h']
      },
      {
        id: 'house',
        icon: '🏠',
        name: '房抵贷',
        desc: '利率低，额度高',
        tags: ['最高1000万', '利率3.2%起']
      },
      {
        id: 'business',
        icon: '🏢',
        name: '经营贷',
        desc: '企业经营周转',
        tags: ['最高300万', '先息后本']
      },
      {
        id: 'bridge',
        icon: '🌉',
        name: '过桥资金',
        desc: '短期资金周转',
        tags: ['当天放款', '灵活还款']
      },
      {
        id: 'car',
        icon: '🚗',
        name: '车贷',
        desc: '有车即可贷',
        tags: ['不押车', '快速审批']
      }
    ],
    
    // 收益案例
    cases: [
      {
        id: 1,
        avatar: '张',
        name: '张**',
        level: '平台股东',
        income: '¥12,000',
        deals: '8单'
      },
      {
        id: 2,
        avatar: '李',
        name: '李**',
        level: '分公司股东',
        income: '¥38,000',
        deals: '15单'
      },
      {
        id: 3,
        avatar: '王',
        name: '王**',
        level: '创业包股东',
        income: '¥6,500',
        deals: '5单'
      }
    ],
    
    // 弹窗状态
    showModal: false,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: '',
    currentProductId: null
  },
  
  onLoad(options) {
    // 处理分享来源
    if (options.source) {
      app.setSourceCode(options.source);
    }
  },
  
  onShow() {
    // 检查登录状态
    app.checkLogin();
  },
  
  // 点击咨询
  onConsult() {
    this.setData({ showModal: true, currentProductId: null });
  },
  
  // 点击产品
  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}`
    });
  },
  
  // 产品咨询
  onProductConsult(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    this.setData({ showModal: true, currentProductId: id });
  },
  
  // 查看更多
  onViewMore() {
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/product/product'
    });
  },
  
  // 股东入口
  onShareholderTap() {
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/shareholder/shareholder'
    });
  },
  
  // 关闭弹窗
  onCloseModal() {
    this.setData({ showModal: false });
  },
  
  // 微信授权手机号
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      wx.showToast({ title: '授权取消', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    // 获取code用于解密
    wx.login({
      success: (loginRes) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: loginRes.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },
  
  // 表单输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  // 提交表单
  onSubmitForm() {
    const { formName, formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!formName.trim()) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入姓名', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({
      name: formName,
      phone: formPhone
    });
  },
  
  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const submitData = {
        ...data,
        source: 'miniprogram',
        source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
        product_id: this.data.currentProductId || 'general'
      };
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: submitData,
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.setData({ 
          showModal: false,
          formName: '',
          formPhone: ''
        });
        
        wx.showModal({
          title: '提交成功',
          content: '专业顾问将在5分钟内联系您，请保持手机畅通',
          showCancel: false,
          confirmText: '我知道了',
          confirmColor: '#FF9500'
        });
      } else {
        throw new Error(res.data?.detail || '提交失败');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ 
        title: error.message || '网络错误，请重试', 
        icon: 'none' 
      });
    }
  },
  
  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 让金融更简单',
      path: `/pages/index/index?source=${app.globalData.referralCode || ''}`,
      imageUrl: '/assets/images/share.png'
    };
  }
});

[Tool result] Write

assistant:
[Thinking] 现在创建股东页面的JS逻辑。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/shareholder/shareholder.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 股东招募页面
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const LEVEL_NAMES = {
  starter: '创业包股东 (¥6,980)',
  platform: '平台股东 (¥19,800)',
  branch: '分公司股东 (¥98,000)'
};

Page({
  data: {
    showModal: false,
    selectedLevel: null,
    selectedLevelName: '',
    formName: '',
    formPhone: ''
  },
  
  onLoad(options) {
    // 处理分享来源
    if (options.source) {
      app.setSourceCode(options.source);
    }
  },
  
  // 选择套餐
  onSelectPackage(e) {
    const level = e.currentTarget.dataset.level;
    this.setData({
      showModal: true,
      selectedLevel: level,
      selectedLevelName: LEVEL_NAMES[level] || ''
    });
  },
  
  // 点击加入
  onJoin() {
    this.setData({
      showModal: true,
      selectedLevel: 'branch',
      selectedLevelName: LEVEL_NAMES.branch
    });
  },
  
  // 关闭弹窗
  onCloseModal() {
    this.setData({ showModal: false });
  },
  
  // 微信授权手机号
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      wx.showToast({ title: '授权取消', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    wx.login({
      success: (loginRes) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: loginRes.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },
  
  // 表单输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  // 提交表单
  onSubmitForm() {
    const { formName, formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!formName.trim()) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入姓名', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({
      name: formName,
      phone: formPhone
    });
  },
  
  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const submitData = {
        ...data,
        source: 'miniprogram_shareholder',
        source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
        product_id: this.data.selectedLevel || 'shareholder',
        remark: `咨询套餐: ${this.data.selectedLevelName || '股东招募'}`
      };
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: submitData,
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.setData({ 
          showModal: false,
          formName: '',
          formPhone: ''
        });
        
        wx.showModal({
          title: '提交成功',
          content: '专属顾问将在5分钟内联系您，为您详细介绍股东权益',
          showCancel: false,
          confirmText: '我知道了',
          confirmColor: '#FF9500'
        });
      } else {
        throw new Error(res.data?.detail || '提交失败');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ 
        title: error.message || '网络错误，请重试', 
        icon: 'none' 
      });
    }
  },
  
  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '成为银掌柜平台股东，最高享50%分润',
      path: `/pages/shareholder/shareholder?source=${app.globalData.referralCode || ''}`,
      imageUrl: '/assets/images/share-shareholder.png'
    };
  }
});
