[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/product/product.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 产品详情页
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

// 产品数据
const PRODUCTS = {
  credit: {
    id: 'credit',
    icon: '💳',
    name: '信用贷',
    description: '无抵押信用贷款，凭个人信用快速获取资金，最高可贷50万，快至24小时放款。',
    features: ['无需抵押', '额度高达50万', '快至24h放款', '利率低至3.2%'],
    requirements: ['年龄22-55周岁', '有稳定收入来源', '征信良好'],
    consultCount: '2,345'
  },
  house: {
    id: 'house',
    icon: '🏠',
    name: '房抵贷',
    description: '以房产作为抵押获取大额资金，利率低、额度高，最高可贷房产评估价的70%。',
    features: ['额度高达1000万', '利率3.2%起', '期限最长30年', '先息后本'],
    requirements: ['有房产且产权清晰', '房产可正常上市交易', '借款人年龄18-65周岁'],
    consultCount: '1,892'
  },
  business: {
    id: 'business',
    icon: '🏢',
    name: '经营贷',
    description: '为企业主提供经营周转资金，支持各类经营性用途，助力企业发展。',
    features: ['最高300万', '随借随还', '用途灵活', '审批快速'],
    requirements: ['企业成立满1年', '有稳定经营流水', '企业主年龄25-60周岁'],
    consultCount: '1,567'
  },
  bridge: {
    id: 'bridge',
    icon: '🌉',
    name: '过桥资金',
    description: '短期资金周转，当天放款，解决您的紧急资金需求。',
    features: ['当天放款', '灵活还款', '手续简便', '专人服务'],
    requirements: ['有明确还款来源', '提供相应担保'],
    consultCount: '987'
  },
  car: {
    id: 'car',
    icon: '🚗',
    name: '车贷',
    description: '有车即可贷，不押车继续开，快速解决资金需求。',
    features: ['不押车', '额度高', '放款快', '手续简'],
    requirements: ['车辆为本人名下', '车龄不超过10年', '无重大事故记录'],
    consultCount: '1,234'
  }
};

// 默认产品
const DEFAULT_PRODUCT = {
  id: 'general',
  icon: '💰',
  name: '金融咨询',
  description: '专业金融顾问为您提供一对一咨询服务，匹配最适合您的金融产品。',
  features: ['专业顾问', '一对一服务', '方案定制', '全程跟进'],
  requirements: [],
  consultCount: '5,000+'
};

Page({
  data: {
    product: DEFAULT_PRODUCT,
    showModal: false,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: ''
  },
  
  onLoad(options) {
    // 获取产品信息
    const productId = options.id || 'general';
    const product = PRODUCTS[productId] || DEFAULT_PRODUCT;
    
    this.setData({ product });
    
    // 设置页面标题
    wx.setNavigationBarTitle({
      title: product.name
    });
    
    // 处理分享来源
    if (options.source) {
      app.setSourceCode(options.source);
    }
  },
  
  // 点击咨询
  onConsult() {
    this.setData({ showModal: true });
  },
  
  // 关闭弹窗
  onCloseModal() {
    this.setData({ showModal: false });
  },
  
  // 微信授权手机号
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      wx.showToast({ title: '授权取消', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    wx.login({
      success: (loginRes) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: loginRes.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },
  
  // 表单输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },
  
  // 提交表单
  onSubmitForm() {
    const { formName, formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!formName.trim()) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入姓名', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({
      name: formName,
      phone: formPhone
    });
  },
  
  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const { product } = this.data;
      
      const submitData = {
        ...data,
        source: 'miniprogram_product',
        source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
        product_id: product.id,
        remark: `咨询产品: ${product.name}`
      };
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: submitData,
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.setData({ 
          showModal: false,
          formName: '',
          formPhone: ''
        });
        
        wx.showModal({
          title: '提交成功',
          content: '专业顾问将在5分钟内联系您，为您匹配最优方案',
          showCancel: false,
          confirmText: '我知道了',
          confirmColor: '#FF9500'
        });
      } else {
        throw new Error(res.data?.detail || '提交失败');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ 
        title: error.message || '网络错误，请重试', 
        icon: 'none' 
      });
    }
  },
  
  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    const { product } = this.data;
    return {
      title: `${product.name} - 银掌柜金融`,
      path: `/pages/product/product?id=${product.id}&source=${app.globalData.referralCode || ''}`,
      imageUrl: '/assets/images/share.png'
    };
  }
});

assistant:
[Thinking] 继续更新个人中心页面的JS逻辑。
[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/profile/profile.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 个人中心
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    userInfo: {},
    phone: null,
    referralCode: null,
    userLevel: null,
    totalEarnings: '0',
    monthEarnings: '0',
    inviteCount: '0'
  },
  
  onLoad() {
    this.loadUserData();
  },
  
  onShow() {
    this.loadUserData();
  },
  
  // 加载用户数据
  async loadUserData() {
    const globalData = app.globalData;
    
    this.setData({
      userInfo: globalData.userInfo || {},
      phone: globalData.phone,
      referralCode: globalData.referralCode
    });
    
    // 如果已登录，获取用户详细信息
    if (globalData.token) {
      try {
        const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          wx.request({
            url: `${API_BASE}/api/users/me`,
            method: 'GET',
            header: {
              'Authorization': `Bearer ${globalData.token}`
            },
            success: resolve,
            fail: reject
          });
        });
        
        if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data) {
          const userData = res.data;
          this.setData({
            userLevel: userData.level || null,
            totalEarnings: userData.total_earnings?.toFixed(2) || '0',
            monthEarnings: userData.month_earnings?.toFixed(2) || '0',
            inviteCount: userData.invite_count || '0',
            referralCode: userData.referral_code || globalData.referralCode
          });
          
          // 更新全局数据
          app.globalData.referralCode = userData.referral_code;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('获取用户信息失败:', error);
      }
    }
    
    // 如果没有邀请码，生成一个
    if (!this.data.referralCode) {
      this.generateReferralCode();
    }
  },
  
  // 生成邀请码
  generateReferralCode() {
    const code = 'YZG' + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase();
    this.setData({ referralCode: code });
    app.globalData.referralCode = code;
  },
  
  // 复制邀请码
  onCopyCode() {
    const { referralCode } = this.data;
    if (!referralCode) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请先登录', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    wx.setClipboardData({
      data: referralCode,
      success: () => {
        wx.showToast({ title: '复制成功', icon: 'success' });
      }
    });
  },
  
  // 生成海报
  onGeneratePoster() {
    wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
  },
  
  // 菜单点击
  onMenuTap(e) {
    const type = e.currentTarget.dataset.type;
    
    switch (type) {
      case 'orders':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'records':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'team':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'service':
        // 打开客服
        wx.showModal({
          title: '联系客服',
          content: '微信：28533368\n电话：15880802661',
          showCancel: false,
          confirmText: '我知道了'
        });
        break;
      case 'about':
        wx.showModal({
          title: '关于银掌柜',
          content: '银掌柜金融 - 让金融更简单\n\n我们是专业的金融私域运营中台，为金融从业者提供流量获取、系统赋能、分润变现的一站式服务。',
          showCancel: false,
          confirmText: '我知道了'
        });
        break;
    }
  },
  
  // 股东入口
  onShareholderTap() {
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/shareholder/shareholder'
    });
  },
  
  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 邀请你一起赚收益',
      path: `/pages/index/index?source=${this.data.referralCode || ''}`,
      imageUrl: '/assets/images/share.png'
    };
  }
});

                      fontSize: 12, 
                      padding: '2px 8px', 
                      background: '#FFF7ED',
                      color: COLORS.primary,
                      borderRadius: 4
                    }}>
                      {lead.product}
                    </span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 12 }}>{lead.source}</span>
                    <span style={{ color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 12 }}>{lead.time}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{
                  padding: '6px 12px',
                  borderRadius: 6,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  fontWeight: 500,
                  background: lead.status === '已成交' ? '#E6F7E6' : 
                             lead.status === '跟进中' ? '#FFF7ED' : '#F5F5F5',
                  color: lead.status === '已成交' ? COLORS.success : 
                         lead.status === '跟进中' ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.textSecondary
                }}>
                  {lead.status}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

## ✅ 银掌柜小程序深度优化完成

### 一、商业模式理解

根据银掌柜的商业资料，我已深度理解并整合：

| 股东级别 | 价格 | 渠道分润 | 平台分润 | AI手机 | 核心权益 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **创业包股东** | 6,980元 | 20% | 30% | 1台 | 可补差价升级 |
| **平台股东** | 19,800元 | 20% | 40% | 3台 | 资金业务利润分配 |
| **分公司股东** | 98,000元 | 20% | 50% | 10台 | 全业务线分润权益 |

**升级机制**：创业包 → 3人裂变/补差价 → 平台股东 → 补差价 → 分公司股东 → 投资 → 资金股东

### 二、设计风格（参考招商页面）

- **主色**：橙色渐变 `#FF9500` → `#FFB347`
- **辅色**：金色 `#D4AF37`
- **布局**：卡片式、简洁直接
- **获客**：点击即可获客，一键授权

### 三、小程序优化

1. **首页**（`pages/index`）
   - 顶部橙色渐变背景
   - 核心获客入口卡片（立即咨询按钮）
   - 热门产品横向滚动
   - 股东招募入口（深色卡片）
   - 收益案例展示

2. **产品详情页**（`pages/product`）
   - 产品信息卡片
   - 产品亮点、申请条件
   - 简化咨询流程
   - 底部固定获客按钮

3. **股东招募页**（`pages/shareholder`）- **新增**
   - 三档套餐对比展示（6,980/19,800/98,000）
   - 升级机制流程图
   - 交付产品展示
   - 业务覆盖范围
   - 收益测算案例
   - 底部CTA区域

4. **个人中心**（`pages/profile`）
   - 收益概览
   - 邀请好友卡片
   - 功能菜单
   - 股东入口

### 四、管理后台优化

- 橙金渐变侧边栏
- 数据看板（今日客资、咨询、收入）
- 最近客资列表
- 统一的橙金色主题

### 五、获客流程简化

```
用户点击"立即咨询" → 弹出授权窗口 → 微信一键授权/手动填写 → 提交到API → 同步到存客宝
```

---

### 测试方式

**小程序**：在微信开发者工具中点击「编译」预览

**管理后台**：访问 http://localhost:3100

---

├─ 费用：约 ¥0.85
└─ 状态：深度优化完成（橙金主题 + 套餐体系 + 简洁获客）

assistant:
[Thinking] 我已经理解了"一场soul的创业实验"的分销绑定机制：

1. **30天绑定机制**：用户通过分享链接进入，绑定到推荐人30天
2. **绑定状态**：active（活跃绑定）、converted（已转化）、expired（已过期）
3. **收益分润**：90%归分发者4. **推荐码**：用户有自己的邀请码，分享带参数
5. **数据展示**：
   - 绑定用户数   - 通过链接进的人数   - 带来的付款人数
   - 已结算/待结算/已提现收益

现在我需要：
1. 更新管理后台所有页面统一风格
2. 添加存客宝 App ID/Secret 配置

assistant:
[Thinking] 现在我已经完全理解了30天绑定分销机制的核心逻辑：

1. **绑定有效期30天**：用户通过推荐链接进入后，绑定到推荐人30天
2. **抢夺机制**：如果绑定已过期，新的推荐人可以"抢夺"这个用户
3. **续期机制**：同一推荐人可以通过用户再次点击链接来续期
4. **一级分销**：只有一级，没有多级
5. **90%分润**：给分发者90%的收益

import { useState } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 客资管理
 * 统一橙金渐变风格
 */

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryDark: '#E68600',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  gold: '#D4AF37',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  bgDark: '#1A1A1A',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  textLight: '#999999',
  border: '#E5E5E5',
  success: '#52C41A',
  warning: '#FAAD14',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

// 模拟客资数据

  { id: 1, name: '张三', phone: '13812345678', product: '信用贷', source: '小程序', sourceUser: '李股东', time: '2026-02-02 10:30', status: 'pending', amount: '', remark: '首次咨询' },
  { id: 2, name: '李四', phone: '13987654321', product: '房抵贷', source: '分享', sourceUser: '王股东', time: '2026-02-02 09:15', status: 'following', amount: '300万', remark: '有房产抵押需求' },
  { id: 3, name: '王五', phone: '13765432109', product: '经营贷', source: '小程序', sourceUser: '', time: '2026-02-01 16:45', status: 'deal', amount: '50万', remark: '已放款' },
  { id: 4, name: '赵六', phone: '13654321098', product: '过桥资金', source: '股东推荐', sourceUser: '张股东', time: '2026-02-01 14:20', status: 'pending', amount: '200万', remark: '急用' },
  { id: 5, name: '钱七', phone: '13543210987', product: '车贷', source: '小程序', sourceUser: '', time: '2026-02-01 11:00', status: 'invalid', amount: '', remark: '无购车意向' },
];

const statusMap: Record<string, { label: string; color: string; bg: string }> = {
  pending: { label: '待跟进', color: COLORS.textSecondary, bg: '#F5F5F5' },
  following: { label: '跟进中', color: COLORS.primary, bg: '#FFF7ED' },
  deal: { label: '已成交', color: COLORS.success, bg: '#E6F7E6' },
  invalid: { label: '无效', color: COLORS.danger, bg: '#FFF2F0' }
};

export default function LeadsPage() {
  const [leads] = useState(mockLeads);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');

  const filteredLeads = leads.filter(lead => {
    const matchSearch = lead.name.includes(search) || lead.phone.includes(search);
    const matchStatus = statusFilter === 'all' || lead.status === statusFilter;
    return matchSearch && matchStatus;
  });

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bg, display: 'flex' }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: 240,

        position: 'fixed',
        height: '100vh',
        left: 0,
        top: 0
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '0 24px', marginBottom: 32 }}>
          <h1 style={{ color: COLORS.primary, fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, margin: 0 }}>银掌柜</h1>
          <p style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 12, marginTop: 4 }}>金融私域运营中台</p>
        </div>
        
        <nav>
          {[
            { name: '数据看板', icon: '📊', href: '/', active: false },
            { name: '客资管理', icon: '👥', href: '/leads', active: true },
            { name: '产品管理', icon: '📦', href: '/products', active: false },
            { name: '股东管理', icon: '🏆', href: '/distribution', active: false },
            { name: '数据统计', icon: '📈', href: '/statistics', active: false },
            { name: '系统设置', icon: '⚙️', href: '/settings', active: false },
          ].map((item) => (
            <Link key={item.name} href={item.href} style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
              <div style={{
                display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12, padding: '14px 24px',
                color: item.active ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
                background: item.active ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, transparent 100%)` : 'transparent',
                borderLeft: item.active ? `3px solid ${COLORS.primary}` : '3px solid transparent',
              }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icon}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.name}</span>
              </div>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>
      </aside>
      
      {/* 主内容区 */}
      <main style={{ flex: 1, marginLeft: 240, padding: 32 }}>
        {/* 页面标题 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 32 }}>
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>客资管理</h2>
            <p style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontSize: 14, marginTop: 4 }}>管理所有咨询客户，跟进转化状态</p>
          </div>
          <button style={{
            display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, padding: '12px 24px',
            background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
            color: '#FFFFFF', border: 'none', borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, cursor: 'pointer',
            boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.3)'
          }}>
            ➕ 新增客资
          </button>
        </div>
        
        {/* 筛选栏 */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex', gap: 16, marginBottom: 24, padding: 20, background: '#FFFFFF',
          borderRadius: 12, boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
        }}>
          <input
            placeholder="搜索姓名/手机号"
            value={search}
            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            style={{
              flex: 1, maxWidth: 300, padding: '10px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, outline: 'none'
            }}
          />
          <select
            value={statusFilter}
            onChange={(e) => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)}
            style={{
              padding: '10px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8,
              fontSize: 14, outline: 'none', cursor: 'pointer', minWidth: 120
            }}
          >
            <option value="all">全部状态</option>
            <option value="pending">待跟进</option>
            <option value="following">跟进中</option>
            <option value="deal">已成交</option>
            <option value="invalid">无效</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        
        {/* 数据统计 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)', gap: 16, marginBottom: 24 }}>
          {[
            { label: '总客资', value: leads.length, color: COLORS.text },
            { label: '待跟进', value: leads.filter(l => l.status === 'pending').length, color: COLORS.textSecondary },
            { label: '跟进中', value: leads.filter(l => l.status === 'following').length, color: COLORS.primary },
            { label: '已成交', value: leads.filter(l => l.status === 'deal').length, color: COLORS.success },
          ].map((stat, i) => (
            <div key={i} style={{ padding: 20, background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 32, fontWeight: 700, color: stat.color }}>{stat.value}</div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 4 }}>{stat.label}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {/* 客资列表 */}
        <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
          <table style={{ width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' }}>
            <thead>
              <tr style={{ background: '#FAFAFA' }}>
                {['客户信息', '意向产品', '来源', '推荐人', '金额', '状态', '时间', '操作'].map((h, i) => (
                  <th key={i} style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                    {h}
                  </th>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {filteredLeads.map((lead) => {
                const status = statusMap[lead.status];
                return (
                  <tr key={lead.id} style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                      <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12 }}>
                        <div style={{
                          width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: '50%',
                          background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                          display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
                          color: '#FFFFFF', fontWeight: 600
                        }}>
                          {lead.name.charAt(0)}
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <div style={{ fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{lead.name}</div>
                          <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textLight }}>{lead.phone}</div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                      <span style={{ padding: '4px 12px', background: '#FFF7ED', color: COLORS.primary, borderRadius: 4, fontSize: 13 }}>
                        {lead.product}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontSize: 14 }}>{lead.source}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontSize: 14 }}>{lead.sourceUser || '-'}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.text, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 500 }}>{lead.amount || '-'}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                      <span style={{ padding: '6px 12px', background: status.bg, color: status.color, borderRadius: 6, fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 500 }}>
                        {status.label}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 13 }}>{lead.time}</td>
                    <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8 }}>
                        <button style={{ padding: '6px 12px', background: '#FFF7ED', color: COLORS.primary, border: 'none', borderRadius: 4, fontSize: 13, cursor: 'pointer' }}>
                          编辑
                        </button>

                          详情
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

                <button style={{

                  border: 'none', borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 500, cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  编辑
                </button>
                <button style={{
                  flex: 1, padding: '10px 0', background: '#F5F5F5', color: COLORS.textSecondary,
                  border: 'none', borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 500, cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  下架
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

            onClick={() => setActiveTab('shareholders')}

            🏆 分润排行榜
          </button>

                {stat.icon}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text }}>{stat.value}</div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{stat.label}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {activeTab === 'shareholders' ? (
          /* 股东列表 */
          <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, overflow: 'hidden' }}>

                <tr style={{ background: '#FAFAFA' }}>
                  {['股东信息', '级别', '加入时间', '累计收益', '成交单数', '绑定用户', '操作'].map((h, i) => (
                    <th key={i} style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>
                      {h}
                    </th>
                  ))}
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {shareholders.map((s) => {
                  const level = levelConfig[s.level];
                  return (
                    <tr key={s.id} style={{ borderBottom: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12 }}>

                          }}>

                          </div>

                            <div style={{ fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{s.name}</div>
                            <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textLight }}>{s.phone}</div>

                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                        <span style={{ padding: '4px 12px', background: level.bg, color: level.color, borderRadius: 4, fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 500 }}>
                          {s.level}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontSize: 14 }}>{s.joinDate}</td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.primary, fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600 }}>¥{s.earnings.toLocaleString()}</td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.text, fontSize: 14 }}>{s.deals}单</td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', color: COLORS.text, fontSize: 14 }}>{s.bindings}人</td>
                      <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                        <button style={{ padding: '6px 12px', background: '#FFF7ED', color: COLORS.primary, border: 'none', borderRadius: 4, fontSize: 13, cursor: 'pointer' }}>
                          查看详情
                        </button>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                })}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        ) : (
          /* 分润排行榜 */
          <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 24 }}>
              <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>🏆 本月分润排行榜</h3>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textLight }}>30天绑定机制 · 实时更新</span>
            </div>
            
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
              {rankingData.map((item, index) => (
                <div key={item.rank} style={{
                  display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', padding: 20,
                  background: index < 3 ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${index === 0 ? '#FFFBF0' : index === 1 ? '#F9F9F9' : '#FFF7ED'} 0%, #FFFFFF 100%)` : '#FAFAFA',
                  borderRadius: 12, border: index < 3 ? `1px solid ${index === 0 ? COLORS.gold : index === 1 ? '#E5E5E5' : COLORS.primaryLight}` : 'none'
                }}>
                  {/* 排名 */}
                  <div style={{
                    width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: '50%',
                    background: index === 0 ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.gold} 0%, ${COLORS.goldLight} 100%)` :
                               index === 1 ? 'linear-gradient(135deg, #C0C0C0 0%, #E5E5E5 100%)' :
                               index === 2 ? 'linear-gradient(135deg, #CD7F32 0%, #DDA15E 100%)' : '#F5F5F5',
                    display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
                    color: index < 3 ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 16, marginRight: 16
                  }}>
                    {item.rank}
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* 头像和信息 */}
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12, flex: 1 }}>
                    <div style={{
                      width: 48, height: 48, borderRadius: '50%',
                      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                      display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
                      color: '#FFFFFF', fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 18
                    }}>
                      {item.avatar}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <div style={{ fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, fontSize: 16 }}>{item.name}</div>
                      <span style={{
                        padding: '2px 8px', background: levelConfig[item.level].bg,
                        color: levelConfig[item.level].color, borderRadius: 4, fontSize: 12
                      }}>
                        {item.level}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* 数据 */}
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 32, alignItems: 'center' }}>
                    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>¥{item.monthEarnings.toLocaleString()}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>本月收益</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{item.monthDeals}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>成交单数</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{item.bindings}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>绑定用户</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{
                      padding: '4px 8px', borderRadius: 4,
                      background: item.trend === 'up' ? '#E6F7E6' : item.trend === 'down' ? '#FFF2F0' : '#F5F5F5',
                      color: item.trend === 'up' ? COLORS.success : item.trend === 'down' ? '#FF4D4F' : COLORS.textSecondary,
                      fontSize: 13
                    }}>
                      {item.trend === 'up' ? '↑' : item.trend === 'down' ? '↓' : '-'}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

        </div>
        
        {/* 趋势图表 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 1fr', gap: 24, marginBottom: 32 }}>
          {/* 客资趋势 */}
          <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0, marginBottom: 24 }}>📈 客资趋势</h3>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-end', justifyContent: 'space-between', height: 200 }}>
              {trendData.map((day, i) => (
                <div key={i} style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', flex: 1 }}>
                  <div style={{
                    width: 32, borderRadius: 4,
                    height: `${(day.leads / 50) * 150}px`,
                    background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                    marginBottom: 8
                  }} />
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>{day.date}</span>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{day.leads}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* 来源分布 */}
          <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0, marginBottom: 24 }}>📊 来源分布</h3>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
              {sourceStats.map((source, i) => (
                <div key={i}>
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 6 }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.text }}>{source.name}</span>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.primary }}>{source.percentage}%</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ height: 8, background: '#F5F5F5', borderRadius: 4, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
                    <div style={{
                      width: `${source.percentage}%`, height: '100%',
                      background: `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                      borderRadius: 4
                    }} />
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {/* 产品分析 */}
        <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
          <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0, marginBottom: 24 }}>📦 产品分析</h3>
          <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)', gap: 20 }}>
            {productStats.map((product, i) => (
              <div key={i} style={{
                padding: 20, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12,
                borderLeft: `4px solid ${COLORS.primary}`
              }}>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 12 }}>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{product.name}</span>
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.primary, fontWeight: 600 }}>{product.percentage}%</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 24 }}>
                  <div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text }}>{product.leads}</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>咨询数</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.success }}>{product.deals}</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>成交数</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

            </div>
          </div>
          
          <button
            onClick={() => handleSave('分润')}
            disabled={saving}
            style={{
              padding: '12px 32px',
              background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.gold} 0%, #F5D77A 100%)`,
              color: '#FFFFFF', border: 'none', borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600,
              cursor: saving ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer', opacity: saving ? 0.7 : 1
            }}
          >
            {saving ? '保存中...' : '保存配置'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

          bindtap="switchCategory" data-category="bridge">过桥资金</view>
  </scroll-view>
  
  <!-- 产品列表 -->
  <view class="product-list">
    <view class="product-card" wx:for="{{filteredProducts}}" wx:key="id" bindtap="onProductTap" data-id="{{item.id}}">
      <!-- 热门标签 -->
      <view class="hot-badge" wx:if="{{item.hot}}">🔥 热门</view>
      
      <view class="product-header">
        <view class="product-icon">{{item.icon}}</view>
        <view class="product-info">
          <text class="product-name">{{item.name}}</text>
          <text class="product-category">{{item.categoryName}}</text>
        </view>
      </view>
      
      <text class="product-desc">{{item.desc}}</text>
      
      <!-- 产品亮点 -->
      <view class="product-highlights">
        <view class="highlight-item" wx:for="{{item.highlights}}" wx:key="*this" wx:for-item="h">
          <text class="highlight-icon">✓</text>
          <text class="highlight-text">{{h}}</text>
        </view>
      </view>
      
      <!-- 额度和利率 -->
      <view class="product-stats">
        <view class="stat-item">
          <text class="stat-label">额度</text>
          <text class="stat-value">{{item.amount}}</text>
        </view>
        <view class="stat-divider"></view>
        <view class="stat-item">
          <text class="stat-label">利率</text>
          <text class="stat-value highlight">{{item.rate}}</text>
        </view>
        <view class="stat-divider"></view>
        <view class="stat-item">
          <text class="stat-label">咨询量</text>
          <text class="stat-value">{{item.consultCount}}</text>
        </view>
      </view>
      
      <!-- 咨询按钮 -->
      <button class="consult-btn" catchtap="onConsult" data-product="{{item}}">立即咨询</button>
    </view>
  </view>
</view>

<!-- 简化版获客弹窗 -->
<view class="modal-mask" wx:if="{{showModal}}" bindtap="closeModal">
  <view class="modal-content" catchtap>
    <view class="modal-close" bindtap="closeModal">×</view>
    
    <view class="modal-product" wx:if="{{currentProduct}}">
      <text class="modal-product-icon">{{currentProduct.icon}}</text>
      <text class="modal-product-name">{{currentProduct.name}}</text>
    </view>
    
    <text class="modal-title">获取专属方案</text>
    
    <!-- 微信一键授权 -->
    <button class="wx-btn" open-type="getPhoneNumber" bindgetphonenumber="onGetPhoneNumber">
      📱 微信一键获取
    </button>
    
    <view class="or-line">
      <text class="or-text">或</text>
    </view>
    
    <!-- 手动输入 -->
    <view class="form">
      <input class="form-input" placeholder="姓名" value="{{formName}}" bindinput="onNameInput" />
      <input class="form-input" type="number" placeholder="手机号" maxlength="11" value="{{formPhone}}" bindinput="onPhoneInput" />
      <button class="submit-btn" bindtap="onSubmit">提交</button>
    </view>
  </view>
</view>

  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/products/products.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 热门产品
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

// 产品数据
const PRODUCTS = [
  {

    name: '过桥资金',
    icon: '🌉',

    categoryName: '过桥资金',
    desc: '短期资金周转，当天放款，解决燃眉之急',
    highlights: ['当天放款', '灵活周期', '专人服务'],
    amount: '50-1000万',
    rate: '千1/天',
    consultCount: '987',
    hot: true
  },
  {
    id: 'credit-fund',
    name: '公积金贷',
    icon: '🏦',
    category: 'credit',
    categoryName: '信用贷',
    desc: '有公积金即可贷，额度高利率低',
    highlights: ['额度高', '纯信用', '快审批'],
    amount: '10-100万',
    rate: '3.5%起',
    consultCount: '1,234',
    hot: false
  },
  {
    id: 'mortgage-car',
    name: '车抵贷',
    icon: '🚗',
    category: 'mortgage',
    categoryName: '抵押贷',
    desc: '有车即可贷，不押车继续开',
    highlights: ['不押车', '当天放', '手续简'],
    amount: '5-50万',
    rate: '4.5%起',

    consultCount: '876',
    hot: false
  },
  {
    id: 'credit-social',
    name: '社保贷',
    icon: '👥',
    category: 'credit',
    categoryName: '信用贷',
    desc: '有社保即可贷，门槛低放款快',
    highlights: ['门槛低', '放款快', '免担保'],
    amount: '3-30万',
    rate: '4.2%起',
    consultCount: '2,123',
    hot: false
  }
];

Page({
  data: {
    activeCategory: 'all',
    products: PRODUCTS,
    filteredProducts: PRODUCTS,
    showModal: false,
    currentProduct: null,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: ''
  },

  onLoad() {},

  onShow() {
    // 设置TabBar选中状态
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 1 });
    }
  },

  // 切换分类
  switchCategory(e) {
    const category = e.currentTarget.dataset.category;
    let filtered = PRODUCTS;
    
    if (category !== 'all') {
      filtered = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.category === category);
    }
    
    this.setData({
      activeCategory: category,
      filteredProducts: filtered
    });
  },

  // 点击产品
  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}`
    });
  },

  // 点击咨询
  onConsult(e) {
    const product = e.currentTarget.dataset.product;
    this.setData({
      showModal: true,
      currentProduct: product
    });
  },

  // 关闭弹窗
  closeModal() {
    this.setData({
      showModal: false,
      formName: '',
      formPhone: ''
    });
  },

  // 微信授权
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      return;
    }
    
    wx.login({
      success: (res) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: res.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },

  // 输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },

  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },

  // 提交
  onSubmit() {
    const { formName, formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!formName.trim()) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入姓名', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({ name: formName, phone: formPhone });
  },

  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const { currentProduct } = this.data;
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            ...data,
            source: 'miniprogram_products',
            source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
            product_id: currentProduct?.id || 'general',
            remark: currentProduct ? `咨询产品: ${currentProduct.name}` : ''
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.closeModal();
        wx.showToast({ title: '提交成功', icon: 'success' });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 热门金融产品',
      path: `/pages/products/products?source=${app.globalData.referralCode || ''}`
    };
  }
});

  "navigationBarTitleText": "热门产品"
}

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/profile/profile.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 我的
 * 整合股东入口和推广收益，实现30天绑定机制
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    isLoggedIn: false,
    userInfo: {},
    userLevel: null,
    
    // 推广数据
    totalEarnings: '0',
    pendingEarnings: '0',
    bindingCount: 0,
    referralCode: null
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.initData();
  },

  onShow() {
    // 设置TabBar选中状态
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 2 });
    }
    
    this.initData();
  },

  // 初始化数据
  async initData() {
    const { isLoggedIn, userInfo } = app.globalData;
    
    if (isLoggedIn && userInfo) {
      // 生成邀请码
      const referralCode = userInfo.referralCode || 'YZG' + (userInfo.id || Date.now().toString(36)).toUpperCase().slice(-6);
      
      this.setData({
        isLoggedIn: true,
        userInfo,
        referralCode
      });
      
      // 获取推广数据
      await this.loadReferralData();
    } else {
      // 尝试自动登录
      await this.autoLogin();
    }
  },

  // 自动登录
  async autoLogin() {
    try {
      const result = await app.login();
      if (result) {
        this.initData();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Profile] 自动登录失败');
    }
  },

  // 加载推广数据
  async loadReferralData() {
    try {
      const userId = app.globalData.userInfo?.id;
      if (!userId) return;
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/referral/data?userId=${userId}`,
          method: 'GET',
          header: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${wx.getStorageSync('token')}`
          },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data?.success) {
        const data = res.data.data;
        this.setData({
          totalEarnings: (data.earnings || 0).toFixed(2),
          pendingEarnings: (data.pendingEarnings || 0).toFixed(2),
          bindingCount: data.bindingCount || 0,
          userLevel: data.level || null
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Profile] 获取推广数据失败:', e);
    }
  },

  // 登录
  onLogin() {
    wx.login({
      success: async (res) => {
        const result = await app.login();
        if (result) {
          this.initData();
        }
      }
    });
  },

  // 复制邀请码
  copyCode() {
    const { referralCode } = this.data;
    if (!referralCode) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请先登录', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    wx.setClipboardData({
      data: referralCode,
      success: () => {
        wx.showToast({ title: '复制成功', icon: 'success' });
      }
    });
  },

  // 跳转股东页面
  goToShareholder() {
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/shareholder/shareholder'
    });
  },

  // 跳转页面
  goToPage(e) {
    const page = e.currentTarget.dataset.page;
    
    switch (page) {
      case 'orders':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'bindings':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'earnings':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'service':
        wx.showModal({
          title: '联系客服',
          content: '微信：28533368\n电话：15880802661',
          showCancel: false
        });
        break;
      case 'about':
        wx.showModal({
          title: '关于银掌柜',
          content: '银掌柜金融 - 让金融更简单\n\n专业的金融私域运营中台，为金融从业者提供流量获取、系统赋能、分润变现的一站式服务。',
          showCancel: false
        });
        break;
    }
  },

  // 分享（30天绑定机制核心）
  onShareAppMessage() {
    const { referralCode } = this.data;
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 邀请你一起赚收益',
      path: `/pages/index/index?ref=${referralCode || ''}`,
      imageUrl: '/assets/images/share.png'
    };
  },

  // 分享到朋友圈
  onShareTimeline() {
    const { referralCode } = this.data;
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 让金融更简单',
      query: `ref=${referralCode || ''}`
    };
  }
});

 * 银掌柜金融 - 首页
 * 简洁轻松设计 + 30天绑定机制

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    // 热门产品
    hotProducts: [
      { id: 'credit', name: '信用贷', icon: '💳', rate: '3.2%起', amount: '5-50万' },
      { id: 'house', name: '房抵贷', icon: '🏠', rate: '3.2%起', amount: '50-1000万' },
      { id: 'business', name: '经营贷', icon: '🏢', rate: '3.6%起', amount: '30-300万' },
      { id: 'bridge', name: '过桥', icon: '🌉', rate: '千1/天', amount: '50-1000万' }
    ],
    
    // 收益案例
    cases: [
      { avatar: '张', name: '张**', desc: '推荐房抵贷成交', amount: '3,600', time: '刚刚' },
      { avatar: '李', name: '李**', desc: '推荐信用贷成交', amount: '1,200', time: '5分钟前' },
      { avatar: '王', name: '王**', desc: '新用户注册奖励', amount: '50', time: '10分钟前' }
    ],
    
    // 弹窗
    showModal: false,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: ''
  },

  onLoad(options) {
    // 处理分享参数 - 30天绑定机制核心
    this.handleReferralCode(options);
  },

  onShow() {
    // 设置TabBar
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 0 });
    }
  },

  /**
   * 处理推荐码绑定 - 30天绑定机制
   * 用户通过分享链接进入，自动绑定到推荐人30天
   */
  handleReferralCode(options) {
    const refCode = options.ref || options.referralCode || options.source;
    
    if (refCode) {
      console.log('[Index] 检测到推荐码:', refCode);
      
      // 保存推荐码到全局
      app.globalData.sourceCode = refCode;
      wx.setStorageSync('sourceCode', refCode);
      
      // 检查是否已绑定（30天内）
      const boundInfo = wx.getStorageSync('boundReferralInfo');
      if (boundInfo) {
        const boundTime = new Date(boundInfo.boundAt);
        const now = new Date();
        const daysDiff = (now - boundTime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
        
        if (daysDiff < 30 && boundInfo.code !== refCode) {
          console.log('[Index] 已绑定其他推荐人，30天内不更换');
          return;
        }
      }
      
      // 记录访问并绑定
      this.bindReferralCode(refCode);
    }
  },

  // 绑定推荐码
  async bindReferralCode(refCode) {
    try {
      // 获取openId
      const openId = app.globalData.openId || wx.getStorageSync('openId');
      const userId = app.globalData.userInfo?.id;
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/referral/bind`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            referralCode: refCode,
            userId: userId,
            openId: openId,
            source: 'miniprogram'
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data?.success) {
        console.log('[Index] 绑定成功');
        
        // 保存绑定信息（30天有效期）
        wx.setStorageSync('boundReferralInfo', {
          code: refCode,
          boundAt: new Date().toISOString()
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Index] 绑定推荐码失败:', e);
    }
  },

  // 快速咨询
  onQuickConsult() {
    this.setData({ showModal: true });
  },

  // 关闭弹窗
  closeModal() {
    this.setData({
      showModal: false,
      formName: '',
      formPhone: ''
    });
  },

  // 微信一键获取
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      return;
    }
    
    wx.login({
      success: (res) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: res.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },

  // 输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },

  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },

  // 手动提交
  onSubmit() {
    const { formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({ name: this.data.formName, phone: formPhone });
  },

  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            ...data,
            source: 'miniprogram_index',
            source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || wx.getStorageSync('sourceCode') || '',
            remark: '首页快速咨询'
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.closeModal();
        wx.showToast({ title: '提交成功', icon: 'success' });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 点击产品
  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}`
    });
  },

  // 跳转热门产品
  goToProducts() {

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/app.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 小程序入口
 * 30天绑定分销机制
 */

App({
  globalData: {
    // API基础地址
    baseUrl: 'http://localhost:8100',
    
    // 用户信息
    userInfo: null,
    openId: null,
    isLoggedIn: false,
    
    // 推荐绑定（30天机制）
    sourceCode: null,        // 当前来源推荐码
    referralCode: null,      // 用户自己的推荐码
    boundReferrer: null,     // 已绑定的推荐人
    
    // 配置
    bindingDays: 30,         // 绑定有效期
    
    // 主题
    theme: {
      primary: '#FF9500',
      primaryLight: '#FFB347',
      gold: '#D4AF37',
      bgDark: '#1A1A1A'
    }
  },

  onLaunch(options) {
    // 获取系统信息
    this.getSystemInfo();
    
    // 检查登录状态
    this.checkLoginStatus();
    
    // 处理分享参数（推荐码绑定）
    this.handleReferralCode(options);
  },
  
  onShow(options) {
    // 每次显示时也检查分享参数
    this.handleReferralCode(options);
  },
  
  /**
   * 处理推荐码 - 30天绑定机制核心
   * 规则：
   * 1. 链接带ID：谁发的链接，进的人就绑谁
   * 2. 一级、一月：只有一级分销；绑定有效期30天
   * 3. 长期不发：别人发得多，客户会被「抢走」
   * 4. 每天发：持续发的人绑定一直有效
   */
  handleReferralCode(options) {
    const query = options?.query || {};
    const refCode = query.ref || query.referralCode || query.source;
    
    if (refCode) {
      console.log('[App] 检测到推荐码:', refCode);
      
      // 保存来源推荐码
      this.globalData.sourceCode = refCode;
      wx.setStorageSync('sourceCode', refCode);
      
      // 记录访问
      this.recordReferralVisit(refCode);
      
      // 检查现有绑定
      const boundInfo = wx.getStorageSync('boundReferralInfo');
      if (boundInfo) {
        const boundTime = new Date(boundInfo.boundAt);
        const now = new Date();
        const daysDiff = (now - boundTime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
        
        // 30天内已绑定其他推荐人，不更换
        if (daysDiff < 30 && boundInfo.code !== refCode) {
          console.log('[App] 已绑定其他推荐人，绑定有效期内不更换');
          return;
        }
        
        // 超过30天或同一推荐人，可以续期/更换
        console.log('[App] 绑定已过期或同一推荐人，可以更新');
      }
      
      // 如果已登录，立即绑定
      if (this.globalData.isLoggedIn && this.globalData.userInfo) {
        this.bindReferralCode(refCode);
      }
    }
  },
  
  // 记录推荐访问
  async recordReferralVisit(refCode) {
    try {
      const openId = this.globalData.openId || wx.getStorageSync('openId') || '';
      
      await this.request('/api/referral/visit', {
        method: 'POST',
        data: {
          referralCode: refCode,
          visitorOpenId: openId,
          source: 'miniprogram'
        }
      });
      console.log('[App] 记录推荐访问成功');
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[App] 记录推荐访问失败:', e);
    }
  },
  
  // 绑定推荐码
  async bindReferralCode(refCode) {
    try {
      const userId = this.globalData.userInfo?.id;
      const openId = this.globalData.openId;
      
      if (!refCode) return;
      
      const res = await this.request('/api/referral/bind', {
        method: 'POST',
        data: {
          referralCode: refCode,
          userId: userId,
          openId: openId,
          source: 'miniprogram'
        }
      });
      
      if (res.success) {
        console.log('[App] 推荐码绑定成功');
        
        // 保存绑定信息
        wx.setStorageSync('boundReferralInfo', {
          code: refCode,
          boundAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          referrer: res.referrer
        });
        
        this.globalData.boundReferrer = res.referrer;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[App] 绑定推荐码失败:', e);
    }
  },

  // 获取系统信息
  getSystemInfo() {
    try {
      const systemInfo = wx.getSystemInfoSync();
      this.globalData.systemInfo = systemInfo;
      this.globalData.statusBarHeight = systemInfo.statusBarHeight || 44;
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取系统信息失败:', e);
    }
  },

  // 检查登录状态
  checkLoginStatus() {
    try {
      const userInfo = wx.getStorageSync('userInfo');
      const token = wx.getStorageSync('token');
      const openId = wx.getStorageSync('openId');
      
      if (userInfo && token) {
        this.globalData.userInfo = userInfo;
        this.globalData.isLoggedIn = true;
        this.globalData.referralCode = userInfo.referralCode;
      }
      
      if (openId) {
        this.globalData.openId = openId;
      }
      
      // 恢复绑定信息
      const boundInfo = wx.getStorageSync('boundReferralInfo');
      if (boundInfo) {
        this.globalData.sourceCode = boundInfo.code;
        this.globalData.boundReferrer = boundInfo.referrer;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('检查登录状态失败:', e);
    }
  },

  // 登录
  async login() {
    try {
      const loginRes = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.login({
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      const res = await this.request('/api/miniprogram/login', {
        method: 'POST',
        data: { code: loginRes.code }
      });
      
      if (res.success && res.data) {
        // 保存openId
        if (res.data.openId) {
          this.globalData.openId = res.data.openId;
          wx.setStorageSync('openId', res.data.openId);
        }
        
        // 保存用户信息
        if (res.data.user) {
          this.globalData.userInfo = res.data.user;
          this.globalData.isLoggedIn = true;
          this.globalData.referralCode = res.data.user.referralCode;
          
          wx.setStorageSync('userInfo', res.data.user);
          wx.setStorageSync('token', res.data.token || '');
          
          // 登录成功后绑定推荐码
          const pendingCode = this.globalData.sourceCode || wx.getStorageSync('sourceCode');
          if (pendingCode) {
            this.bindReferralCode(pendingCode);
          }
        }
        
        return res.data;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[App] 登录失败:', e);
      wx.showToast({ title: '登录失败，请重试', icon: 'none' });
    }
    
    return null;
  },

  // 统一请求方法
  request(url, options = {}) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const token = wx.getStorageSync('token');
      
      wx.request({
        url: this.globalData.baseUrl + url,
        method: options.method || 'GET',
        data: options.data || {},
        header: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Authorization': token ? `Bearer ${token}` : '',
          ...options.header
        },
        success: (res) => {
          if (res.statusCode === 200) {
            resolve(res.data);
          } else if (res.statusCode === 401) {
            this.logout();
            reject(new Error('未授权'));
          } else {
            reject(new Error(res.data?.message || '请求失败'));
          }
        },
        fail: (err) => {
          reject(err);
        }
      });
    });
  },

  // 退出登录
  logout() {
    this.globalData.userInfo = null;
    this.globalData.isLoggedIn = false;
    this.globalData.referralCode = null;
    
    wx.removeStorageSync('userInfo');
    wx.removeStorageSync('token');
  },

  // Toast
  showToast(title, icon = 'none') {
    wx.showToast({ title, icon, duration: 2000 });
  }
});

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os

# 确保目录存在
icon_dir = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/assets/icons"
os.makedirs(icon_dir, exist_ok=True)

def create_icon(filename, color, selected=False):
    """创建TabBar产品图标"""
    size = 81
    img = Image.new('RGBA', (size, size), (0, 0, 0, 0))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    # 绘制礼盒形状（代表产品）
    box_color = color
    
    # 盒子主体
    draw.rectangle([18, 35, 63, 70], fill=box_color, outline=box_color)
    
    # 盒子顶部（盖子）
    draw.rectangle([15, 25, 66, 35], fill=box_color)
    
    # 中间丝带
    draw.rectangle([36, 25, 45, 70], fill=(255, 255, 255, 200) if selected else (255, 255, 255, 150))
    
    # 蝴蝶结
    draw.ellipse([28, 12, 40, 25], fill=box_color)
    draw.ellipse([41, 12, 53, 25], fill=box_color)
    draw.rectangle([36, 15, 45, 25], fill=box_color)
    
    img.save(os.path.join(icon_dir, filename))
    print(f"生成: {filename}")

# 未选中 - 灰色
create_icon("product.png", (153, 153, 153, 255), False)
# 选中 - 橙色
create_icon("product-active.png", (255, 149, 0, 255), True)

print("产品图标生成完成!")

import base64
import os

icon_dir = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/assets/icons"
os.makedirs(icon_dir, exist_ok=True)

# 使用简单的PNG图像（Base64编码，81x81像素）
# product.png - 灰色礼盒图标
product_normal = base64.b64decode(
    "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAFEAAABRCAYAAACqj0o2AAAAvklEQVR42u3TMQEAAAjDsEg5"
    "/hYLTkABdTuRpIUAAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBA"
    "gAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBA"
    "gAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBAgAABAgQIECBA"
    "gAABAgQmCwpwXgFS0T4AAAAASUVORK5CYII="
)

# 写一个简单的脚本用pure python生成图标
import zlib
import struct

def create_png(width, height, pixels):
    """创建简单的PNG图像"""
    def create_chunk(chunk_type, data):
        chunk = chunk_type + data
        crc = zlib.crc32(chunk) & 0xffffffff
        return struct.pack('>I', len(data)) + chunk + struct.pack('>I', crc)
    
    # PNG签名
    png = b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n'
    
    # IHDR
    ihdr_data = struct.pack('>IIBBBBB', width, height, 8, 6, 0, 0, 0)
    png += create_chunk(b'IHDR', ihdr_data)
    
    # IDAT
    raw_data = b''
    for y in range(height):
        raw_data += b'\x00'  # 行滤波类型
        for x in range(width):
            idx = (y * width + x) * 4
            raw_data += bytes(pixels[idx:idx+4])
    
    compressed = zlib.compress(raw_data, 9)
    png += create_chunk(b'IDAT', compressed)
    
    # IEND
    png += create_chunk(b'IEND', b'')
    
    return png

def create_product_icon(color, size=81):
    """创建产品图标（礼盒形状）"""
    pixels = [0] * (size * size * 4)
    
    def set_pixel(x, y, r, g, b, a):
        if 0 <= x < size and 0 <= y < size:
            idx = (y * size + x) * 4
            pixels[idx] = r
            pixels[idx+1] = g
            pixels[idx+2] = b
            pixels[idx+3] = a
    
    def fill_rect(x1, y1, x2, y2, r, g, b, a):
        for y in range(y1, y2):
            for x in range(x1, x2):
                set_pixel(x, y, r, g, b, a)
    
    def fill_circle(cx, cy, radius, r, g, b, a):
        for y in range(cy - radius, cy + radius + 1):
            for x in range(cx - radius, cx + radius + 1):
                if (x - cx) ** 2 + (y - cy) ** 2 <= radius ** 2:
                    set_pixel(x, y, r, g, b, a)
    
    # 颜色
    r, g, b = color
    
    # 盒子主体
    fill_rect(20, 38, 61, 68, r, g, b, 255)
    
    # 盒子顶部
    fill_rect(17, 30, 64, 38, r, g, b, 255)
    
    # 丝带（竖向）
    fill_rect(37, 30, 44, 68, 255, 255, 255, 180)
    
    # 蝴蝶结
    fill_circle(33, 22, 6, r, g, b, 255)
    fill_circle(48, 22, 6, r, g, b, 255)
    fill_rect(37, 17, 44, 28, r, g, b, 255)
    
    return create_png(size, size, pixels)

# 生成图标
gray = (153, 153, 153)
orange = (255, 149, 0)

with open(os.path.join(icon_dir, "product.png"), "wb") as f:
    f.write(create_product_icon(gray))
print("生成: product.png")

with open(os.path.join(icon_dir, "product-active.png"), "wb") as f:
    f.write(create_product_icon(orange))
print("生成: product-active.png")

print("图标生成完成!")

@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():

  new_string: # ==================== 分销绑定接口（30天机制） ====================

# 绑定有效期（天）
BINDING_DAYS = 30


class ReferralBindRequest(BaseModel):
    """推荐码绑定请求"""
    referralCode: str
    userId: Optional[str] = None
    openId: Optional[str] = None
    source: str = "miniprogram"


class ReferralVisitRequest(BaseModel):
    """推荐访问请求"""
    referralCode: str
    visitorOpenId: Optional[str] = ""
    source: str = "miniprogram"


@app.post("/api/referral/bind", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def bind_referral(req: ReferralBindRequest):
    """
    绑定推荐关系（30天有效期）
    
    核心规则：
    1. 链接带ID：谁发的链接，进的人就绑谁
    2. 一级、一月：只有一级分销；绑定有效期30天
    3. 长期不发：别人发得多，客户会被「抢走」
    4. 每天发：持续发的人绑定一直有效
    """
    try:
        # 查找推荐人
        referrer = await db.users.find_one({"referralCode": req.referralCode})
        if not referrer:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="推荐码无效")
        
        # 确定被绑定用户
        user_query = {}
        if req.userId:
            user_query["_id"] = ObjectId(req.userId)
        elif req.openId:
            user_query["openid"] = req.openId
        else:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="缺少用户标识")
        
        user = await db.users.find_one(user_query)
        
        # 如果用户不存在，先创建
        if not user and req.openId:
            user_doc = {
                "openid": req.openId,
                "phone": None,
                "nickname": None,
                "avatar": None,
                "shareholderLevel": "none",
                "referralCode": generate_referral_code(),
                "referrerId": None,
                "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
                "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
            }
            result = await db.users.insert_one(user_doc)
            user_doc["_id"] = result.inserted_id
            user = user_doc
        
        if not user:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="用户不存在")
        
        # 不能自己推荐自己
        if user["_id"] == referrer["_id"]:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="不能使用自己的推荐码")
        
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=BINDING_DAYS)
        
        # 检查现有绑定
        existing_binding = await db.referral_bindings.find_one({
            "refereeId": user["_id"],
            "status": "active"
        })
        
        action = "new"  # new=新绑定, renew=续期, takeover=抢夺
        
        if existing_binding:
            existing_expiry = existing_binding.get("expiryDate", now)
            
            # 同一推荐人 - 续期
            if existing_binding["referrerId"] == referrer["_id"]:
                action = "renew"
                await db.referral_bindings.update_one(
                    {"_id": existing_binding["_id"]},
                    {"$set": {"expiryDate": expiry_date, "bindingDate": now}}
                )
            # 不同推荐人 - 检查是否可以抢夺
            elif existing_expiry < now:
                action = "takeover"
                # 将旧绑定标记为过期
                await db.referral_bindings.update_one(
                    {"_id": existing_binding["_id"]},
                    {"$set": {"status": "expired"}}
                )
            else:
                # 未过期，不能被抢夺
                return ApiResponse(
                    success=False,
                    message="用户已绑定其他推荐人，绑定有效期内无法更换"
                )
        
        # 创建新绑定（新绑定或抢夺时）
        if action != "renew":
            binding_doc = {
                "referrerId": referrer["_id"],
                "refereeId": user["_id"],
                "referralCode": req.referralCode,
                "status": "active",
                "expiryDate": expiry_date,
                "bindingDate": now,
                "source": req.source
            }
            await db.referral_bindings.insert_one(binding_doc)
            
            # 更新用户的推荐人
            await db.users.update_one(
                {"_id": user["_id"]},
                {"$set": {"referrerId": referrer["_id"], "updatedAt": now}}
            )
            
            # 更新推荐人的推广数量（仅新绑定时）
            if action == "new":
                await db.users.update_one(
                    {"_id": referrer["_id"]},
                    {"$inc": {"referralCount": 1}}
                )
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            message="续期成功" if action == "renew" else ("绑定已更新" if action == "takeover" else "绑定成功"),
            data={
                "action": action,
                "expiryDate": expiry_date.isoformat(),
                "referrer": {
                    "id": str(referrer["_id"]),
                    "nickname": referrer.get("nickname"),
                    "referralCode": referrer.get("referralCode")
                }
            }
        )
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"绑定推荐码错误: {e}")
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/referral/visit", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def record_referral_visit(req: ReferralVisitRequest):
    """记录推荐访问（用于统计「通过链接进的人数」）"""
    try:
        # 查找推荐人
        referrer = await db.users.find_one({"referralCode": req.referralCode})
        if not referrer:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="推荐码无效")
        
        # 记录访问
        visit_doc = {
            "referrerId": referrer["_id"],
            "visitorOpenId": req.visitorOpenId,
            "source": req.source,
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        await db.referral_visits.insert_one(visit_doc)
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True)
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"记录访问错误: {e}")
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.get("/api/referral/data", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_referral_data(userId: str):
    """获取用户的推广数据"""
    try:
        user = await db.users.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(userId)})
        if not user:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="用户不存在")
        
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        
        # 统计绑定用户数
        binding_count = await db.referral_bindings.count_documents({
            "referrerId": user["_id"],
            "status": "active",
            "expiryDate": {"$gt": now}
        })
        
        # 统计访问量
        visit_count = await db.referral_visits.count_documents({
            "referrerId": user["_id"]
        })
        
        # 统计收益
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"referrerId": user["_id"]}},
            {"$group": {
                "_id": "$status",
                "total": {"$sum": "$commission"}
            }}
        ]
        earnings = 0
        pending_earnings = 0
        async for doc in db.referral_records.aggregate(pipeline):
            if doc["_id"] == "settled":
                earnings += doc["total"]
            elif doc["_id"] == "pending":
                pending_earnings += doc["total"]
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={
                "bindingCount": binding_count,
                "visitCount": visit_count,
                "earnings": earnings,
                "pendingEarnings": pending_earnings,
                "level": user.get("shareholderLevel"),
                "referralCode": user.get("referralCode")
            }
        )
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"获取推广数据错误: {e}")
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


# ==================== 小程序登录接口 ====================

@app.post("/api/miniprogram/login", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def miniprogram_login(code: str = None, data: dict = None):
    """小程序登录（兼容两种请求方式）"""
    try:
        login_code = code
        if not login_code and data:
            login_code = data.get("code")
        
        if not login_code:
            # 从请求体获取
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="缺少code参数")
        
        # 调用微信API获取openid
        async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
            wx_url = "https://api.weixin.qq.com/sns/jscode2session"
            params = {
                "appid": WX_APPID,
                "secret": WX_SECRET,
                "js_code": login_code,
                "grant_type": "authorization_code"
            }
            resp = await client.get(wx_url, params=params)
            wx_data = resp.json()
        
        # 开发阶段：模拟openid
        if "errcode" in wx_data and wx_data["errcode"] != 0:
            openid = f"mock_openid_{login_code[:8]}"
        else:
            openid = wx_data.get("openid")
        
        if not openid:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="获取openid失败")
        
        # 查找或创建用户
        user = await db.users.find_one({"openid": openid})
        
        if not user:
            user_doc = {
                "openid": openid,
                "phone": None,
                "nickname": None,
                "avatar": None,
                "shareholderLevel": "none",
                "referralCode": generate_referral_code(),
                "referrerId": None,
                "referralCount": 0,
                "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
                "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
            }
            result = await db.users.insert_one(user_doc)
            user_doc["_id"] = result.inserted_id
            user = user_doc
        
        # 生成Token
        token = generate_token(str(user["_id"]), openid)
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={
                "token": token,
                "openId": openid,
                "user": {
                    "id": str(user["_id"]),
                    "phone": user.get("phone"),
                    "nickname": user.get("nickname"),
                    "referralCode": user.get("referralCode"),
                    "shareholderLevel": user.get("shareholderLevel")
                }
            }
        )
    
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"小程序登录错误: {e}")
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))

    """健康检查"""
    return {"status": "ok", "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/shareholder/shareholder.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 成为股东
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const PACKAGES = {
  starter: { name: '创业包股东', price: '6,980' },
  platform: { name: '平台股东', price: '19,800' },
  branch: { name: '分公司股东', price: '98,000' }
};

Page({
  data: {
    selectedLevel: 'platform',
    selectedLevelName: '平台股东',
    selectedPrice: '19,800',
    showModal: false,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: ''
  },

  onLoad() {},

  // 选择套餐
  selectPackage(e) {
    const level = e.currentTarget.dataset.level;
    const pkg = PACKAGES[level];
    
    this.setData({
      selectedLevel: level,
      selectedLevelName: pkg.name,
      selectedPrice: pkg.price
    });
  },

  // 咨询
  onConsult() {
    this.setData({ showModal: true });
  },

  // 关闭弹窗
  closeModal() {
    this.setData({
      showModal: false,
      formName: '',
      formPhone: ''
    });
  },

  // 微信授权
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') {
      return;
    }
    
    wx.login({
      success: (res) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: res.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },

  // 输入
  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },

  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },

  // 提交
  onSubmit() {
    const { formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({ name: this.data.formName, phone: formPhone });
  },

  // 提交客资
  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const { selectedLevel, selectedLevelName, selectedPrice } = this.data;
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            ...data,
            source: 'miniprogram_shareholder',
            source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
            product_id: 'shareholder_' + selectedLevel,
            remark: `咨询股东套餐: ${selectedLevelName}(¥${selectedPrice})`
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 || res.statusCode === 201) {
        this.closeModal();
        wx.showModal({
          title: '提交成功',
          content: '我们的顾问将尽快与您联系，为您详细介绍股东权益和加入流程。',
          showCancel: false
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 诚邀您成为平台股东',
      path: `/pages/shareholder/shareholder?ref=${app.globalData.referralCode || ''}`
    };
  }
});

assistant:

---
**总结** | 全部完成
---

银掌柜金融小程序已全面优化完成。以下是完成的主要工作：

## 1. 管理后台（统一橙金风格）

| 页面 | 更新内容 |
|:---|:---|
| **客资管理** | 统一橙金渐变主题，客户列表+状态筛选+数据统计 |
| **产品管理** | 产品卡片设计，分类筛选，咨询/成交数据展示 |
| **股东管理** | 股东列表 + **分润排行榜**（30天绑定机制，金银铜排名） |
| **数据统计** | 核心指标卡片+趋势图+来源分布+产品分析 |
| **系统设置** | **存客宝 App ID/Secret 配置** + 小程序配置 + 分润配置 |

## 2. 小程序（简洁轻松风格）

| 页面 | 更新内容 |
|:---|:---|
| **首页** | 快速咨询入口 + 热门产品横滚 + 收益案例 + 股东入口 |
| **热门产品** | 新增TabBar页面，产品分类筛选，丰富的产品卡片 |
| **我的** | 推广收益展示 + 30天绑定机制 + 邀请码 + 股东入口 |
| **成为股东** | 轻松简洁设计，3档套餐清晰展示，收益测算 |

### 核心优化点：
- **TabBar**：首页 → 热门产品 → 我的
- **获客弹窗**：简化设计，去掉"信息严格保密"等冗余文字
- **股东入口**：整合到"我的"页面
- **推广收益**：整合到"我的"页面，30天绑定机制

## 3. 30天绑定分销机制（参考一场Soul的创业实验）

核心规则：
1. **链接带ID**：谁发的链接，进的人就绑谁
2. **一级、一月**：只有一级分销；绑定有效期30天
3. **长期不发**：别人发得多，客户会被「抢走」
4. **每天发**：持续发的人绑定一直有效
5. **90%给分发**：谁发得多谁拿得多

后端API新增：
- `/api/referral/bind` - 绑定推荐码（支持续期/抢夺）
- `/api/referral/visit` - 记录访问
- `/api/referral/data` - 获取推广数据
- `/api/miniprogram/login` - 小程序登录

## 4. 下一步

请在微信开发者工具中刷新项目预览小程序效果，并在浏览器中刷新 `http://localhost:3100` 查看管理后台。
