[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/products/products.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 热门产品
 * 每个产品可分享，分享需登录
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

// 产品数据
const PRODUCTS = [
  {
    id: 'credit-salary',
    name: '工资贷',
    icon: '💳',
    category: 'credit',
    categoryName: '信用贷',
    desc: '上班族专属，凭工资流水即可申请',
    highlights: ['无需抵押', '当天放款', '利率低'],
    amount: '5-50万',
    rate: '3.2%起',
    hot: true
  },
  {
    id: 'mortgage-house',
    name: '房抵贷',
    icon: '🏠',
    category: 'mortgage',
    categoryName: '抵押贷',
    desc: '以房产抵押获取大额资金',
    highlights: ['额度高', '利率低', '期限长'],
    amount: '50-1000万',
    rate: '3.2%起',
    hot: true
  },
  {
    id: 'business-loan',
    name: '经营贷',
    icon: '🏢',
    category: 'business',
    categoryName: '经营贷',
    desc: '企业经营周转，先息后本',
    highlights: ['先息后本', '随借随还', '审批快'],
    amount: '30-300万',
    rate: '3.6%起',
    hot: false
  },
  {
    id: 'bridge-fund',
    name: '过桥资金',
    icon: '🌉',
    category: 'bridge',
    categoryName: '过桥资金',
    desc: '短期资金周转，当天放款',
    highlights: ['当天放款', '灵活周期', '专人服务'],
    amount: '50-1000万',
    rate: '千1/天',
    hot: true
  },
  {
    id: 'credit-fund',
    name: '公积金贷',
    icon: '🏦',
    category: 'credit',
    categoryName: '信用贷',
    desc: '有公积金即可贷',
    highlights: ['额度高', '纯信用', '快审批'],
    amount: '10-100万',
    rate: '3.5%起',
    hot: false
  },
  {
    id: 'mortgage-car',
    name: '车抵贷',
    icon: '🚗',
    category: 'mortgage',
    categoryName: '抵押贷',
    desc: '有车即可贷，不押车',
    highlights: ['不押车', '当天放', '手续简'],
    amount: '5-50万',
    rate: '4.5%起',
    hot: false
  }
];

Page({
  data: {
    activeCategory: 'all',
    products: PRODUCTS,
    filteredProducts: PRODUCTS,
    
    // 咨询弹窗
    showModal: false,
    currentProduct: null,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: '',
    
    // 分享弹窗
    showShareModal: false,
    shareProduct: null,
    
    // 海报弹窗
    showPosterModal: false,
    
    // 登录弹窗
    showLoginModal: false
  },

  onLoad() {},

  onShow() {
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 1 });
    }
  },

  // 切换分类
  switchCategory(e) {
    const category = e.currentTarget.dataset.category;
    let filtered = PRODUCTS;
    
    if (category !== 'all') {
      filtered = PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.category === category);
    }
    
    this.setData({
      activeCategory: category,
      filteredProducts: filtered
    });
  },

  // 点击产品
  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}`
    });
  },

  // 咨询
  onConsult(e) {
    const product = e.currentTarget.dataset.product;
    this.setData({
      showModal: true,
      currentProduct: product
    });
  },

  closeModal() {
    this.setData({
      showModal: false,
      formName: '',
      formPhone: ''
    });
  },

  // 分享产品（需要登录）
  onShareProduct(e) {
    const product = e.currentTarget.dataset.product;
    
    // 检查是否登录
    if (!app.globalData.isLoggedIn) {
      this.setData({
        showLoginModal: true,
        shareProduct: product
      });
      return;
    }
    
    this.setData({
      showShareModal: true,
      shareProduct: product
    });
  },

  closeShareModal() {
    this.setData({ showShareModal: false });
  },

  closeLoginModal() {
    this.setData({ showLoginModal: false });
  },

  // 登录
  async doLogin() {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '登录中...' });
    
    try {
      const result = await app.login();
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (result) {
        this.setData({ showLoginModal: false });
        
        // 登录成功后显示分享弹窗
        if (this.data.shareProduct) {
          this.setData({ showShareModal: true });
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '登录失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 生成海报
  async generatePoster() {
    const { shareProduct } = this.data;
    if (!shareProduct) return;
    
    wx.showLoading({ title: '生成中...' });
    this.setData({ showShareModal: false, showPosterModal: true });
    
    const ctx = wx.createCanvasContext('posterCanvas', this);
    const width = 268;
    const height = 400;
    
    // 背景
    const grd = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, height);
    grd.addColorStop(0, '#FF9500');
    grd.addColorStop(1, '#FFB347');
    ctx.setFillStyle(grd);
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
    
    // 白色卡片
    ctx.setFillStyle('#FFFFFF');
    ctx.fillRect(15, 60, width - 30, height - 120);
    
    // 产品图标
    ctx.setFillStyle('#FF9500');
    ctx.setFontSize(40);
    ctx.fillText(shareProduct.icon, width / 2 - 20, 110);
    
    // 产品名称
    ctx.setFillStyle('#333333');
    ctx.setFontSize(22);
    ctx.setTextAlign('center');
    ctx.fillText(shareProduct.name, width / 2, 150);
    
    // 利率
    ctx.setFillStyle('#FF9500');
    ctx.setFontSize(28);
    ctx.fillText(shareProduct.rate, width / 2, 190);
    
    // 额度
    ctx.setFillStyle('#666666');
    ctx.setFontSize(14);
    ctx.fillText('额度：' + shareProduct.amount, width / 2, 220);
    
    // 亮点
    ctx.setFillStyle('#999999');
    ctx.setFontSize(12);
    ctx.fillText(shareProduct.highlights.join(' · '), width / 2, 250);
    
    // 分隔线
    ctx.setStrokeStyle('#F5F5F5');
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(30, 270);
    ctx.lineTo(width - 30, 270);
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // 品牌
    ctx.setFillStyle('#333333');
    ctx.setFontSize(16);
    ctx.fillText('银掌柜金融', width / 2, 300);
    
    ctx.setFillStyle('#999999');
    ctx.setFontSize(11);
    ctx.fillText('扫码咨询获取专属方案', width / 2, 320);
    
    // 邀请码
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || 'YZG';
    ctx.setFillStyle('#FF9500');
    ctx.setFontSize(12);
    ctx.fillText('邀请码：' + refCode, width / 2, 350);
    
    ctx.draw(true, () => {
      wx.hideLoading();
    });
  },

  closePosterModal() {
    this.setData({ showPosterModal: false });
  },

  // 保存海报
  savePoster() {
    wx.canvasToTempFilePath({
      canvasId: 'posterCanvas',
      success: (res) => {
        wx.saveImageToPhotosAlbum({
          filePath: res.tempFilePath,
          success: () => {
            wx.showToast({ title: '已保存到相册', icon: 'success' });
            this.closePosterModal();
          },
          fail: (err) => {
            if (err.errMsg.includes('auth deny')) {
              wx.openSetting();
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }, this);
  },

  // 微信授权
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') return;
    
    wx.login({
      success: (res) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: res.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },

  onNameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value });
  },

  onPhoneInput(e) {
    this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value });
  },

  onSubmit() {
    const { formPhone } = this.data;
    
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    
    this.submitLead({ name: this.data.formName, phone: formPhone });
  },

  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      const { currentProduct } = this.data;
      
      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            ...data,
            source: 'miniprogram_products',
            source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || '',
            product_id: currentProduct?.id || 'general',
            remark: currentProduct ? `咨询: ${currentProduct.name}` : ''
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      this.closeModal();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交成功', icon: 'success' });
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 分享（带推荐码）
  onShareAppMessage() {
    const { shareProduct } = this.data;
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    
    if (shareProduct) {
      return {
        title: `${shareProduct.name} - ${shareProduct.rate}，${shareProduct.highlights[0]}`,
        path: `/pages/product/product?id=${shareProduct.id}&ref=${refCode}`,
        imageUrl: ''
      };
    }
    
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 热门金融产品',
      path: `/pages/products/products?ref=${refCode}`
    };
  }
});

      <text class="sh-title">成为平台股东</text>
      <text class="sh-desc">最高50%分润</text>
    </view>
    <view class="sh-right">
      <text class="sh-price">6,980起</text>
      <text class="sh-arrow">→</text>
    </view>
  </view>
  
  <!-- 功能菜单 -->
  <view class="menu-card">
    <view class="menu-item" bindtap="goToPage" data-page="promotion">
      <text class="menu-icon">📊</text>
      <text class="menu-text">推广中心</text>
      <text class="menu-badge" wx:if="{{bindingCount > 0}}">{{bindingCount}}</text>
      <text class="menu-arrow">→</text>
    </view>
    <view class="menu-item" bindtap="goToPage" data-page="orders">
      <text class="menu-icon">📋</text>
      <text class="menu-text">我的咨询</text>
      <text class="menu-arrow">→</text>
    </view>
    <view class="menu-item" bindtap="goToPage" data-page="earnings">
      <text class="menu-icon">💎</text>
      <text class="menu-text">收益明细</text>
      <text class="menu-arrow">→</text>
    </view>
  </view>
</view>

<!-- 编辑头像弹窗 -->
<view class="modal-mask" wx:if="{{showEditModal}}" bindtap="closeEditModal">
  <view class="edit-modal" catchtap>
    <view class="modal-close" bindtap="closeEditModal">×</view>
    <text class="edit-title">编辑资料</text>
    
    <view class="edit-avatar" bindtap="chooseAvatar">
      <image class="edit-avatar-img" wx:if="{{editAvatar}}" src="{{editAvatar}}" mode="aspectFill"></image>
      <text class="edit-avatar-text" wx:else>{{userInfo.nickName ? userInfo.nickName[0] : '银'}}</text>
      <view class="edit-avatar-tip">点击更换</view>
    </view>
    
    <view class="edit-form">
      <view class="edit-item">
        <text class="edit-label">昵称</text>
        <input class="edit-input" placeholder="输入昵称" value="{{editNickname}}" bindinput="onNicknameInput" />
      </view>
    </view>
    
    <button class="edit-save-btn" bindtap="saveProfile">保存</button>
  </view>
</view>

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/profile/profile.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 我的
 * 推广中心入口，头像可编辑
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    isLoggedIn: false,
    userInfo: {},
    userLevel: null,
    
    // 推广数据
    totalEarnings: '0',
    pendingEarnings: '0',
    bindingCount: 0,
    
    // 编辑弹窗
    showEditModal: false,
    editAvatar: '',
    editNickname: ''
  },

  onLoad() {
    this.initData();
  },

  onShow() {
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 2 });
    }
    this.initData();
  },

  async initData() {
    const { isLoggedIn, userInfo } = app.globalData;
    
    if (isLoggedIn && userInfo) {
      this.setData({
        isLoggedIn: true,
        userInfo,
        editNickname: userInfo.nickName || '',
        editAvatar: userInfo.avatarUrl || ''
      });
      
      await this.loadReferralData();
    } else {
      await this.autoLogin();
    }
  },

  async autoLogin() {
    try {
      const result = await app.login();
      if (result) {
        this.initData();
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Profile] 自动登录失败');
    }
  },

  async loadReferralData() {
    try {
      const userId = app.globalData.userInfo?.id;
      if (!userId) return;
      
      const res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/referral/data?userId=${userId}`,
          method: 'GET',
          header: {
            'Authorization': `Bearer ${wx.getStorageSync('token')}`
          },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      if (res.statusCode === 200 && res.data?.success) {
        const data = res.data.data;
        this.setData({
          totalEarnings: (data.earnings || 0).toFixed(0),
          pendingEarnings: (data.pendingEarnings || 0).toFixed(0),
          bindingCount: data.bindingCount || 0,
          userLevel: data.level || null
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Profile] 获取推广数据失败');
    }
  },

  onLogin() {
    wx.login({
      success: async () => {
        const result = await app.login();
        if (result) {
          this.initData();
        }
      }
    });
  },

  // 点击头像
  onAvatarTap() {
    if (!this.data.isLoggedIn) {
      this.onLogin();
      return;
    }
    
    this.setData({
      showEditModal: true,
      editNickname: this.data.userInfo.nickName || '',
      editAvatar: this.data.userInfo.avatarUrl || ''
    });
  },

  closeEditModal() {
    this.setData({ showEditModal: false });
  },

  // 选择头像
  chooseAvatar() {
    wx.chooseMedia({
      count: 1,
      mediaType: ['image'],
      sourceType: ['album', 'camera'],
      success: (res) => {
        this.setData({
          editAvatar: res.tempFiles[0].tempFilePath
        });
      }
    });
  },

  onNicknameInput(e) {
    this.setData({ editNickname: e.detail.value });
  },

  // 保存资料
  async saveProfile() {
    const { editNickname, editAvatar } = this.data;
    
    wx.showLoading({ title: '保存中...' });
    
    // 更新本地数据
    const userInfo = {
      ...this.data.userInfo,
      nickName: editNickname,
      avatarUrl: editAvatar
    };
    
    app.globalData.userInfo = userInfo;
    wx.setStorageSync('userInfo', userInfo);
    
    this.setData({
      userInfo,
      showEditModal: false
    });
    
    wx.hideLoading();
    wx.showToast({ title: '保存成功', icon: 'success' });
  },

  // 跳转股东页面
  goToShareholder() {
    wx.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/shareholder/shareholder'
    });
  },

  // 跳转页面
  goToPage(e) {
    const page = e.currentTarget.dataset.page;
    
    switch (page) {
      case 'promotion':
        // 推广中心 - 参考一场soul的创业实验
        wx.showModal({
          title: '推广中心',
          content: `绑定用户：${this.data.bindingCount}人\n累计收益：¥${this.data.totalEarnings}\n待结算：¥${this.data.pendingEarnings}\n\n分享产品给好友，成交即可获得分润！`,
          showCancel: false
        });
        break;
      case 'orders':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
      case 'earnings':
        wx.showToast({ title: '功能开发中', icon: 'none' });
        break;
    }
  },

  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 邀请你一起赚收益',
      path: `/pages/index/index?ref=${refCode}`
    };
  },

  onShareTimeline() {
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融',
      query: `ref=${refCode}`
    };
  }
});

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 管理后台登录
 * 账号：admin  密码：K123456
 */

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryDark: '#E68600',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

export default function LoginPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    
    if (!username.trim()) {
      setError('请输入账号');
      return;
    }
    
    if (!password.trim()) {
      setError('请输入密码');
      return;
    }
    
    setLoading(true);
    
    // 验证账号密码
    if (username === 'admin' && password === 'K123456') {
      // 存储登录状态
      localStorage.setItem('yzg_admin_token', 'admin_token_' + Date.now());
      localStorage.setItem('yzg_admin_user', JSON.stringify({
        username: 'admin',
        role: 'admin',
        loginTime: new Date().toISOString()
      }));
      
      // 跳转到首页
      router.push('/');
    } else {
      setError('账号或密码错误');
    }
    
    setLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div style={{
      minHeight: '100vh',
      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
      display: 'flex',
      alignItems: 'center',
      justifyContent: 'center',
      padding: 20
    }}>
      <div style={{
        width: 420,
        background: '#FFFFFF',
        borderRadius: 24,
        padding: 48,
        boxShadow: '0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)'
      }}>
        {/* Logo */}
        <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: 40 }}>
          <div style={{
            width: 72,
            height: 72,
            margin: '0 auto 16px',
            background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
            borderRadius: 16,
            display: 'flex',
            alignItems: 'center',
            justifyContent: 'center',
            fontSize: 36
          }}>
            🏦
          </div>
          <h1 style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>
            银掌柜金融
          </h1>
          <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 8 }}>
            管理后台
          </p>
        </div>
        
        {/* 表单 */}
        <form onSubmit={handleLogin}>
          {error && (
            <div style={{
              padding: '12px 16px',
              background: '#FFF2F0',
              border: `1px solid ${COLORS.danger}30`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              color: COLORS.danger,
              fontSize: 14,
              marginBottom: 20
            }}>
              {error}
            </div>
          )}
          
          <div style={{ marginBottom: 20 }}>
            <label style={{
              display: 'block',
              fontSize: 14,
              color: COLORS.textSecondary,
              marginBottom: 8
            }}>
              账号
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="请输入账号"
              value={username}
              onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
              style={{
                width: '100%',
                height: 48,
                padding: '0 16px',
                border: `1px solid #E5E5E5`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                fontSize: 15,
                outline: 'none',
                boxSizing: 'border-box',
                transition: 'border-color 0.3s'
              }}
              onFocus={(e) => e.target.style.borderColor = COLORS.primary}
              onBlur={(e) => e.target.style.borderColor = '#E5E5E5'}
            />
          </div>
          
          <div style={{ marginBottom: 28 }}>
            <label style={{
              display: 'block',
              fontSize: 14,
              color: COLORS.textSecondary,
              marginBottom: 8
            }}>
              密码
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              placeholder="请输入密码"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              style={{
                width: '100%',
                height: 48,
                padding: '0 16px',
                border: `1px solid #E5E5E5`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                fontSize: 15,
                outline: 'none',
                boxSizing: 'border-box',
                transition: 'border-color 0.3s'
              }}
              onFocus={(e) => e.target.style.borderColor = COLORS.primary}
              onBlur={(e) => e.target.style.borderColor = '#E5E5E5'}
            />
          </div>
          
          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={loading}
            style={{
              width: '100%',
              height: 52,
              background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
              color: '#FFFFFF',
              border: 'none',
              borderRadius: 8,
              fontSize: 16,
              fontWeight: 600,
              cursor: loading ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer',
              opacity: loading ? 0.7 : 1,
              boxShadow: '0 4px 16px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.35)',
              transition: 'transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s'
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              if (!loading) {
                e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(-2px)';
                e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = '0 6px 20px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.4)';
              }
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
              e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 16px rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.35)';
            }}
          >
            {loading ? '登录中...' : '登 录'}
          </button>
        </form>
        
        {/* 提示 */}
        <div style={{
          marginTop: 24,
          padding: 16,
          background: '#FFF7ED',
          borderRadius: 8,
          fontSize: 13,
          color: COLORS.textSecondary,
          lineHeight: 1.6
        }}>
          <strong style={{ color: COLORS.primary }}>提示：</strong>
          <br />
          默认账号：admin
          <br />
          默认密码：K123456
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 管理后台

const COLORS = {

  goldLight: '#F5D77A',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',

};

  { id: 2, name: '李**', phone: '139****1234', product: '房抵贷', source: '分享', time: '12分钟前', status: '跟进中' },

  { id: 5, name: '陈**', phone: '135****8765', product: '车贷', source: '小程序', time: '1小时前', status: '跟进中' },
];

export default function Dashboard() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [stats, setStats] = useState(mockStats);
  const [recentLeads, setRecentLeads] = useState(mockRecentLeads);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);
  const [adminUser, setAdminUser] = useState<any>(null);

  // 检查登录状态
  useEffect(() => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_token');
    const user = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_user');
    
    if (!token || !user) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    
    setIsLoggedIn(true);
    setAdminUser(JSON.parse(user));
  }, [router]);

  // 退出登录
  const handleLogout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_token');
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_user');
    router.push('/login');
  };

  // 刷新数据
  const refreshData = () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      setLoading(false);
    }, 1000);
  };

  // 未登录时显示空白
  if (!isLoggedIn) {
    return null;
  }

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram/pages/index/index.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 首页
 * 简洁设计 + 产品分享 + 30天绑定机制
 */

const app = getApp();
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

Page({
  data: {
    // 热门产品
    hotProducts: [
      { id: 'credit', name: '信用贷', icon: '💳', rate: '3.2%起', amount: '5-50万' },
      { id: 'house', name: '房抵贷', icon: '🏠', rate: '3.2%起', amount: '50-1000万' },
      { id: 'business', name: '经营贷', icon: '🏢', rate: '3.6%起', amount: '30-300万' },
      { id: 'bridge', name: '过桥', icon: '🌉', rate: '千1/天', amount: '50-1000万' }
    ],
    
    // 收益案例
    cases: [
      { avatar: '张', name: '张**', desc: '推荐房抵贷成交', amount: '3,600', time: '刚刚' },
      { avatar: '李', name: '李**', desc: '推荐信用贷成交', amount: '1,200', time: '5分钟前' },
      { avatar: '王', name: '王**', desc: '新用户注册', amount: '50', time: '10分钟前' }
    ],
    
    // 弹窗
    showModal: false,
    formName: '',
    formPhone: '',
    
    // 分享弹窗
    showShareModal: false,
    shareProduct: null,
    
    // 登录弹窗
    showLoginModal: false
  },

  onLoad(options) {
    // 处理分享参数 - 30天绑定
    this.handleReferralCode(options);
  },

  onShow() {
    if (typeof this.getTabBar === 'function' && this.getTabBar()) {
      this.getTabBar().setData({ selected: 0 });
    }
  },

  // 处理推荐码绑定
  handleReferralCode(options) {
    const refCode = options.ref || options.referralCode || options.source;
    
    if (refCode) {
      console.log('[Index] 推荐码:', refCode);
      app.globalData.sourceCode = refCode;
      wx.setStorageSync('sourceCode', refCode);
      
      // 检查绑定
      const boundInfo = wx.getStorageSync('boundReferralInfo');
      if (boundInfo) {
        const daysDiff = (new Date() - new Date(boundInfo.boundAt)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
        if (daysDiff < 30 && boundInfo.code !== refCode) {
          return;
        }
      }
      
      this.bindReferralCode(refCode);
    }
  },

  async bindReferralCode(refCode) {
    try {
      const openId = app.globalData.openId || wx.getStorageSync('openId');
      
      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/referral/bind`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: { referralCode: refCode, openId, source: 'miniprogram' },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.setStorageSync('boundReferralInfo', {
        code: refCode,
        boundAt: new Date().toISOString()
      });
    } catch (e) {
      console.log('[Index] 绑定失败');
    }
  },

  // 快速咨询
  onQuickConsult() {
    this.setData({ showModal: true });
  },

  closeModal() {
    this.setData({ showModal: false, formName: '', formPhone: '' });
  },

  // 分享产品
  onShareProduct(e) {
    const product = e.currentTarget.dataset.product;
    
    if (!app.globalData.isLoggedIn) {
      this.setData({ showLoginModal: true, shareProduct: product });
      return;
    }
    
    this.setData({ showShareModal: true, shareProduct: product });
  },

  closeShareModal() {
    this.setData({ showShareModal: false });
  },

  closeLoginModal() {
    this.setData({ showLoginModal: false });
  },

  async doLogin() {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '登录中...' });
    
    try {
      const result = await app.login();
      wx.hideLoading();
      
      if (result) {
        this.setData({ showLoginModal: false });
        if (this.data.shareProduct) {
          this.setData({ showShareModal: true });
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '登录失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  // 生成海报
  generatePoster() {
    wx.showToast({ title: '海报生成中...', icon: 'loading' });
    // 简化：提示保存分享链接
    setTimeout(() => {
      wx.hideToast();
      const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || 'YZG';
      wx.setClipboardData({
        data: `银掌柜金融 - ${this.data.shareProduct?.name || '专业金融服务'}\n邀请码：${refCode}`,
        success: () => {
          wx.showToast({ title: '链接已复制', icon: 'success' });
          this.closeShareModal();
        }
      });
    }, 500);
  },

  // 微信授权
  onGetPhoneNumber(e) {
    if (e.detail.errMsg !== 'getPhoneNumber:ok') return;
    
    wx.login({
      success: (res) => {
        this.submitLead({
          code: res.code,
          encrypted_data: e.detail.encryptedData,
          iv: e.detail.iv
        });
      }
    });
  },

  onNameInput(e) { this.setData({ formName: e.detail.value }); },
  onPhoneInput(e) { this.setData({ formPhone: e.detail.value }); },

  onSubmit() {
    const { formPhone } = this.data;
    if (!/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/.test(formPhone)) {
      wx.showToast({ title: '请输入正确的手机号', icon: 'none' });
      return;
    }
    this.submitLead({ name: this.data.formName, phone: formPhone });
  },

  async submitLead(data) {
    wx.showLoading({ title: '提交中...' });
    
    try {
      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        wx.request({
          url: `${API_BASE}/api/leads`,
          method: 'POST',
          data: {
            ...data,
            source: 'miniprogram_index',
            source_code: app.globalData.sourceCode || wx.getStorageSync('sourceCode') || '',
            remark: '首页咨询'
          },
          header: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          success: resolve,
          fail: reject
        });
      });
      
      wx.hideLoading();
      this.closeModal();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交成功', icon: 'success' });
    } catch (e) {
      wx.hideLoading();
      wx.showToast({ title: '提交失败', icon: 'none' });
    }
  },

  onProductTap(e) {
    const id = e.currentTarget.dataset.id;
    wx.navigateTo({ url: `/pages/product/product?id=${id}` });
  },

  goToProducts() {
    wx.switchTab({ url: '/pages/products/products' });
  },

  goToShareholder() {
    wx.navigateTo({ url: '/pages/shareholder/shareholder' });
  },

  // 分享
  onShareAppMessage() {
    const { shareProduct } = this.data;
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    
    if (shareProduct) {
      return {
        title: `${shareProduct.name} - ${shareProduct.rate}`,
        path: `/pages/product/product?id=${shareProduct.id}&ref=${refCode}`
      };
    }
    
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融 - 让金融更简单',
      path: `/pages/index/index?ref=${refCode}`
    };
  },

  onShareTimeline() {
    const refCode = app.globalData.referralCode || '';
    return {
      title: '银掌柜金融',
      query: `ref=${refCode}`
    };
  }
});

## 30天绑定分销机制

核心逻辑：
1. 用户分享产品链接带推荐码（`?ref=xxx`）
2. 好友通过链接进入小程序，自动绑定到推荐人30天
3. 绑定期内，好友的任何成交都计入推荐人收益
4. 绑定过期后可被其他人"抢夺"

  new_string: # ==================== 管理后台 - 登录验证 ====================

ADMIN_USERNAME = "admin"
ADMIN_PASSWORD = "K123456"


class AdminLoginRequest(BaseModel):
    """管理后台登录请求"""
    username: str
    password: str


@app.post("/api/admin/login", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def admin_login(req: AdminLoginRequest):
    """管理后台登录"""
    if req.username == ADMIN_USERNAME and req.password == ADMIN_PASSWORD:
        token = jwt.encode(
            {"role": "admin", "exp": datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=24)},
            JWT_SECRET,
            algorithm=JWT_ALGORITHM
        )
        return ApiResponse(success=True, data={"token": token, "username": req.username})
    return ApiResponse(success=False, message="账号或密码错误")


# ==================== 管理后台 - 客资管理（完整CRUD） ====================

class LeadUpdate(BaseModel):
    """客资更新请求"""
    name: Optional[str] = None
    phone: Optional[str] = None
    company: Optional[str] = None
    status: Optional[str] = None
    remark: Optional[str] = None
    productId: Optional[str] = None
    productName: Optional[str] = None
    loanAmount: Optional[float] = None
    loanPurpose: Optional[str] = None
    hasHouse: Optional[bool] = None
    hasCar: Optional[bool] = None
    hasInsurance: Optional[bool] = None
    monthlyIncome: Optional[float] = None
    rfmScore: Optional[float] = None
    city: Optional[str] = None
    district: Optional[str] = None


class LeadImport(BaseModel):
    """客资批量导入"""
    leads: List[dict]


@app.get("/api/admin/leads/{lead_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_lead_detail(lead_id: str):
    """获取客资详情"""
    try:
        lead = await db.leads.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(lead_id)})
        if not lead:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="客资不存在")
        
        lead["_id"] = str(lead["_id"])
        if lead.get("productId"):
            lead["productId"] = str(lead["productId"])
        if lead.get("referrerId"):
            lead["referrerId"] = str(lead["referrerId"])
            # 获取推荐人信息
            referrer = await db.users.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(lead["referrerId"])})
            if referrer:
                lead["referrer"] = {
                    "id": str(referrer["_id"]),
                    "nickname": referrer.get("nickname"),
                    "phone": referrer.get("phone"),
                    "referralCode": referrer.get("referralCode")
                }
        
        # 获取跟进记录
        lead["followRecords"] = lead.get("followRecords", [])
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, data=lead)
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.put("/api/admin/leads/{lead_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def update_lead(lead_id: str, req: LeadUpdate):
    """更新客资"""
    try:
        update_data = {k: v for k, v in req.dict().items() if v is not None}
        update_data["updatedAt"] = datetime.utcnow()
        
        result = await db.leads.update_one(
            {"_id": ObjectId(lead_id)},
            {"$set": update_data}
        )
        
        if result.modified_count == 0:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="更新失败")
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="更新成功")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.delete("/api/admin/leads/{lead_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def delete_lead(lead_id: str):
    """删除客资"""
    try:
        result = await db.leads.delete_one({"_id": ObjectId(lead_id)})
        if result.deleted_count == 0:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="删除失败")
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="删除成功")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/admin/leads/import", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def import_leads(req: LeadImport):
    """批量导入客资"""
    try:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        leads_to_insert = []
        
        for lead_data in req.leads:
            lead_doc = {
                "phone": lead_data.get("phone", ""),
                "name": lead_data.get("name", ""),
                "company": lead_data.get("company", ""),
                "productId": lead_data.get("productId"),
                "productName": lead_data.get("productName", ""),
                "source": lead_data.get("source", "import"),
                "status": lead_data.get("status", "new"),
                "city": lead_data.get("city", ""),
                "district": lead_data.get("district", ""),
                "loanAmount": lead_data.get("loanAmount"),
                "loanPurpose": lead_data.get("loanPurpose", ""),
                "hasHouse": lead_data.get("hasHouse", False),
                "hasCar": lead_data.get("hasCar", False),
                "hasInsurance": lead_data.get("hasInsurance", False),
                "monthlyIncome": lead_data.get("monthlyIncome"),
                "rfmScore": lead_data.get("rfmScore"),
                "referrerId": ObjectId(lead_data["referrerId"]) if lead_data.get("referrerId") else None,
                "referralCode": lead_data.get("referralCode", ""),
                "createdAt": now,
                "updatedAt": now
            }
            leads_to_insert.append(lead_doc)
        
        if leads_to_insert:
            result = await db.leads.insert_many(leads_to_insert)
            return ApiResponse(
                success=True,
                message=f"成功导入 {len(result.inserted_ids)} 条客资",
                data={"count": len(result.inserted_ids)}
            )
        
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message="没有有效数据")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/admin/leads/clean", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def clean_leads(status: str = "invalid"):
    """清洗客资（标记无效）"""
    try:
        # 清洗规则：手机号格式错误、重复手机号
        
        # 1. 标记手机号格式错误
        invalid_phone = await db.leads.update_many(
            {"phone": {"$not": {"$regex": r"^1[3-9]\d{9}$"}}},
            {"$set": {"status": "invalid", "invalidReason": "手机号格式错误"}}
        )
        
        # 2. 标记重复（保留最新一条）
        pipeline = [
            {"$group": {"_id": "$phone", "count": {"$sum": 1}, "ids": {"$push": "$_id"}}},
            {"$match": {"count": {"$gt": 1}}}
        ]
        
        duplicate_count = 0
        async for doc in db.leads.aggregate(pipeline):
            # 保留第一条，标记其他为重复
            duplicate_ids = doc["ids"][1:]
            await db.leads.update_many(
                {"_id": {"$in": duplicate_ids}},
                {"$set": {"status": "duplicate", "invalidReason": "重复客资"}}
            )
            duplicate_count += len(duplicate_ids)
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            message=f"清洗完成：{invalid_phone.modified_count} 条无效手机号，{duplicate_count} 条重复",
            data={
                "invalidPhone": invalid_phone.modified_count,
                "duplicate": duplicate_count
            }
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/admin/leads/{lead_id}/follow", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def add_follow_record(lead_id: str, content: str, result: str = ""):
    """添加跟进记录"""
    try:
        record = {
            "content": content,
            "result": result,
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
        }
        
        await db.leads.update_one(
            {"_id": ObjectId(lead_id)},
            {
                "$push": {"followRecords": record},
                "$set": {"updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()}
            }
        )
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="跟进记录已添加")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


# ==================== 管理后台 - 产品管理（完整CRUD） ====================

class ProductUpdate(BaseModel):
    """产品更新请求"""
    name: Optional[str] = None
    category: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    features: Optional[List[str]] = None
    requirements: Optional[List[str]] = None
    coverImage: Optional[str] = None
    isActive: Optional[bool] = None
    sortOrder: Optional[int] = None
    minAmount: Optional[float] = None
    maxAmount: Optional[float] = None
    minRate: Optional[str] = None
    maxRate: Optional[str] = None


@app.get("/api/admin/products", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def admin_get_products(
    page: int = 1,
    pageSize: int = 20,
    category: Optional[str] = None,
    isActive: Optional[bool] = None
):
    """获取所有产品（包括下架）"""
    try:
        query = {}
        if category and category != "all":
            query["category"] = category
        if isActive is not None:
            query["isActive"] = isActive
        
        skip = (page - 1) * pageSize
        cursor = db.products.find(query).sort("sortOrder", 1).skip(skip).limit(pageSize)
        products = await cursor.to_list(length=pageSize)
        
        for p in products:
            p["_id"] = str(p["_id"])
        
        total = await db.products.count_documents(query)
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={"list": products, "total": total, "page": page, "pageSize": pageSize}
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.get("/api/admin/products/{product_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def admin_get_product(product_id: str):
    """获取产品详情"""
    try:
        product = await db.products.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(product_id)})
        if not product:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="产品不存在")
        
        product["_id"] = str(product["_id"])
        
        # 获取该产品的客资统计
        lead_count = await db.leads.count_documents({"productId": ObjectId(product_id)})
        product["leadCount"] = lead_count
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, data=product)
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.put("/api/admin/products/{product_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def admin_update_product(product_id: str, req: ProductUpdate):
    """更新产品"""
    try:
        update_data = {k: v for k, v in req.dict().items() if v is not None}
        update_data["updatedAt"] = datetime.utcnow()
        
        result = await db.products.update_one(
            {"_id": ObjectId(product_id)},
            {"$set": update_data}
        )
        
        if result.modified_count == 0:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="更新失败")
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="更新成功")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.delete("/api/admin/products/{product_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def admin_delete_product(product_id: str):
    """删除产品"""
    try:
        result = await db.products.delete_one({"_id": ObjectId(product_id)})
        if result.deleted_count == 0:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="删除失败")
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="删除成功")
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/admin/products/{product_id}/toggle", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def toggle_product_status(product_id: str):
    """切换产品上下架状态"""
    try:
        product = await db.products.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(product_id)})
        if not product:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="产品不存在")
        
        new_status = not product.get("isActive", True)
        
        await db.products.update_one(
            {"_id": ObjectId(product_id)},
            {"$set": {"isActive": new_status, "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()}}
        )
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            message="已上架" if new_status else "已下架",
            data={"isActive": new_status}
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


# ==================== 管理后台 - 股东管理 ====================

class ShareholderCreate(BaseModel):
    """创建股东"""
    name: str
    phone: str
    level: str  # starter/platform/branch/capital
    referralCode: Optional[str] = None
    investment: float = 0
    remark: Optional[str] = ""


@app.get("/api/admin/shareholders", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_shareholders(
    page: int = 1,
    pageSize: int = 20,
    level: Optional[str] = None
):
    """获取股东列表"""
    try:
        query = {"shareholderLevel": {"$ne": "none"}}
        if level:
            query["shareholderLevel"] = level
        
        skip = (page - 1) * pageSize
        cursor = db.users.find(query).sort("createdAt", -1).skip(skip).limit(pageSize)
        shareholders = await cursor.to_list(length=pageSize)
        
        result_list = []
        for s in shareholders:
            # 统计该股东的绑定用户数和客资数
            binding_count = await db.referral_bindings.count_documents({
                "referrerId": s["_id"],
                "status": "active"
            })
            lead_count = await db.leads.count_documents({"referrerId": s["_id"]})
            
            # 计算总收益
            pipeline = [
                {"$match": {"referrerId": s["_id"]}},
                {"$group": {"_id": None, "total": {"$sum": "$commission"}}}
            ]
            total_earnings = 0
            async for doc in db.referral_records.aggregate(pipeline):
                total_earnings = doc.get("total", 0)
            
            result_list.append({
                "_id": str(s["_id"]),
                "name": s.get("nickname") or s.get("name", ""),
                "phone": s.get("phone", ""),
                "level": s.get("shareholderLevel"),
                "referralCode": s.get("referralCode"),
                "bindingCount": binding_count,
                "leadCount": lead_count,
                "totalEarnings": total_earnings,
                "investment": s.get("investment", 0),
                "createdAt": s.get("createdAt").isoformat() if s.get("createdAt") else ""
            })
        
        total = await db.users.count_documents(query)
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={"list": result_list, "total": total, "page": page, "pageSize": pageSize}
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.get("/api/admin/shareholders/{shareholder_id}", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_shareholder_detail(shareholder_id: str):
    """获取股东详情（含获客情况）"""
    try:
        shareholder = await db.users.find_one({"_id": ObjectId(shareholder_id)})
        if not shareholder:
            return ApiResponse(success=False, message="股东不存在")
        
        s_id = shareholder["_id"]
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        
        # 获取绑定用户列表
        bindings = []
        cursor = db.referral_bindings.find({"referrerId": s_id}).sort("bindingDate", -1).limit(50)
        async for b in cursor:
            referee = await db.users.find_one({"_id": b["refereeId"]})
            bindings.append({
                "userId": str(b["refereeId"]),
                "phone": referee.get("phone") if referee else "",
                "nickname": referee.get("nickname") if referee else "",
                "bindingDate": b.get("bindingDate").isoformat() if b.get("bindingDate") else "",
                "expiryDate": b.get("expiryDate").isoformat() if b.get("expiryDate") else "",
                "status": "active" if b.get("expiryDate", now) > now else "expired"
            })
        
        # 获取客资列表
        leads = []
        cursor = db.leads.find({"referrerId": s_id}).sort("createdAt", -1).limit(50)
        async for lead in cursor:
            leads.append({
                "_id": str(lead["_id"]),
                "name": lead.get("name", ""),
                "phone": lead.get("phone", ""),
                "productName": lead.get("productName", ""),
                "status": lead.get("status"),
                "createdAt": lead.get("createdAt").isoformat() if lead.get("createdAt") else ""
            })
        
        # 统计数据
        binding_count = await db.referral_bindings.count_documents({
            "referrerId": s_id, "status": "active", "expiryDate": {"$gt": now}
        })
        total_bindings = await db.referral_bindings.count_documents({"referrerId": s_id})
        lead_count = await db.leads.count_documents({"referrerId": s_id})
        
        # 收益统计
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"referrerId": s_id}},
            {"$group": {"_id": "$status", "total": {"$sum": "$commission"}}}
        ]
        earnings_settled = 0
        earnings_pending = 0
        async for doc in db.referral_records.aggregate(pipeline):
            if doc["_id"] == "settled":
                earnings_settled = doc["total"]
            elif doc["_id"] == "pending":
                earnings_pending = doc["total"]
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={
                "_id": str(shareholder["_id"]),
                "name": shareholder.get("nickname") or shareholder.get("name", ""),
                "phone": shareholder.get("phone", ""),
                "level": shareholder.get("shareholderLevel"),
                "referralCode": shareholder.get("referralCode"),
                "investment": shareholder.get("investment", 0),
                "stats": {
                    "activeBindings": binding_count,
                    "totalBindings": total_bindings,
                    "leadCount": lead_count,
                    "earningsSettled": earnings_settled,
                    "earningsPending": earnings_pending
                },
                "bindings": bindings,
                "leads": leads,
                "createdAt": shareholder.get("createdAt").isoformat() if shareholder.get("createdAt") else ""
            }
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.post("/api/admin/shareholders", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def create_shareholder(req: ShareholderCreate):
    """创建股东"""
    try:
        # 检查手机号是否已存在
        existing = await db.users.find_one({"phone": req.phone})
        
        if existing:
            # 升级为股东
            await db.users.update_one(
                {"_id": existing["_id"]},
                {
                    "$set": {
                        "shareholderLevel": req.level,
                        "nickname": req.name,
                        "investment": req.investment,
                        "remark": req.remark,
                        "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
                    }
                }
            )
            return ApiResponse(success=True, message="已升级为股东", data={"_id": str(existing["_id"])})
        
        # 创建新股东
        user_doc = {
            "openid": f"shareholder_{req.phone}",
            "phone": req.phone,
            "nickname": req.name,
            "avatar": None,
            "shareholderLevel": req.level,
            "referralCode": req.referralCode or generate_referral_code(),
            "referrerId": None,
            "investment": req.investment,
            "remark": req.remark,
            "referralCount": 0,
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
            "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        result = await db.users.insert_one(user_doc)
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, message="股东创建成功", data={"_id": str(result.inserted_id)})
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


@app.get("/api/admin/shareholders/ranking", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_shareholder_ranking(days: int = 30, limit: int = 20):
    """获取股东分润排行榜"""
    try:
        since = datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(days=days)
        
        # 聚合计算每个推荐人的总收益
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"createdAt": {"$gte": since}}},
            {"$group": {
                "_id": "$referrerId",
                "totalCommission": {"$sum": "$commission"},
                "leadCount": {"$sum": 1}
            }},
            {"$sort": {"totalCommission": -1}},
            {"$limit": limit}
        ]
        
        ranking = []
        rank = 1
        async for doc in db.referral_records.aggregate(pipeline):
            if doc["_id"]:
                user = await db.users.find_one({"_id": doc["_id"]})
                if user:
                    ranking.append({
                        "rank": rank,
                        "_id": str(user["_id"]),
                        "name": user.get("nickname") or user.get("name", ""),
                        "phone": user.get("phone", ""),
                        "level": user.get("shareholderLevel"),
                        "referralCode": user.get("referralCode"),
                        "totalCommission": doc["totalCommission"],
                        "leadCount": doc["leadCount"]
                    })
                    rank += 1
        
        return ApiResponse(success=True, data={"list": ranking, "days": days})
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))


# ==================== 管理后台 - 数据统计 ====================

@app.get("/api/admin/statistics/dashboard", response_model=ApiResponse)
async def get_dashboard_statistics():
    """获取仪表盘统计"""
    try:
        now = datetime.utcnow()
        today = now.replace(hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        this_month = now.replace(day=1, hour=0, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0)
        
        # 总客资数
        total_leads = await db.leads.count_documents({})
        today_leads = await db.leads.count_documents({"createdAt": {"$gte": today}})
        month_leads = await db.leads.count_documents({"createdAt": {"$gte": this_month}})
        
        # 转化率
        converted = await db.leads.count_documents({"status": "converted"})
        conversion_rate = round(converted / total_leads * 100, 1) if total_leads > 0 else 0
        
        # 股东数
        shareholders = await db.users.count_documents({"shareholderLevel": {"$ne": "none"}})
        
        # 活跃绑定数
        active_bindings = await db.referral_bindings.count_documents({
            "status": "active",
            "expiryDate": {"$gt": now}
        })
        
        # 最近7天趋势
        seven_days_ago = today - timedelta(days=7)
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"createdAt": {"$gte": seven_days_ago}}},
            {"$group": {
                "_id": {"$dateToString": {"format": "%Y-%m-%d", "date": "$createdAt"}},
                "count": {"$sum": 1}
            }},
            {"$sort": {"_id": 1}}
        ]
        leads_trend = []
        async for doc in db.leads.aggregate(pipeline):
            leads_trend.append({"date": doc["_id"], "count": doc["count"]})
        
        # 来源分布
        pipeline = [
            {"$group": {"_id": "$source", "count": {"$sum": 1}}},
            {"$sort": {"count": -1}}
        ]
        source_distribution = []
        async for doc in db.leads.aggregate(pipeline):
            source_distribution.append({"source": doc["_id"] or "direct", "count": doc["count"]})
        
        # 产品热度
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"productName": {"$ne": None, "$ne": ""}}},
            {"$group": {"_id": "$productName", "count": {"$sum": 1}}},
            {"$sort": {"count": -1}},
            {"$limit": 10}
        ]
        product_stats = []
        async for doc in db.leads.aggregate(pipeline):
            product_stats.append({"name": doc["_id"], "count": doc["count"]})
        
        # 城市分布
        pipeline = [
            {"$match": {"city": {"$ne": None, "$ne": ""}}},
            {"$group": {"_id": "$city", "count": {"$sum": 1}}},
            {"$sort": {"count": -1}},
            {"$limit": 10}
        ]
        city_stats = []
        async for doc in db.leads.aggregate(pipeline):
            city_stats.append({"city": doc["_id"], "count": doc["count"]})
        
        return ApiResponse(
            success=True,
            data={
                "overview": {
                    "totalLeads": total_leads,
                    "todayLeads": today_leads,
                    "monthLeads": month_leads,
                    "conversionRate": conversion_rate,
                    "shareholders": shareholders,
                    "activeBindings": active_bindings
                },
                "leadsTrend": leads_trend,
                "sourceDistribution": source_distribution,
                "productStats": product_stats,
                "cityStats": city_stats
            }
        )
    except Exception as e:
        return ApiResponse(success=False, message=str(e))

async def health_check():
    """健康检查"""
    return {"status": "ok", "timestamp": datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}

    }

# 贷款用途
LOAN_PURPOSES = [
    "经营周转", "扩大生产", "采购原材料", "支付货款", "装修店铺",
    "购买设备", "开新店", "还贷款", "投资项目", "资金过桥",
    "买房首付", "买车", "结婚", "子女教育", "医疗", "其他"
]

# 来源渠道
SOURCES = [
    "miniprogram", "miniprogram_index", "miniprogram_products", 
    "share", "poster", "wechat", "referral", "baidu", "douyin", "xiaohongshu"
]

# 客资状态
STATUSES = ["new", "following", "converted", "invalid", "closed"]


def generate_phone():
    """生成厦门地区手机号（138/139/158/159/188/189等）"""
    prefixes = ["138", "139", "158", "159", "188", "189", "136", "137", "150", "151", "152", "153", "155", "156", "157", "180", "181", "182", "183", "185", "186", "187"]
    return random.choice(prefixes) + "".join(random.choices("0123456789", k=8))


def generate_name():
    """生成中文姓名"""
    surname = random.choice(XIAMEN_SURNAMES)
    name_length = random.choice([1, 2])  # 单字或双字名
    name = "".join(random.choices(NAME_CHARS, k=name_length))
    return surname + name


def generate_company():
    """生成公司名称"""
    template = random.choice(COMPANY_TEMPLATES)
    name_chars = "".join(random.choices(COMPANY_NAME_CHARS, k=random.randint(2, 4)))
    return template.format(name_chars)


def calculate_rfm_score(recency_days, frequency, monetary):
    """计算RFM评分（1-5分制，5分最高）"""
    # R分数（最近一次交易）
    if recency_days <= 7:
        r = 5
    elif recency_days <= 30:
        r = 4
    elif recency_days <= 90:
        r = 3
    elif recency_days <= 180:
        r = 2
    else:
        r = 1
    
    # F分数（交易频次）
    if frequency >= 10:
        f = 5
    elif frequency >= 5:
        f = 4
    elif frequency >= 3:
        f = 3
    elif frequency >= 1:
        f = 2
    else:
        f = 1
    
    # M分数（交易金额）
    if monetary >= 500000:
        m = 5
    elif monetary >= 200000:
        m = 4
    elif monetary >= 100000:
        m = 3
    elif monetary >= 50000:
        m = 2
    else:
        m = 1
    
    # 综合评分（加权平均）
    return round((r * 0.3 + f * 0.3 + m * 0.4), 2)


def generate_leads(count, shareholders):
    """生成客资数据"""
    leads = []
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    
    for i in range(count):
        # 随机选择区
        district = random.choice(XIAMEN_DISTRICTS)
        street = random.choice(XIAMEN_STREETS[district])
        
        # 随机选择产品
        product = random.choice(PRODUCTS)
        
        # 生成贷款金额（根据产品类型）
        if product["category"] == "mortgage":
            loan_amount = random.randint(50, 500) * 10000
        elif product["category"] == "bridge":
            loan_amount = random.randint(50, 300) * 10000
        elif product["category"] == "business":
            loan_amount = random.randint(30, 200) * 10000
        else:
            loan_amount = random.randint(5, 50) * 10000
        
        # 随机分配推荐人（70%有推荐人）
        referrer = random.choice(shareholders) if random.random() < 0.7 else None
        
        # 生成创建时间（过去180天内）
        days_ago = random.randint(0, 180)
        created_at = now - timedelta(days=days_ago, hours=random.randint(0, 23), minutes=random.randint(0, 59))
        
        # RFM数据
        recency_days = days_ago
        frequency = random.randint(0, 15)
        monetary = loan_amount * random.uniform(0.1, 1.5)
        rfm_score = calculate_rfm_score(recency_days, frequency, monetary)
        
        # 月收入（影响还款能力）
        monthly_income = random.choice([
            random.randint(5000, 10000),
            random.randint(10000, 20000),
            random.randint(20000, 50000),
            random.randint(50000, 100000),
            random.randint(100000, 300000)
        ])
        
        # 状态分布
        status_weights = [0.3, 0.25, 0.2, 0.15, 0.1]  # new, following, converted, invalid, closed
        status = random.choices(STATUSES, weights=status_weights)[0]
        
        lead = {
            "phone": generate_phone(),
            "name": generate_name(),
            "company": generate_company() if random.random() < 0.6 else "",
            "productId": product["id"],
            "productName": product["name"],
            "source": random.choice(SOURCES),
            "status": status,
            "city": "厦门",
            "district": district,
            "street": street,
            "loanAmount": loan_amount,
            "loanPurpose": random.choice(LOAN_PURPOSES),
            "hasHouse": random.random() < 0.4,
            "hasCar": random.random() < 0.5,
            "hasInsurance": random.random() < 0.3,
            "monthlyIncome": monthly_income,
            "rfmScore": rfm_score,
            "referrerId": referrer["_id"] if referrer else None,
            "referralCode": referrer["referralCode"] if referrer else "",
            "followRecords": [],
            "createdAt": created_at,
            "updatedAt": created_at
        }
        
        # 高RFM评分的添加跟进记录
        if rfm_score >= 4:
            lead["followRecords"] = [
                {
                    "content": "首次联系，客户有明确贷款需求",
                    "result": "有意向",
                    "createdAt": (created_at + timedelta(hours=random.randint(1, 24))).isoformat()
                }
            ]
            if status in ["following", "converted"]:
                lead["followRecords"].append({
                    "content": "二次跟进，已提交材料",
                    "result": "材料审核中",
                    "createdAt": (created_at + timedelta(days=random.randint(1, 7))).isoformat()
                })
        
        leads.append(lead)
    
    return leads


def generate_bindings(leads, shareholders):
    """生成30天绑定关系"""
    bindings = []
    now = datetime.utcnow()
    
    for lead in leads:
        if lead.get("referrerId"):
            # 随机决定绑定状态
            is_expired = random.random() < 0.2  # 20%已过期
            
            binding_date = lead["createdAt"]
            if is_expired:
                expiry_date = binding_date + timedelta(days=30)
                status = "expired"
            else:
                expiry_date = now + timedelta(days=random.randint(1, 30))
                status = "active"
            
            binding = {
                "referrerId": lead["referrerId"],
                "refereePhone": lead["phone"],
                "refereeName": lead["name"],
                "referralCode": lead["referralCode"],
                "status": status,
                "bindingDate": binding_date,
                "expiryDate": expiry_date,
                "source": lead["source"]
            }
            bindings.append(binding)
    
    return bindings


def generate_referral_records(leads, shareholders):
    """生成分销佣金记录"""
    records = []
    
    # 佣金配置
    COMMISSION_RATES = {
        "starter": 10,   # 创业包：10元/条
        "platform": 10,  # 平台股东：10元/条
        "branch": 10     # 分公司股东：10元/条
    }
    
    for lead in leads:
        if lead.get("referrerId"):
            # 查找推荐人的等级
            referrer = next((s for s in shareholders if s["_id"] == lead["referrerId"]), None)
            if referrer:
                level = referrer.get("shareholderLevel", "none")
                commission = COMMISSION_RATES.get(level, 0)
                
                if commission > 0:
                    # 随机决定结算状态
                    is_settled = lead["status"] == "converted" or random.random() < 0.3
                    
                    record = {
                        "referrerId": lead["referrerId"],
                        "leadPhone": lead["phone"],
                        "leadName": lead["name"],
                        "commission": commission,
                        "commissionRate": commission,
                        "status": "settled" if is_settled else "pending",
                        "createdAt": lead["createdAt"]
                    }
                    records.append(record)
    
    return records


def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("银掌柜金融 - 数据生成脚本")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    # 清空旧数据（可选）
    print("\n📦 清空旧数据...")
    db.users.delete_many({"phone": {"$regex": "^138000000"}})  # 只删除测试股东
    
    # 1. 创建股东
    print("\n👥 创建股东...")
    shareholder_ids = []
    for s in SHAREHOLDERS:
        # 检查是否已存在
        existing = db.users.find_one({"phone": s["phone"]})
        if existing:
            shareholder_ids.append(existing)
            print(f"  ⚠️ 股东已存在: {s['name']} ({s['phone']})")
            continue
        
        user_doc = {
            "openid": f"shareholder_{s['phone']}",
            "phone": s["phone"],
            "nickname": s["nickname"],
            "name": s["name"],
            "avatar": None,
            "shareholderLevel": s["level"],
            "referralCode": s["referralCode"],
            "referrerId": None,
            "investment": s["investment"],
            "remark": s["remark"],
            "referralCount": 0,
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
            "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        result = db.users.insert_one(user_doc)
        user_doc["_id"] = result.inserted_id
        shareholder_ids.append(user_doc)
        print(f"  ✅ 创建股东: {s['name']} ({s['phone']}) - {s['level']}")
    
    # 2. 创建产品
    print("\n📦 创建产品...")
    for p in PRODUCTS:
        existing = db.products.find_one({"name": p["name"]})
        if existing:
            print(f"  ⚠️ 产品已存在: {p['name']}")
            continue
        
        product_doc = {
            "name": p["name"],
            "category": p["category"],
            "description": f"{p['name']}，额度{p['amount']}，利率{p['rate']}",
            "features": [p["rate"], p["amount"]],
            "requirements": [],
            "coverImage": "",
            "isActive": True,
            "sortOrder": PRODUCTS.index(p),
            "viewCount": random.randint(100, 5000),
            "consultCount": random.randint(50, 500),
            "createdAt": datetime.utcnow(),
            "updatedAt": datetime.utcnow()
        }
        db.products.insert_one(product_doc)
        print(f"  ✅ 创建产品: {p['name']}")
    
    # 3. 生成客资数据
    print("\n📊 生成客资数据...")
    leads = generate_leads(1015, shareholder_ids)
    
    # 插入客资
    if leads:
        result = db.leads.insert_many(leads)
        print(f"  ✅ 成功导入 {len(result.inserted_ids)} 条客资")
        
        # 更新leads的_id
        for i, lead_id in enumerate(result.inserted_ids):
            leads[i]["_id"] = lead_id
    
    # 4. 生成绑定关系
    print("\n🔗 生成绑定关系...")
    bindings = generate_bindings(leads, shareholder_ids)
    if bindings:
        result = db.referral_bindings.insert_many(bindings)
        print(f"  ✅ 成功创建 {len(result.inserted_ids)} 条绑定关系")
    
    # 5. 生成分销记录
    print("\n💰 生成分销记录...")
    records = generate_referral_records(leads, shareholder_ids)
    if records:
        result = db.referral_records.insert_many(records)
        print(f"  ✅ 成功创建 {len(result.inserted_ids)} 条分销记录")
    
    # 6. 更新股东的推广数量
    print("\n📈 更新股东统计...")
    for s in shareholder_ids:
        referral_count = db.leads.count_documents({"referrerId": s["_id"]})
        db.users.update_one(
            {"_id": s["_id"]},
            {"$set": {"referralCount": referral_count}}
        )
        print(f"  ✅ {s.get('nickname', s.get('name'))}: {referral_count} 条客资")
    
    # 7. 统计信息
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("📊 数据统计")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    total_leads = db.leads.count_documents({})
    total_shareholders = db.users.count_documents({"shareholderLevel": {"$ne": "none"}})
    total_bindings = db.referral_bindings.count_documents({})
    total_records = db.referral_records.count_documents({})
    
    # 高RFM客资
    high_rfm = db.leads.count_documents({"rfmScore": {"$gte": 4}})
    
    # 厦门客资
    xiamen_leads = db.leads.count_documents({"city": "厦门"})
    
    # 各区分布
    print(f"\n  总客资数: {total_leads}")
    print(f"  总股东数: {total_shareholders}")
    print(f"  绑定关系: {total_bindings}")
    print(f"  分销记录: {total_records}")
    print(f"  高RFM客资 (≥4分): {high_rfm}")
    print(f"  厦门客资: {xiamen_leads}")
    
    print("\n  各区分布:")
    for district in XIAMEN_DISTRICTS:
        count = db.leads.count_documents({"district": district})
        print(f"    {district}: {count}")
    
    # 各状态分布
    print("\n  状态分布:")
    for status in STATUSES:
        count = db.leads.count_documents({"status": status})
        print(f"    {status}: {count}")
    
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("✅ 数据生成完成！")
    print("=" * 60)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 客资管理
 * 功能：列表、新建、编辑、详情、导入、清洗
 */

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  bgDark: '#1A1A1A',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  textLight: '#999999',
  border: '#E5E5E5',
  success: '#52C41A',
  warning: '#FAAD14',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

const STATUS_MAP: Record<string, { text: string; color: string }> = {
  new: { text: '新客资', color: COLORS.primary },
  following: { text: '跟进中', color: COLORS.warning },
  converted: { text: '已成交', color: COLORS.success },
  invalid: { text: '无效', color: COLORS.textLight },
  duplicate: { text: '重复', color: COLORS.textLight },
  closed: { text: '已关闭', color: COLORS.danger }
};

interface Lead {
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  phone: string;
  company?: string;
  productName?: string;
  source?: string;
  status: string;
  city?: string;
  district?: string;
  loanAmount?: number;
  rfmScore?: number;
  referrer?: { nickname: string; referralCode: string };
  createdAt: string;
}

export default function LeadsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);
  const [leads, setLeads] = useState<Lead[]>([]);
  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('');
  const [searchPhone, setSearchPhone] = useState('');
  
  // 弹窗状态
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
  const [modalType, setModalType] = useState<'create' | 'edit' | 'detail' | 'import'>('create');
  const [currentLead, setCurrentLead] = useState<Lead | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '', phone: '', company: '', productName: '', status: 'new', loanAmount: '', loanPurpose: '', remark: ''
  });
  const [importText, setImportText] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_token');
    if (!token) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoggedIn(true);
    fetchLeads();
  }, [page, statusFilter]);

  const fetchLeads = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      let url = `${API_BASE}/api/leads?page=${page}&pageSize=20`;
      if (statusFilter) url += `&status=${statusFilter}`;
      
      const res = await fetch(url);
      const data = await res.json();
      
      if (data.success) {
        setLeads(data.data.list);
        setTotal(data.data.total);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取客资失败', e);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const openModal = (type: 'create' | 'edit' | 'detail' | 'import', lead?: Lead) => {
    setModalType(type);
    setCurrentLead(lead || null);
    
    if (type === 'edit' && lead) {
      setFormData({
        name: lead.name || '',
        phone: lead.phone || '',
        company: lead.company || '',
        productName: lead.productName || '',
        status: lead.status || 'new',
        loanAmount: lead.loanAmount?.toString() || '',
        loanPurpose: '',
        remark: ''
      });
    } else if (type === 'create') {
      setFormData({ name: '', phone: '', company: '', productName: '', status: 'new', loanAmount: '', loanPurpose: '', remark: '' });
    }
    
    setShowModal(true);
  };

  const closeModal = () => {
    setShowModal(false);
    setCurrentLead(null);
    setImportText('');
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (modalType === 'create') {
      // 新建客资
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/leads`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          ...formData,
          loanAmount: formData.loanAmount ? parseFloat(formData.loanAmount) : null,
          productId: 'general',
          source: 'admin'
        })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        alert('创建成功');
        closeModal();
        fetchLeads();
      } else {
        alert(data.message || '创建失败');
      }
    } else if (modalType === 'edit' && currentLead) {
      // 编辑客资
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/leads/${currentLead._id}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          ...formData,
          loanAmount: formData.loanAmount ? parseFloat(formData.loanAmount) : null
        })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        alert('更新成功');
        closeModal();
        fetchLeads();
      } else {
        alert(data.message || '更新失败');
      }
    } else if (modalType === 'import') {
      // 批量导入
      try {
        const lines = importText.trim().split('\n').filter(l => l.trim());
        const leads = lines.map(line => {
          const [phone, name, company, productName] = line.split(/[,\t，]/);
          return { phone: phone?.trim(), name: name?.trim(), company: company?.trim(), productName: productName?.trim() };
        }).filter(l => l.phone);
        
        if (leads.length === 0) {
          alert('请输入有效数据');
          return;
        }
        
        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/leads/import`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ leads })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success) {
          alert(data.message || '导入成功');
          closeModal();
          fetchLeads();
        } else {
          alert(data.message || '导入失败');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        alert('数据格式错误');
      }
    }
  };

  const handleClean = async () => {
    if (!confirm('确定要清洗客资吗？将标记无效手机号和重复数据')) return;
    
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/leads/clean`, { method: 'POST' });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      alert(data.message || '清洗完成');
      fetchLeads();
    } else {
      alert(data.message || '清洗失败');
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    if (!confirm('确定要删除这条客资吗？')) return;
    
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/leads/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      fetchLeads();
    } else {
      alert(data.message || '删除失败');
    }
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_token');
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_user');
    router.push('/login');
  };

  if (!isLoggedIn) return null;

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bg, display: 'flex' }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: 240,
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.bgDark} 0%, #2D2D2D 100%)`,
        padding: '24px 0',
        position: 'fixed',
        height: '100vh',
        left: 0,
        top: 0
      }}>

                    <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>{lead.source || 'direct'}</span>

                  </td>
                  <td style={{ padding: '16px' }}>
                    {lead.rfmScore ? (
                      <span style={{
                        padding: '4px 8px',

                  </td>
                  <td style={{ padding: '16px', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8, justifyContent: 'center' }}>

                        border: 'none',

                        fontSize: 12,
                        cursor: 'pointer'
                      }}>

                      </button>

                        padding: '6px 12px',
                        background: '#FFF7ED',
                        border: 'none',
                        borderRadius: 6,
                        fontSize: 12,
                        color: COLORS.primary,
                        cursor: 'pointer'
                      }}>
                        编辑
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={() => handleDelete(lead._id)} style={{
                        padding: '6px 12px',
                        background: '#FFF2F0',
                        border: 'none',
                        borderRadius: 6,
                        fontSize: 12,
                        color: COLORS.danger,
                        cursor: 'pointer'
                      }}>
                        删除
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
          
          {/* 分页 */}
          <div style={{
            display: 'flex',
            justifyContent: 'center',
            alignItems: 'center',
            gap: 16,
            padding: 20,
            borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`
          }}>
            <button
              disabled={page <= 1}
              onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}
              style={{
                padding: '8px 16px',
                background: page <= 1 ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                color: page <= 1 ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 6,
                cursor: page <= 1 ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
              }}
            >
              上一页
            </button>
            <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>第 {page} 页 / 共 {Math.ceil(total / 20)} 页</span>
            <button
              disabled={page >= Math.ceil(total / 20)}
              onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}
              style={{
                padding: '8px 16px',
                background: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                color: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 6,
                cursor: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
              }}
            >
              下一页
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
      
      {/* 弹窗 */}
      {showModal && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center',
          zIndex: 1000
        }} onClick={closeModal}>
          <div style={{
            width: modalType === 'detail' ? 600 : 480,
            maxHeight: '80vh',
            background: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 32,
            overflow: 'auto'
          }} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              {modalType === 'create' && '➕ 新建客资'}
              {modalType === 'edit' && '✏️ 编辑客资'}
              {modalType === 'detail' && '📋 客资详情'}
              {modalType === 'import' && '📥 导入客资'}
            </h3>
            
            {(modalType === 'create' || modalType === 'edit') && (
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>手机号 *</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={formData.phone}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, phone: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>姓名</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={formData.name}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>公司</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"

                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, company: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />

                    <option value="converted">已成交</option>

                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,

            )}

              <div>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 16 }}>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
