                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 4 }}>{currentLead.name || '-'}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>手机号</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 4 }}>{currentLead.phone}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>公司</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 4 }}>{currentLead.company || '-'}</div>
                  </div>

                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>意向产品</div>

                  </div>

                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>贷款金额</div>

                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>RFM评分</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: (currentLead.rfmScore || 0) >= 4 ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.text, marginTop: 4 }}>
                      {currentLead.rfmScore?.toFixed(1) || '-'}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>地区</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 4 }}>
                      {currentLead.city ? `${currentLead.city} ${currentLead.district || ''}` : '-'}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>状态</div>
                    <div style={{ marginTop: 4 }}>
                      <span style={{
                        padding: '4px 12px',
                        background: STATUS_MAP[currentLead.status]?.color + '15',
                        color: STATUS_MAP[currentLead.status]?.color,
                        borderRadius: 12,
                        fontSize: 14,
                        fontWeight: 500
                      }}>
                        {STATUS_MAP[currentLead.status]?.text || currentLead.status}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {currentLead.referrer && (
                  <div style={{ marginTop: 20, padding: 16, background: '#FFF7ED', borderRadius: 8 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>推荐人</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.primary, marginTop: 4 }}>
                      {currentLead.referrer.nickname} ({currentLead.referrer.referralCode})
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                <button onClick={closeModal} style={{
                  width: '100%',
                  padding: '14px',
                  background: '#F5F5F5',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  color: COLORS.text,
                  fontSize: 16,
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  marginTop: 24
                }}>
                  关闭
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {modalType === 'import' && (
              <div>
                <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 16 }}>
                  每行一条数据，格式：手机号,姓名,公司,意向产品
                </p>
                <textarea
                  value={importText}
                  onChange={e => setImportText(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="13800138000,张三,厦门某公司,信用贷&#10;13900139000,李四,厦门某某公司,房抵贷"
                  style={{
                    width: '100%',
                    height: 200,
                    padding: 16,
                    border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    fontSize: 14,
                    resize: 'vertical',
                    boxSizing: 'border-box'
                  }}
                />
                <button onClick={handleSubmit} style={{
                  width: '100%',
                  padding: '14px',
                  background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  color: '#FFFFFF',
                  fontSize: 16,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  marginTop: 16
                }}>
                  导入
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/admin/app/products/page.tsx
  contents: "use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 产品管理
 * 功能：列表、新建、编辑、上下架
 */

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  bgDark: '#1A1A1A',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  textLight: '#999999',
  border: '#E5E5E5',
  success: '#52C41A',
  warning: '#FAAD14',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

const CATEGORY_MAP: Record<string, { name: string; icon: string }> = {
  credit: { name: '信用贷', icon: '💳' },
  mortgage: { name: '抵押贷', icon: '🏠' },
  business: { name: '经营贷', icon: '🏢' },
  bridge: { name: '过桥资金', icon: '🌉' }
};

interface Product {
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  description?: string;
  features?: string[];
  isActive: boolean;
  viewCount?: number;
  consultCount?: number;
  leadCount?: number;
  createdAt?: string;
}

export default function ProductsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);
  const [products, setProducts] = useState<Product[]>([]);
  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [categoryFilter, setCategoryFilter] = useState('');
  
  // 弹窗
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
  const [modalType, setModalType] = useState<'create' | 'edit' | 'detail'>('create');
  const [currentProduct, setCurrentProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    name: '', category: 'credit', description: '', features: '', minAmount: '', maxAmount: '', minRate: '', maxRate: ''
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_token');
    if (!token) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoggedIn(true);
    fetchProducts();
  }, [page, categoryFilter]);

  const fetchProducts = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      let url = `${API_BASE}/api/admin/products?page=${page}&pageSize=20`;
      if (categoryFilter) url += `&category=${categoryFilter}`;
      
      const res = await fetch(url);
      const data = await res.json();
      
      if (data.success) {
        setProducts(data.data.list);
        setTotal(data.data.total);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取产品失败', e);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const openModal = async (type: 'create' | 'edit' | 'detail', product?: Product) => {
    setModalType(type);
    
    if ((type === 'edit' || type === 'detail') && product) {
      // 获取详情
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/products/${product._id}`);
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success) {
          setCurrentProduct(data.data);
          if (type === 'edit') {
            setFormData({
              name: data.data.name || '',
              category: data.data.category || 'credit',
              description: data.data.description || '',
              features: (data.data.features || []).join('\n'),
              minAmount: data.data.minAmount?.toString() || '',
              maxAmount: data.data.maxAmount?.toString() || '',
              minRate: data.data.minRate || '',
              maxRate: data.data.maxRate || ''
            });
          }
        }
      } catch (e) {
        setCurrentProduct(product);
      }
    } else if (type === 'create') {
      setCurrentProduct(null);
      setFormData({ name: '', category: 'credit', description: '', features: '', minAmount: '', maxAmount: '', minRate: '', maxRate: '' });
    }
    
    setShowModal(true);
  };

  const closeModal = () => {
    setShowModal(false);
    setCurrentProduct(null);
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    const features = formData.features.split('\n').filter(f => f.trim());
    
    if (modalType === 'create') {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/products`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          name: formData.name,
          category: formData.category,
          description: formData.description,
          features,
          minAmount: formData.minAmount ? parseFloat(formData.minAmount) : null,
          maxAmount: formData.maxAmount ? parseFloat(formData.maxAmount) : null,
          minRate: formData.minRate,
          maxRate: formData.maxRate,
          isActive: true
        })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        alert('创建成功');
        closeModal();
        fetchProducts();
      } else {
        alert(data.message || '创建失败');
      }
    } else if (modalType === 'edit' && currentProduct) {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/products/${currentProduct._id}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          name: formData.name,
          category: formData.category,
          description: formData.description,
          features,
          minAmount: formData.minAmount ? parseFloat(formData.minAmount) : null,
          maxAmount: formData.maxAmount ? parseFloat(formData.maxAmount) : null,
          minRate: formData.minRate,
          maxRate: formData.maxRate
        })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        alert('更新成功');
        closeModal();
        fetchProducts();
      } else {
        alert(data.message || '更新失败');
      }
    }
  };

  const handleToggle = async (product: Product) => {
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/products/${product._id}/toggle`, { method: 'POST' });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      fetchProducts();
    } else {
      alert(data.message || '操作失败');
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    if (!confirm('确定要删除这个产品吗？')) return;
    
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/products/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) {
      fetchProducts();
    } else {
      alert(data.message || '删除失败');
    }
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_token');
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_user');
    router.push('/login');
  };

  if (!isLoggedIn) return null;

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bg, display: 'flex' }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: 240,
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.bgDark} 0%, #2D2D2D 100%)`,
        padding: '24px 0',
        position: 'fixed',
        height: '100vh',
        left: 0,
        top: 0
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '0 24px', marginBottom: 32 }}>
          <h1 style={{ color: COLORS.primary, fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, margin: 0 }}>银掌柜</h1>
          <p style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 12, marginTop: 4 }}>金融私域运营中台</p>
        </div>
        
        <nav>
          {[
            { name: '数据看板', icon: '📊', href: '/' },
            { name: '客资管理', icon: '👥', href: '/leads' },
            { name: '产品管理', icon: '📦', href: '/products', active: true },
            { name: '股东管理', icon: '🏆', href: '/distribution' },
            { name: '数据统计', icon: '📈', href: '/statistics' },
            { name: '系统设置', icon: '⚙️', href: '/settings' },
          ].map((item) => (
            <Link key={item.name} href={item.href} style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
              <div style={{
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 12,
                padding: '14px 24px',
                color: item.active ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
                background: item.active ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, transparent 100%)` : 'transparent',
                borderLeft: item.active ? `3px solid ${COLORS.primary}` : '3px solid transparent',
                cursor: 'pointer'
              }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icon}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.name}</span>
              </div>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>
        
        <div style={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, left: 0, right: 0, padding: '0 24px' }}>
          <button onClick={handleLogout} style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '12px 16px',
            background: 'rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.1)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: 8,
            color: '#FF4D4F',
            fontSize: 13,
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}>
            🚪 退出登录
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>
      
      {/* 主内容 */}
      <main style={{ flex: 1, marginLeft: 240, padding: 32 }}>
        {/* 标题栏 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 24 }}>
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>📦 产品管理</h2>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 8 }}>共 {total} 个产品</p>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => openModal('create')} style={{
            padding: '10px 20px',
            background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
            border: 'none',
            borderRadius: 8,
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            fontSize: 14,
            fontWeight: 600,
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}>
            ➕ 新建产品
          </button>
        </div>
        
        {/* 分类筛选 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginBottom: 24 }}>
          {[
            { key: '', name: '全部' },
            { key: 'credit', name: '💳 信用贷' },
            { key: 'mortgage', name: '🏠 抵押贷' },
            { key: 'business', name: '🏢 经营贷' },
            { key: 'bridge', name: '🌉 过桥资金' }
          ].map(cat => (
            <button
              key={cat.key}
              onClick={() => { setCategoryFilter(cat.key); setPage(1); }}
              style={{
                padding: '10px 20px',
                background: categoryFilter === cat.key ? COLORS.primary : '#FFFFFF',
                color: categoryFilter === cat.key ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
                border: `1px solid ${categoryFilter === cat.key ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.border}`,
                borderRadius: 8,
                fontSize: 14,
                cursor: 'pointer'
              }}
            >
              {cat.name}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {/* 产品列表 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr))', gap: 20 }}>
          {products.map((product) => (
            <div key={product._id} style={{
              background: '#FFFFFF',
              borderRadius: 16,
              padding: 24,
              position: 'relative',
              border: product.isActive ? 'none' : `2px dashed ${COLORS.border}`
            }}>
              {/* 状态标签 */}
              <div style={{
                position: 'absolute',
                top: 16,
                right: 16,
                padding: '4px 12px',
                background: product.isActive ? COLORS.success + '15' : COLORS.textLight + '15',
                color: product.isActive ? COLORS.success : COLORS.textLight,
                borderRadius: 12,
                fontSize: 12,
                fontWeight: 500
              }}>
                {product.isActive ? '已上架' : '已下架'}
              </div>
              
              {/* 产品信息 */}
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 16, marginBottom: 16 }}>
                <div style={{
                  width: 56,
                  height: 56,
                  background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                  borderRadius: 14,
                  display: 'flex',
                  alignItems: 'center',
                  justifyContent: 'center',
                  fontSize: 28
                }}>
                  {CATEGORY_MAP[product.category]?.icon || '📦'}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>{product.name}</h3>
                  <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 4 }}>
                    {CATEGORY_MAP[product.category]?.name || product.category}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* 描述 */}
              {product.description && (
                <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 16, lineHeight: 1.5 }}>
                  {product.description.slice(0, 60)}{product.description.length > 60 ? '...' : ''}
                </p>
              )}
              
              {/* 统计数据 */}
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 16, marginBottom: 20, padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12 }}>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{product.viewCount || 0}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>浏览量</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{product.consultCount || 0}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>咨询量</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{product.leadCount || 0}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>客资数</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* 操作按钮 */}
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8 }}>
                <button onClick={() => openModal('detail', product)} style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  padding: '10px',
                  background: '#F5F5F5',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  详情
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => openModal('edit', product)} style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  padding: '10px',
                  background: '#FFF7ED',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  color: COLORS.primary,
                  cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  编辑
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => handleToggle(product)} style={{
                  flex: 1,
                  padding: '10px',
                  background: product.isActive ? '#FFF2F0' : '#F6FFED',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  color: product.isActive ? COLORS.danger : COLORS.success,
                  cursor: 'pointer'
                }}>
                  {product.isActive ? '下架' : '上架'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        {/* 分页 */}
        {total > 20 && (
          <div style={{
            display: 'flex',
            justifyContent: 'center',
            alignItems: 'center',
            gap: 16,
            marginTop: 32
          }}>
            <button
              disabled={page <= 1}
              onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}
              style={{
                padding: '8px 16px',
                background: page <= 1 ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                color: page <= 1 ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 6,
                cursor: page <= 1 ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
              }}
            >
              上一页
            </button>
            <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>第 {page} 页</span>
            <button
              disabled={page >= Math.ceil(total / 20)}
              onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}
              style={{
                padding: '8px 16px',
                background: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                color: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 6,
                cursor: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
              }}
            >
              下一页
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>
      
      {/* 弹窗 */}
      {showModal && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center',
          zIndex: 1000
        }} onClick={closeModal}>
          <div style={{
            width: 520,
            maxHeight: '80vh',
            background: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 32,
            overflow: 'auto'
          }} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              {modalType === 'create' && '➕ 新建产品'}
              {modalType === 'edit' && '✏️ 编辑产品'}
              {modalType === 'detail' && '📋 产品详情'}
            </h3>
            
            {(modalType === 'create' || modalType === 'edit') && (
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>产品名称 *</label>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={formData.name}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>分类</label>
                  <select
                    value={formData.category}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, category: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14 }}
                  >
                    <option value="credit">💳 信用贷</option>
                    <option value="mortgage">🏠 抵押贷</option>
                    <option value="business">🏢 经营贷</option>
                    <option value="bridge">🌉 过桥资金</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>产品描述</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={formData.description}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, description: e.target.value })}
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, minHeight: 80, resize: 'vertical', boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 16 }}>
                  <div>
                    <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>最低额度（万元）</label>
                    <input
                      type="number"
                      value={formData.minAmount}
                      onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, minAmount: e.target.value })}
                      style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>最高额度（万元）</label>
                    <input
                      type="number"
                      value={formData.maxAmount}
                      onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, maxAmount: e.target.value })}
                      style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 16 }}>
                  <div>
                    <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>最低利率</label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="如: 3.2%"
                      value={formData.minRate}
                      onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, minRate: e.target.value })}
                      style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>最高利率</label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="如: 6.0%"
                      value={formData.maxRate}
                      onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, maxRate: e.target.value })}
                      style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>产品特点（每行一个）</label>
                  <textarea
                    value={formData.features}
                    onChange={e => setFormData({ ...formData, features: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="无需抵押&#10;当天放款&#10;利率低"
                    style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, minHeight: 80, resize: 'vertical', boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                  />
                </div>
                <button onClick={handleSubmit} style={{
                  width: '100%',
                  padding: '14px',
                  background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  color: '#FFFFFF',
                  fontSize: 16,
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  marginTop: 8
                }}>
                  {modalType === 'create' ? '创建' : '保存'}
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {modalType === 'detail' && currentProduct && (
              <div>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 16, marginBottom: 24 }}>
                  <div style={{
                    width: 64,
                    height: 64,
                    background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                    borderRadius: 16,
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center',
                    fontSize: 32
                  }}>
                    {CATEGORY_MAP[currentProduct.category]?.icon || '📦'}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>{currentProduct.name}</h3>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 4 }}>
                      {CATEGORY_MAP[currentProduct.category]?.name}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {currentProduct.description && (
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12, marginBottom: 16 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginBottom: 8 }}>产品描述</div>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0, lineHeight: 1.6 }}>{currentProduct.description}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {currentProduct.features && currentProduct.features.length > 0 && (
                  <div style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginBottom: 12 }}>产品特点</div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 8 }}>
                      {currentProduct.features.map((f, i) => (
                        <span key={i} style={{
                          padding: '6px 14px',
                          background: '#FFF7ED',
                          color: COLORS.primary,
                          borderRadius: 6,
                          fontSize: 13
                        }}>
                          {f}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr 1fr', gap: 12 }}>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{currentProduct.viewCount || 0}</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginTop: 4 }}>浏览量</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{currentProduct.consultCount || 0}</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginTop: 4 }}>咨询量</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{currentProduct.leadCount || 0}</div>
                    <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginTop: 4 }}>客资数</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <button onClick={closeModal} style={{
                  width: '100%',
                  padding: '14px',
                  background: '#F5F5F5',
                  border: 'none',
                  borderRadius: 8,
                  color: COLORS.text,
                  fontSize: 16,
                  cursor: 'pointer',
                  marginTop: 24
                }}>
                  关闭
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/admin/app/distribution/page.tsx
  contents: "use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 股东管理
 * 功能：股东列表、详情、获客情况、分润排行榜
 */

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  bgDark: '#1A1A1A',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  textLight: '#999999',
  border: '#E5E5E5',
  success: '#52C41A',
  warning: '#FAAD14',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

const LEVEL_MAP: Record<string, { name: string; color: string; icon: string }> = {
  starter: { name: '创业包股东', icon: '🌱', color: '#52C41A' },
  platform: { name: '平台股东', icon: '⭐', color: '#FF9500' },
  branch: { name: '分公司股东', icon: '👑', color: '#722ED1' },
  capital: { name: '资金股东', icon: '💎', color: '#1890FF' }
};

interface Shareholder {
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  phone: string;
  level: string;
  referralCode: string;
  bindingCount: number;
  leadCount: number;
  totalEarnings: number;
  investment: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface RankingItem {
  rank: number;
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  phone: string;
  level: string;
  referralCode: string;
  totalCommission: number;
  leadCount: number;
}

interface ShareholderDetail {
  _id: string;
  name: string;
  phone: string;
  level: string;
  referralCode: string;
  investment: number;
  stats: {
    activeBindings: number;
    totalBindings: number;
    leadCount: number;
    earningsSettled: number;
    earningsPending: number;
  };
  bindings: Array<{
    userId: string;
    phone: string;
    nickname: string;
    bindingDate: string;
    expiryDate: string;
    status: string;
  }>;
  leads: Array<{
    _id: string;
    name: string;
    phone: string;
    productName: string;
    status: string;
    createdAt: string;
  }>;
  createdAt: string;
}

export default function DistributionPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);
  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'shareholders' | 'ranking'>('shareholders');
  
  // 股东列表
  const [shareholders, setShareholders] = useState<Shareholder[]>([]);
  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [levelFilter, setLevelFilter] = useState('');
  
  // 排行榜
  const [ranking, setRanking] = useState<RankingItem[]>([]);
  const [rankingDays, setRankingDays] = useState(30);
  
  // 详情弹窗
  const [showDetail, setShowDetail] = useState(false);
  const [currentShareholder, setCurrentShareholder] = useState<ShareholderDetail | null>(null);
  
  // 新建股东弹窗
  const [showCreate, setShowCreate] = useState(false);
  const [createForm, setCreateForm] = useState({
    name: '', phone: '', level: 'starter', investment: '', remark: ''
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_token');
    if (!token) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoggedIn(true);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isLoggedIn) {
      if (tab === 'shareholders') {
        fetchShareholders();
      } else {
        fetchRanking();
      }
    }
  }, [isLoggedIn, tab, page, levelFilter, rankingDays]);

  const fetchShareholders = async () => {
    try {
      let url = `${API_BASE}/api/admin/shareholders?page=${page}&pageSize=20`;
      if (levelFilter) url += `&level=${levelFilter}`;
      
      const res = await fetch(url);
      const data = await res.json();
      
      if (data.success) {
        setShareholders(data.data.list);
        setTotal(data.data.total);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取股东失败', e);
    }
  };

  const fetchRanking = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/shareholders/ranking?days=${rankingDays}&limit=20`);
      const data = await res.json();
      
      if (data.success) {
        setRanking(data.data.list);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取排行榜失败', e);
    }
  };

  const openDetail = async (shareholderId: string) => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/shareholders/${shareholderId}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      
      if (data.success) {
        setCurrentShareholder(data.data);
        setShowDetail(true);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取详情失败', e);
    }
  };

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!createForm.name || !createForm.phone) {
      alert('请填写姓名和手机号');
      return;
    }
    
    const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/shareholders`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        ...createForm,
        investment: createForm.investment ? parseFloat(createForm.investment) : 0
      })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    
    if (data.success) {
      alert(data.message || '创建成功');
      setShowCreate(false);
      setCreateForm({ name: '', phone: '', level: 'starter', investment: '', remark: '' });
      fetchShareholders();
    } else {
      alert(data.message || '创建失败');
    }
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_token');
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_user');
    router.push('/login');
  };

  if (!isLoggedIn) return null;

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bg, display: 'flex' }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: 240,
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.bgDark} 0%, #2D2D2D 100%)`,
        padding: '24px 0',
        position: 'fixed',
        height: '100vh',
        left: 0,
        top: 0
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '0 24px', marginBottom: 32 }}>
          <h1 style={{ color: COLORS.primary, fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, margin: 0 }}>银掌柜</h1>
          <p style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 12, marginTop: 4 }}>金融私域运营中台</p>
        </div>
        
        <nav>
          {[
            { name: '数据看板', icon: '📊', href: '/' },
            { name: '客资管理', icon: '👥', href: '/leads' },
            { name: '产品管理', icon: '📦', href: '/products' },
            { name: '股东管理', icon: '🏆', href: '/distribution', active: true },
            { name: '数据统计', icon: '📈', href: '/statistics' },
            { name: '系统设置', icon: '⚙️', href: '/settings' },
          ].map((item) => (
            <Link key={item.name} href={item.href} style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
              <div style={{
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 12,
                padding: '14px 24px',
                color: item.active ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
                background: item.active ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, transparent 100%)` : 'transparent',
                borderLeft: item.active ? `3px solid ${COLORS.primary}` : '3px solid transparent',
                cursor: 'pointer'
              }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icon}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.name}</span>
              </div>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>
        
        <div style={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, left: 0, right: 0, padding: '0 24px' }}>
          <button onClick={handleLogout} style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '12px 16px',
            background: 'rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.1)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: 8,
            color: '#FF4D4F',
            fontSize: 13,
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}>
            🚪 退出登录
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>
      
      {/* 主内容 */}
      <main style={{ flex: 1, marginLeft: 240, padding: 32 }}>
        {/* 标题栏 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 24 }}>
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>🏆 股东管理</h2>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 8 }}>共 {total} 位股东</p>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowCreate(true)} style={{
            padding: '10px 20px',
            background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
            border: 'none',
            borderRadius: 8,
            color: '#FFFFFF',
            fontSize: 14,
            fontWeight: 600,
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}>
            ➕ 新增股东
          </button>
        </div>
        
        {/* Tab 切换 */}
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginBottom: 24 }}>
          <button
            onClick={() => setTab('shareholders')}
            style={{
              padding: '12px 24px',
              background: tab === 'shareholders' ? COLORS.primary : '#FFFFFF',
              color: tab === 'shareholders' ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
              border: `1px solid ${tab === 'shareholders' ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              fontSize: 14,
              fontWeight: 600,
              cursor: 'pointer'
            }}
          >
            👥 股东列表
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setTab('ranking')}
            style={{
              padding: '12px 24px',
              background: tab === 'ranking' ? COLORS.primary : '#FFFFFF',
              color: tab === 'ranking' ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
              border: `1px solid ${tab === 'ranking' ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.border}`,
              borderRadius: 8,
              fontSize: 14,
              fontWeight: 600,
              cursor: 'pointer'
            }}
          >
            🏅 分润排行榜
          </button>
        </div>
        
        {/* 股东列表 */}
        {tab === 'shareholders' && (
          <>
            {/* 筛选 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              {[
                { key: '', name: '全部' },
                { key: 'starter', name: '🌱 创业包' },
                { key: 'platform', name: '⭐ 平台股东' },
                { key: 'branch', name: '👑 分公司' }
              ].map(lvl => (
                <button
                  key={lvl.key}
                  onClick={() => { setLevelFilter(lvl.key); setPage(1); }}
                  style={{
                    padding: '8px 16px',
                    background: levelFilter === lvl.key ? COLORS.primary : '#FFFFFF',
                    color: levelFilter === lvl.key ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
                    border: `1px solid ${levelFilter === lvl.key ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    fontSize: 13,
                    cursor: 'pointer'
                  }}
                >
                  {lvl.name}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            
            {/* 列表 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr))', gap: 20 }}>
              {shareholders.map((s) => (
                <div key={s._id} style={{
                  background: '#FFFFFF',
                  borderRadius: 16,
                  padding: 24,
                  position: 'relative'
                }}>
                  {/* 等级标签 */}
                  <div style={{
                    position: 'absolute',
                    top: 16,
                    right: 16,
                    padding: '4px 12px',
                    background: (LEVEL_MAP[s.level]?.color || COLORS.primary) + '15',
                    color: LEVEL_MAP[s.level]?.color || COLORS.primary,
                    borderRadius: 12,
                    fontSize: 12,
                    fontWeight: 500
                  }}>
                    {LEVEL_MAP[s.level]?.icon} {LEVEL_MAP[s.level]?.name || s.level}
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* 股东信息 */}
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 16, marginBottom: 16 }}>
                    <div style={{
                      width: 56,
                      height: 56,
                      background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                      borderRadius: 50,
                      display: 'flex',
                      alignItems: 'center',
                      justifyContent: 'center',
                      fontSize: 24,
                      color: '#FFFFFF',
                      fontWeight: 600
                    }}>
                      {s.name?.[0] || '?'}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>{s.name || '未知'}</h3>
                      <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 4 }}>{s.phone}</p>
                      <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.primary, marginTop: 2 }}>推荐码: {s.referralCode}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* 统计数据 */}
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginBottom: 20, padding: 16, background: '#FAFAFA', borderRadius: 12 }}>
                    <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{s.bindingCount}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: COLORS.textLight }}>绑定用户</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>{s.leadCount}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: COLORS.textLight }}>获客数</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ flex: 1, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.success }}>¥{s.totalEarnings}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: COLORS.textLight }}>总收益</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  {/* 操作 */}
                  <button onClick={() => openDetail(s._id)} style={{
                    width: '100%',
                    padding: '12px',
                    background: '#FFF7ED',
                    border: 'none',
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    color: COLORS.primary,
                    fontSize: 14,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    cursor: 'pointer'
                  }}>
                    📊 查看详情
                  </button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            
            {/* 分页 */}
            {total > 20 && (
              <div style={{
                display: 'flex',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 16,
                marginTop: 32
              }}>
                <button
                  disabled={page <= 1}
                  onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)}
                  style={{
                    padding: '8px 16px',
                    background: page <= 1 ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                    color: page <= 1 ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                    border: 'none',
                    borderRadius: 6,
                    cursor: page <= 1 ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
                  }}
                >
                  上一页
                </button>
                <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>第 {page} 页</span>
                <button
                  disabled={page >= Math.ceil(total / 20)}
                  onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)}
                  style={{
                    padding: '8px 16px',
                    background: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? '#F5F5F5' : COLORS.primary,
                    color: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? COLORS.textLight : '#FFFFFF',
                    border: 'none',
                    borderRadius: 6,
                    cursor: page >= Math.ceil(total / 20) ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer'
                  }}
                >
                  下一页
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </>
        )}
        
        {/* 分润排行榜 */}
        {tab === 'ranking' && (
          <>
            {/* 时间筛选 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              {[
                { key: 7, name: '近7天' },
                { key: 30, name: '近30天' },
                { key: 90, name: '近90天' }
              ].map(d => (
                <button
                  key={d.key}
                  onClick={() => setRankingDays(d.key)}
                  style={{
                    padding: '8px 16px',
                    background: rankingDays === d.key ? COLORS.primary : '#FFFFFF',
                    color: rankingDays === d.key ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
                    border: `1px solid ${rankingDays === d.key ? COLORS.primary : COLORS.border}`,
                    borderRadius: 8,
                    fontSize: 13,
                    cursor: 'pointer'
                  }}
                >
                  {d.name}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            
            <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
              <div style={{ padding: '16px 24px', background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`, color: '#FFFFFF' }}>
                <h3 style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700 }}>🏅 分润排行榜（{rankingDays}天绑定机制）</h3>
                <p style={{ margin: '8px 0 0', fontSize: 13, opacity: 0.9 }}>基于30天绑定关系的分润统计</p>
              </div>
              
              {ranking.length === 0 ? (
                <div style={{ padding: 60, textAlign: 'center', color: COLORS.textLight }}>
                  暂无数据
                </div>
              ) : (
                <table style={{ width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' }}>
                  <thead>
                    <tr style={{ background: '#FAFAFA' }}>
                      <th style={{ padding: '14px 20px', textAlign: 'center', fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 500, width: 60 }}>排名</th>
                      <th style={{ padding: '14px 20px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 500 }}>股东</th>
                      <th style={{ padding: '14px 20px', textAlign: 'center', fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 500 }}>等级</th>
                      <th style={{ padding: '14px 20px', textAlign: 'center', fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 500 }}>获客数</th>
                      <th style={{ padding: '14px 20px', textAlign: 'right', fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 500 }}>分润金额</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {ranking.map((item) => (
                      <tr key={item._id} style={{ borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
                        <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                          {item.rank <= 3 ? (
                            <span style={{
                              display: 'inline-block',
                              width: 32,
                              height: 32,
                              lineHeight: '32px',
                              background: item.rank === 1 ? '#FFD700' : item.rank === 2 ? '#C0C0C0' : '#CD7F32',
                              borderRadius: 50,
                              color: '#FFFFFF',
                              fontWeight: 700,
                              fontSize: 14
                            }}>
                              {item.rank}
                            </span>
                          ) : (
                            <span style={{ color: COLORS.textSecondary, fontWeight: 600 }}>{item.rank}</span>
                          )}
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px' }}>
                          <div style={{ fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>{item.name || '未知'}</div>
                          <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight, marginTop: 2 }}>{item.phone}</div>
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                          <span style={{
                            padding: '4px 10px',
                            background: (LEVEL_MAP[item.level]?.color || COLORS.primary) + '15',
                            color: LEVEL_MAP[item.level]?.color || COLORS.primary,
                            borderRadius: 10,
                            fontSize: 12
                          }}>
                            {LEVEL_MAP[item.level]?.icon} {LEVEL_MAP[item.level]?.name || item.level}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'center', fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text }}>
                          {item.leadCount}
                        </td>
                        <td style={{ padding: '16px 20px', textAlign: 'right' }}>
                          <span style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary }}>¥{item.totalCommission}</span>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              )}
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </main>
      
      {/* 股东详情弹窗 */}
      {showDetail && currentShareholder && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center',
          zIndex: 1000
        }} onClick={() => setShowDetail(false)}>
          <div style={{
            width: 680,
            maxHeight: '85vh',
            background: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            overflow: 'hidden'
          }} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            {/* 顶部信息 */}
            <div style={{
              padding: 24,
              background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
              color: '#FFFFFF'
            }}>
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 16 }}>
                <div style={{
                  width: 64,
                  height: 64,
                  background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)',
                  borderRadius: 50,
                  display: 'flex',
                  alignItems: 'center',
                  justifyContent: 'center',
                  fontSize: 28,
                  fontWeight: 600
                }}>
                  {currentShareholder.name?.[0] || '?'}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h3 style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700 }}>{currentShareholder.name}</h3>
                  <p style={{ margin: '4px 0 0', fontSize: 14, opacity: 0.9 }}>{currentShareholder.phone}</p>
                  <p style={{ margin: '4px 0 0', fontSize: 13, opacity: 0.8 }}>
                    {LEVEL_MAP[currentShareholder.level]?.icon} {LEVEL_MAP[currentShareholder.level]?.name} | 推荐码: {currentShareholder.referralCode}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* 数据统计 */}
              <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 16, marginTop: 20 }}>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, padding: 16, background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700 }}>{currentShareholder.stats.activeBindings}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.8 }}>活跃绑定</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, padding: 16, background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700 }}>{currentShareholder.stats.leadCount}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.8 }}>获客总数</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, padding: 16, background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700 }}>¥{currentShareholder.stats.earningsSettled}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.8 }}>已结算</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, padding: 16, background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)', borderRadius: 12, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700 }}>¥{currentShareholder.stats.earningsPending}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.8 }}>待结算</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* 详细数据 */}
            <div style={{ padding: 24, maxHeight: 400, overflow: 'auto' }}>
              {/* 绑定用户 */}
              <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
                <h4 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 12px' }}>
                  🔗 绑定用户（{currentShareholder.bindings.length}人）
                </h4>
                {currentShareholder.bindings.length === 0 ? (
                  <p style={{ color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 14 }}>暂无绑定用户</p>
                ) : (
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 8 }}>
                    {currentShareholder.bindings.slice(0, 10).map((b, i) => (
                      <div key={i} style={{
                        padding: '8px 12px',
                        background: b.status === 'active' ? '#F6FFED' : '#F5F5F5',
                        borderRadius: 8,
                        fontSize: 13
                      }}>
                        <span style={{ color: COLORS.text }}>{b.phone}</span>
                        <span style={{
                          marginLeft: 8,
                          color: b.status === 'active' ? COLORS.success : COLORS.textLight,
                          fontSize: 11
                        }}>
                          {b.status === 'active' ? '活跃' : '已过期'}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                    {currentShareholder.bindings.length > 10 && (
                      <span style={{ padding: '8px 12px', color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 13 }}>
                        +{currentShareholder.bindings.length - 10} 更多
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              
              {/* 获客记录 */}
              <div>
                <h4 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 12px' }}>
                  👥 获客记录（{currentShareholder.leads.length}条）
                </h4>
                {currentShareholder.leads.length === 0 ? (
                  <p style={{ color: COLORS.textLight, fontSize: 14 }}>暂无获客记录</p>
                ) : (
                  <table style={{ width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' }}>
                    <thead>
                      <tr style={{ background: '#FAFAFA' }}>
                        <th style={{ padding: '10px 12px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>客户</th>
                        <th style={{ padding: '10px 12px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>手机号</th>
                        <th style={{ padding: '10px 12px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>产品</th>
                        <th style={{ padding: '10px 12px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>状态</th>
                        <th style={{ padding: '10px 12px', textAlign: 'left', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textSecondary }}>时间</th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {currentShareholder.leads.slice(0, 10).map((lead) => (
                        <tr key={lead._id} style={{ borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
                          <td style={{ padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: 13 }}>{lead.name || '-'}</td>
                          <td style={{ padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: 13 }}>{lead.phone}</td>
                          <td style={{ padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: 13 }}>{lead.productName || '-'}</td>
                          <td style={{ padding: '10px 12px' }}>
                            <span style={{
                              padding: '2px 8px',
                              background: lead.status === 'converted' ? COLORS.success + '15' : COLORS.primary + '15',
                              color: lead.status === 'converted' ? COLORS.success : COLORS.primary,
                              borderRadius: 4,
                              fontSize: 11
                            }}>
                              {lead.status === 'converted' ? '已成交' : lead.status === 'following' ? '跟进中' : '新客资'}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          <td style={{ padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>
                            {new Date(lead.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('zh-CN')}
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style={{ padding: '16px 24px', borderTop: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` }}>
              <button onClick={() => setShowDetail(false)} style={{
                width: '100%',
                padding: '12px',
                background: '#F5F5F5',
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 8,
                color: COLORS.text,
                fontSize: 14,
                cursor: 'pointer'
              }}>
                关闭
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      
      {/* 新建股东弹窗 */}
      {showCreate && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          top: 0,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
          bottom: 0,
          background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center',
          zIndex: 1000
        }} onClick={() => setShowCreate(false)}>
          <div style={{
            width: 440,
            background: '#FFFFFF',
            borderRadius: 16,
            padding: 32
          }} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              ➕ 新增股东
            </h3>
            
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 16 }}>
              <div>
                <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>姓名 *</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={createForm.name}
                  onChange={e => setCreateForm({ ...createForm, name: e.target.value })}
                  style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>手机号 *</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={createForm.phone}
                  onChange={e => setCreateForm({ ...createForm, phone: e.target.value })}
                  style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>股东等级</label>
                <select
                  value={createForm.level}
                  onChange={e => setCreateForm({ ...createForm, level: e.target.value })}
                  style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14 }}
                >
                  <option value="starter">🌱 创业包股东（6,980元）</option>
                  <option value="platform">⭐ 平台股东（19,800元）</option>
                  <option value="branch">👑 分公司股东（98,000元）</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>投资金额（元）</label>
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={createForm.investment}
                  onChange={e => setCreateForm({ ...createForm, investment: e.target.value })}
                  style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label style={{ display: 'block', fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginBottom: 8 }}>备注</label>
                <textarea
                  value={createForm.remark}
                  onChange={e => setCreateForm({ ...createForm, remark: e.target.value })}
                  style={{ width: '100%', padding: '12px 16px', border: `1px solid ${COLORS.border}`, borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 14, minHeight: 60, resize: 'vertical', boxSizing: 'border-box' }}
                />
              </div>
              <button onClick={handleCreate} style={{
                width: '100%',
                padding: '14px',
                background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                border: 'none',
                borderRadius: 8,
                color: '#FFFFFF',
                fontSize: 16,
                fontWeight: 600,
                cursor: 'pointer',
                marginTop: 8
              }}>
                创建股东
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

/**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 数据统计
 * 真实数据展示
 */

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:8100';

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF9500',
  primaryLight: '#FFB347',
  bg: '#F5F5F5',
  bgDark: '#1A1A1A',
  text: '#333333',
  textSecondary: '#666666',
  textLight: '#999999',
  border: '#E5E5E5',
  success: '#52C41A',
  warning: '#FAAD14',
  danger: '#FF4D4F'
};

interface DashboardData {
  overview: {
    totalLeads: number;
    todayLeads: number;
    monthLeads: number;
    conversionRate: number;
    shareholders: number;
    activeBindings: number;
  };
  leadsTrend: Array<{ date: string; count: number }>;
  sourceDistribution: Array<{ source: string; count: number }>;
  productStats: Array<{ name: string; count: number }>;
  cityStats: Array<{ city: string; count: number }>;
}

export default function StatisticsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);
  const [data, setData] = useState<DashboardData | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('yzg_admin_token');
    if (!token) {
      router.push('/login');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoggedIn(true);
    fetchData();
  }, []);

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/admin/statistics/dashboard`);
      const result = await res.json();
      
      if (result.success) {
        setData(result.data);
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('获取统计数据失败', e);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const handleLogout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_token');
    localStorage.removeItem('yzg_admin_user');
    router.push('/login');
  };

  if (!isLoggedIn) return null;

  const maxTrend = data?.leadsTrend ? Math.max(...data.leadsTrend.map(t => t.count), 1) : 1;
  const maxSource = data?.sourceDistribution ? Math.max(...data.sourceDistribution.map(s => s.count), 1) : 1;
  const maxProduct = data?.productStats ? Math.max(...data.productStats.map(p => p.count), 1) : 1;

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: COLORS.bg, display: 'flex' }}>
      {/* 侧边栏 */}
      <aside style={{
        width: 240,
        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.bgDark} 0%, #2D2D2D 100%)`,
        padding: '24px 0',
        position: 'fixed',
        height: '100vh',
        left: 0,
        top: 0
      }}>
        <div style={{ padding: '0 24px', marginBottom: 32 }}>
          <h1 style={{ color: COLORS.primary, fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 700, margin: 0 }}>银掌柜</h1>
          <p style={{ color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)', fontSize: 12, marginTop: 4 }}>金融私域运营中台</p>
        </div>
        
        <nav>
          {[
            { name: '数据看板', icon: '📊', href: '/' },
            { name: '客资管理', icon: '👥', href: '/leads' },
            { name: '产品管理', icon: '📦', href: '/products' },
            { name: '股东管理', icon: '🏆', href: '/distribution' },
            { name: '数据统计', icon: '📈', href: '/statistics', active: true },
            { name: '系统设置', icon: '⚙️', href: '/settings' },
          ].map((item) => (
            <Link key={item.name} href={item.href} style={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
              <div style={{
                display: 'flex',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 12,
                padding: '14px 24px',
                color: item.active ? '#FFFFFF' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)',
                background: item.active ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, transparent 100%)` : 'transparent',
                borderLeft: item.active ? `3px solid ${COLORS.primary}` : '3px solid transparent',
                cursor: 'pointer'
              }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 18 }}>{item.icon}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 14 }}>{item.name}</span>
              </div>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>
        
        <div style={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, left: 0, right: 0, padding: '0 24px' }}>
          <button onClick={handleLogout} style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '12px 16px',
            background: 'rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.1)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.2)',
            borderRadius: 8,
            color: '#FF4D4F',
            fontSize: 13,
            cursor: 'pointer'
          }}>
            🚪 退出登录
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>
      
      {/* 主内容 */}
      <main style={{ flex: 1, marginLeft: 240, padding: 32 }}>
        <div style={{ marginBottom: 24 }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, margin: 0 }}>📈 数据统计</h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: COLORS.textSecondary, marginTop: 8 }}>实时数据分析</p>
        </div>
        
        {loading ? (
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: 60, color: COLORS.textLight }}>加载中...</div>
        ) : data ? (
          <>
            {/* 概览卡片 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(6, 1fr)', gap: 16, marginBottom: 24 }}>
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 12, padding: 20 }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>总客资</div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 8 }}>{data.overview.totalLeads}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 12, padding: 20 }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>今日新增</div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary, marginTop: 8 }}>{data.overview.todayLeads}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 12, padding: 20 }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>本月新增</div>

              </div>
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 12, padding: 20 }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>股东数</div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 8 }}>{data.overview.shareholders}</div>
