                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: COLORS.textLight }}>活跃绑定</div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 700, color: COLORS.primary, marginTop: 8 }}>{data.overview.activeBindings}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* 图表区域 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 1fr', gap: 24 }}>
              {/* 客资趋势 */}
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 20px' }}>📊 近7天客资趋势</h3>
                
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-end', gap: 8, height: 200 }}>
                  {data.leadsTrend.map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i} style={{ flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                      <div style={{
                        width: '100%',
                        height: (item.count / maxTrend) * 160,
                        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                        borderRadius: 8,
                        minHeight: 4
                      }} />
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, marginTop: 8 }}>{item.count}</div>
                      <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: COLORS.textLight, marginTop: 4 }}>
                        {item.date.slice(5)}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* 来源分布 */}
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 20px' }}>🎯 来源分布</h3>
                
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 12 }}>
                  {data.sourceDistribution.slice(0, 6).map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i}>
                      <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 6 }}>
                        <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.text }}>{item.source}</span>
                        <span style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.primary }}>{item.count}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ height: 8, background: '#F5F5F5', borderRadius: 4, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
                        <div style={{
                          width: `${(item.count / maxSource) * 100}%`,
                          height: '100%',
                          background: `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)`,
                          borderRadius: 4
                        }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* 产品和城市统计 */}
            <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr', gap: 24, marginTop: 24 }}>
              {/* 产品热度 */}
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 20px' }}>🔥 产品热度 TOP10</h3>
                
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 12 }}>
                  {data.productStats.slice(0, 10).map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i} style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 12 }}>
                      <div style={{
                        width: 28,
                        height: 28,
                        background: i < 3 ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)` : '#F5F5F5',
                        color: i < 3 ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.textSecondary,
                        borderRadius: 6,
                        display: 'flex',
                        alignItems: 'center',
                        justifyContent: 'center',
                        fontSize: 12,
                        fontWeight: 600
                      }}>
                        {i + 1}
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', marginBottom: 4 }}>
                          <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: COLORS.text }}>{item.name}</span>
                          <span style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.primary }}>{item.count}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{ height: 6, background: '#F5F5F5', borderRadius: 3, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
                          <div style={{
                            width: `${(item.count / maxProduct) * 100}%`,
                            height: '100%',
                            background: i < 3 ? `linear-gradient(90deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)` : '#D9D9D9',
                            borderRadius: 3
                          }} />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* 城市分布 */}
              <div style={{ background: '#FFFFFF', borderRadius: 16, padding: 24 }}>
                <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: COLORS.text, margin: '0 0 20px' }}>📍 城市分布 TOP10</h3>
                
                {data.cityStats.length === 0 ? (
                  <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: 40, color: COLORS.textLight }}>暂无数据</div>
                ) : (
                  <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 12 }}>
                    {data.cityStats.slice(0, 10).map((item, i) => (
                      <div key={i} style={{
                        padding: '12px 16px',
                        background: i === 0 ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${COLORS.primary} 0%, ${COLORS.primaryLight} 100%)` : '#F5F5F5',
                        color: i === 0 ? '#FFFFFF' : COLORS.text,
                        borderRadius: 12,
                        textAlign: 'center'
                      }}>
                        <div style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600 }}>{item.city}</div>
                        <div style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginTop: 4 }}>{item.count}</div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : (
          <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: 60, color: COLORS.textLight }}>暂无数据</div>
        )}
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

**总结** | 全部完成

## 已完成的工作

### 1. 后端API完善

**客资管理 API**
- `GET /api/admin/leads/{id}` - 获取客资详情
- `PUT /api/admin/leads/{id}` - 更新客资
- `DELETE /api/admin/leads/{id}` - 删除客资
- `POST /api/admin/leads/import` - 批量导入
- `POST /api/admin/leads/clean` - 数据清洗
- `POST /api/admin/leads/{id}/follow` - 添加跟进记录

**产品管理 API**
- `GET /api/admin/products` - 获取所有产品（含下架）
- `GET /api/admin/products/{id}` - 产品详情
- `PUT /api/admin/products/{id}` - 更新产品
- `DELETE /api/admin/products/{id}` - 删除产品
- `POST /api/admin/products/{id}/toggle` - 上架/下架

**股东管理 API**
- `GET /api/admin/shareholders` - 股东列表
- `GET /api/admin/shareholders/{id}` - 股东详情（含绑定用户、获客记录）
- `POST /api/admin/shareholders` - 创建股东
- `GET /api/admin/shareholders/ranking` - 分润排行榜

**数据统计 API**
- `GET /api/admin/statistics/dashboard` - 完整仪表盘数据

### 2. 管理后台页面完善

| 页面 | 功能 |
|:---|:---|
| 客资管理 | 列表、新建、编辑、详情、导入、清洗、删除、搜索筛选 |
| 产品管理 | 列表、新建、编辑、详情、上架/下架、分类筛选 |
| 股东管理 | 列表、新建、详情（绑定用户+获客记录）、分润排行榜 |
| 数据统计 | 概览、趋势图、来源分布、产品热度、城市分布 |

REMOTE_PATH="/www/wwwroot/${PROJECT_NAME}"
API_PORT="3080"
ADMIN_PORT="3081"

pm2 stop yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
pm2 delete yzg-api 2>/dev/null || true
pm2 delete yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true

fuser -k ${ADMIN_PORT}/tcp 2>/dev/null || true

source venv/bin/activate
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart

rm -rf app components lib public .next *.json *.js *.ts *.mjs 2>/dev/null || true

npm install --production 2>/dev/null || pnpm install --production 2>/dev/null || true
npm run build 2>/dev/null || pnpm run build 2>/dev/null || true

REMOTE_SCRIPT

PROJECT_NAME="yinzhangui"
REMOTE_PATH="/www/wwwroot/${PROJECT_NAME}"
API_PORT="3080"

#!/bin/bash
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
source venv/bin/activate
export MONGODB_URL="mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin"
export DATABASE_NAME="yinzhangui"
exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080
EOF
chmod +x ${REMOTE_PATH}/start_api.sh

# 创建管理后台启动脚本
cat > ${REMOTE_PATH}/start_admin.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
export NODE_ENV=production
export PORT=3081
exec npm start
EOF
chmod +x ${REMOTE_PATH}/start_admin.sh

# 修改admin的package.json端口
cd ${REMOTE_PATH}/admin
if [ -f package.json ]; then
    sed -i 's/"start": "next start"/"start": "next start -p 3081"/g' package.json
fi

echo "启动脚本创建完成"
REMOTE_SCRIPT

echo -e "${GREEN}  ✅ 启动脚本创建完成${NC}"

# ========== 5. 启动服务 ==========

REMOTE_PATH="/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui"

# PM2启动API
cd ${REMOTE_PATH}/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api --cwd ${REMOTE_PATH}/api

# PM2启动管理后台
cd ${REMOTE_PATH}/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

pm2 save

echo "服务启动完成"
pm2 list
REMOTE_SCRIPT

echo -e "${GREEN}  ✅ 服务启动完成${NC}"

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/deploy/nginx.conf
  contents: # 银掌柜金融 - Nginx配置
# 域名：yzg.quwanzhi.com
#
# 部署方式：在宝塔面板新建网站，选择反向代理
# 或者直接复制此配置到 /www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/

server {
    listen 80;
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    # SSL证书（宝塔自动申请）
    ssl_certificate /www/server/panel/vhost/cert/yzg.quwanzhi.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /www/server/panel/vhost/cert/yzg.quwanzhi.com/privkey.pem;
    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    ssl_ciphers ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5:!RC4:!DHE;
    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;
    ssl_session_cache shared:SSL:10m;
    ssl_session_timeout 10m;
    
    # 强制HTTPS
    if ($server_port !~ 443){
        rewrite ^(/.*)$ https://$host$1 permanent;
    }
    
    # 管理后台（默认）
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header REMOTE-HOST $remote_addr;
        
        # WebSocket支持
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
        
        # 超时设置
        proxy_connect_timeout 60s;
        proxy_send_timeout 60s;
        proxy_read_timeout 60s;
    }
    
    # API接口（/api开头）
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        
        # CORS
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'DNT,X-Mx-ReqToken,Keep-Alive,User-Agent,X-Requested-With,If-Modified-Since,Cache-Control,Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') {
            return 204;
        }
    }
    
    # 健康检查
    location /health {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080/health;
    }
    
    # 静态文件缓存
    location ~* \.(js|css|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$ {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        expires 30d;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
    }
    
    # 日志
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/scripts/miniprogram_upload.js
  contents: /**
 * 银掌柜金融 - 小程序自动上传脚本
 * 
 * 使用 miniprogram-ci 实现自动上传
 * 
 * 前置准备：
 * 1. 在微信公众平台下载"代码上传密钥"
 * 2. 将密钥保存为 private.key
 * 3. 配置 IP 白名单（或关闭）
 * 
 * 使用方法：
 *   node miniprogram_upload.js --appid=你的APPID --version=1.0.0 --desc="版本说明"
 */

const ci = require('miniprogram-ci');
const path = require('path');
const fs = require('fs');

// 配置
const CONFIG = {
  // 项目路径
  projectPath: path.resolve(__dirname, '../miniprogram'),
  // 私钥路径（需要从微信公众平台下载）
  privateKeyPath: path.resolve(__dirname, '../private.key'),
  // API基础地址
  apiBaseUrl: 'https://yzg.quwanzhi.com'
};

// 解析命令行参数
function parseArgs() {
  const args = {};
  process.argv.slice(2).forEach(arg => {
    const [key, value] = arg.replace('--', '').split('=');
    args[key] = value;
  });
  return args;
}

// 更新小程序配置
async function updateConfig(appid, apiBaseUrl) {
  // 更新 project.config.json
  const projectConfigPath = path.join(CONFIG.projectPath, 'project.config.json');
  const projectConfig = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(projectConfigPath, 'utf-8'));
  projectConfig.appid = appid;
  fs.writeFileSync(projectConfigPath, JSON.stringify(projectConfig, null, 2));
  
  // 更新 app.js 中的 API 地址
  const appJsPath = path.join(CONFIG.projectPath, 'app.js');
  let appJs = fs.readFileSync(appJsPath, 'utf-8');
  appJs = appJs.replace(
    /const API_BASE = ['"].*?['"]/g,
    `const API_BASE = '${apiBaseUrl}'`
  );
  fs.writeFileSync(appJsPath, appJs);
  
  // 更新各页面的 API_BASE
  const pagesDir = path.join(CONFIG.projectPath, 'pages');
  const updatePageApiBase = (dir) => {
    const files = fs.readdirSync(dir);
    files.forEach(file => {
      const filePath = path.join(dir, file);
      const stat = fs.statSync(filePath);
      if (stat.isDirectory()) {
        updatePageApiBase(filePath);
      } else if (file.endsWith('.js')) {
        let content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
        if (content.includes('API_BASE')) {
          content = content.replace(
            /const API_BASE = ['"].*?['"]/g,
            `const API_BASE = '${apiBaseUrl}'`
          );
          fs.writeFileSync(filePath, content);
        }
      }
    });
  };
  updatePageApiBase(pagesDir);
  
  console.log('✅ 配置已更新');
}

// 上传小程序
async function upload(appid, version, desc) {
  console.log('');
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('    银掌柜金融 - 小程序上传');
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('');
  console.log(`AppID: ${appid}`);
  console.log(`版本: ${version}`);
  console.log(`说明: ${desc}`);
  console.log('');
  
  // 检查私钥
  if (!fs.existsSync(CONFIG.privateKeyPath)) {
    console.error('❌ 错误：未找到私钥文件');
    console.log('');
    console.log('请按以下步骤获取私钥：');
    console.log('1. 登录微信公众平台 (mp.weixin.qq.com)');
    console.log('2. 进入"开发" -> "开发设置"');
    console.log('3. 点击"代码上传密钥"下载');
    console.log('4. 将文件保存为: ' + CONFIG.privateKeyPath);
    console.log('');
    process.exit(1);
  }
  
  // 更新配置
  await updateConfig(appid, CONFIG.apiBaseUrl);
  
  try {
    // 创建项目实例
    const project = new ci.Project({
      appid: appid,
      type: 'miniProgram',
      projectPath: CONFIG.projectPath,
      privateKeyPath: CONFIG.privateKeyPath,
      ignores: ['node_modules/**/*']
    });
    
    console.log('📦 正在上传...');
    
    // 上传代码
    const uploadResult = await ci.upload({
      project,
      version: version,
      desc: desc,
      setting: {
        es6: true,
        es7: true,
        minify: true,
        codeProtect: false,
        autoPrefixWXSS: true
      },
      onProgressUpdate: (progress) => {
        console.log(`进度: ${progress._msg || progress.message || '上传中...'}`);
      }
    });
    
    console.log('');
    console.log('✅ 上传成功！');
    console.log('');
    console.log('下一步：');
    console.log('1. 登录微信公众平台');
    console.log('2. 进入"版本管理"');
    console.log('3. 将开发版本提交审核');
    console.log('');
    
    return uploadResult;
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ 上传失败:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

// 预览小程序（生成二维码）
async function preview(appid) {
  console.log('');
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('    银掌柜金融 - 小程序预览');
  console.log('========================================');
  console.log('');
  
  // 检查私钥
  if (!fs.existsSync(CONFIG.privateKeyPath)) {
    console.error('❌ 错误：未找到私钥文件');
    process.exit(1);
  }
  
  // 更新配置
  await updateConfig(appid, CONFIG.apiBaseUrl);
  
  try {
    const project = new ci.Project({
      appid: appid,
      type: 'miniProgram',
      projectPath: CONFIG.projectPath,
      privateKeyPath: CONFIG.privateKeyPath
    });
    
    console.log('🔍 正在生成预览...');
    
    const previewResult = await ci.preview({
      project,
      desc: '银掌柜金融小程序预览',
      setting: {
        es6: true,
        minify: true
      },
      qrcodeFormat: 'image',
      qrcodeOutputDest: path.resolve(__dirname, '../preview_qrcode.png'),
      onProgressUpdate: console.log
    });
    
    console.log('');
    console.log('✅ 预览二维码已生成！');
    console.log(`📱 扫描文件: ${path.resolve(__dirname, '../preview_qrcode.png')}`);
    console.log('');
    
    return previewResult;
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ 预览失败:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

// 主函数
async function main() {
  const args = parseArgs();
  const action = args.action || 'upload';
  const appid = args.appid || '';
  const version = args.version || '1.0.0';
  const desc = args.desc || `银掌柜金融 v${version}`;
  
  if (!appid) {
    console.log('');
    console.log('银掌柜金融 - 小程序上传工具');
    console.log('');
    console.log('使用方法：');
    console.log('  上传: node miniprogram_upload.js --appid=你的APPID --version=1.0.0 --desc="版本说明"');
    console.log('  预览: node miniprogram_upload.js --action=preview --appid=你的APPID');
    console.log('');
    console.log('参数说明：');
    console.log('  --action    操作类型: upload(上传) 或 preview(预览)');
    console.log('  --appid     小程序AppID (必填)');
    console.log('  --version   版本号 (默认: 1.0.0)');
    console.log('  --desc      版本说明');
    console.log('');
    console.log('前置准备：');
    console.log('1. 在微信公众平台注册小程序，获取 AppID');
    console.log('2. 在"开发设置"下载代码上传密钥，保存为 private.key');
    console.log('3. 配置 IP 白名单或关闭');
    console.log('');
    process.exit(0);
  }
  
  if (action === 'preview') {
    await preview(appid);
  } else {
    await upload(appid, version, desc);
  }
}

main().catch(console.error);

## 部署架构

```
                          ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
                          │         yzg.quwanzhi.com                │
                          │         (Nginx 反向代理)                 │
                          └─────────────┬───────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                     ┌──────────────────┼──────────────────┐
                     │                  │                  │
                     ▼                  ▼                  ▼
              ┌─────────────┐   ┌─────────────┐   ┌─────────────┐
              │ 管理后台     │   │  API服务    │   │  小程序      │
              │ Next.js     │   │  FastAPI    │   │  微信平台    │
              │ :3081       │   │  :3080      │   │             │
              └─────────────┘   └─────────────┘   └─────────────┘
                     │                  │
                     └──────────────────┴───────────────────┐
                                                           │
                                                    ┌──────▼──────┐
                                                    │  MongoDB    │
                                                    │  yinzhangui │
                                                    └─────────────┘
```

## 服务器信息

| 项目 | 信息 |
|:---|:---|
| 服务器 | 小型宝塔 42.194.232.22 |
| 域名 | yzg.quwanzhi.com |
| API端口 | 3080 |
| 管理后台端口 | 3081 |

## 一、快速部署

### 1. 执行部署脚本

```bash
cd /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/deploy
chmod +x deploy.sh
./deploy.sh
```

### 2. 配置域名（宝塔面板）

1. 登录宝塔面板：https://42.194.232.22:9988/ckbpanel
2. 【网站】→【添加站点】
3. 域名：`yzg.quwanzhi.com`
4. PHP版本：纯静态
5. 创建后，点击【设置】→【反向代理】
6. 添加反向代理：
   - 目标URL：`http://127.0.0.1:3081`
   - 发送域名：`$host`
7. 配置SSL证书：【SSL】→【Let's Encrypt】→ 申请

### 3. 配置DNS解析

在域名服务商（如阿里云/腾讯云）添加解析：

| 类型 | 主机记录 | 记录值 |
|:---|:---|:---|
| A | yzg | 42.194.232.22 |

### 4. 高级Nginx配置

如需自定义配置，可将 `nginx.conf` 内容复制到宝塔：

```bash
# 查看当前配置
cat /www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf

# 编辑配置
vim /www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf

# 重载Nginx
nginx -s reload
```

## 二、小程序上传

### 前置准备

1. **注册小程序**
   - 访问 [微信公众平台](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/)
   - 选择"小程序"注册
   - 完成企业认证（或个人认证）
   - 获取 AppID

2. **下载代码上传密钥**
   - 登录微信公众平台
   - 进入【开发】→【开发设置】
   - 点击【代码上传密钥】下载
   - 保存为 `private.key`

3. **配置IP白名单**（可选）
   - 如果在本地上传，需添加本机IP
   - 或者关闭IP白名单限制

### 安装依赖

```bash
cd /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/scripts
npm install
```

### 上传小程序

```bash
# 上传
node miniprogram_upload.js --appid=你的APPID --version=1.0.0 --desc="银掌柜金融 v1.0.0"

# 预览（生成二维码）
node miniprogram_upload.js --action=preview --appid=你的APPID
```

### 提交审核

1. 登录微信公众平台
2. 进入【版本管理】
3. 在"开发版本"找到刚上传的版本
4. 点击【提交审核】
5. 填写审核信息，等待审核通过

## 三、替代方案：微信开发者工具

如果 miniprogram-ci 不便使用，可以用微信开发者工具手动上传：

1. 下载[微信开发者工具](https://developers.weixin.qq.com/miniprogram/dev/devtools/download.html)
2. 打开项目：`/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram`
3. 填写 AppID
4. 点击【上传】按钮
5. 填写版本号和备注

## 四、体验版配置

上传后，可以先配置体验版给团队测试：

1. 登录微信公众平台
2. 【版本管理】→ 开发版本 → 【设为体验版】
3. 【成员管理】→ 添加体验成员
4. 体验成员扫描体验版二维码即可测试

## 五、常用命令

```bash
# 查看服务状态
ssh root@42.194.232.22 "pm2 list"

# 查看API日志
ssh root@42.194.232.22 "pm2 logs yzg-api"

# 查看管理后台日志
ssh root@42.194.232.22 "pm2 logs yzg-admin"

# 重启服务
ssh root@42.194.232.22 "pm2 restart yzg-api yzg-admin"

# 检查端口
ssh root@42.194.232.22 "ss -tlnp | grep -E '3080|3081'"

# 测试API
curl http://42.194.232.22:3080/health
```

## 已完成

### 1. 部署脚本和配置
- ✅ 创建部署脚本 `deploy/deploy.sh`
- ✅ 创建Nginx配置 `deploy/nginx.conf`
- ✅ 创建部署文档 `deploy/README.md`

### 2. 小程序上传方案
- ✅ 创建 miniprogram-ci 上传脚本 `scripts/miniprogram_upload.js`
- ✅ 更新小程序API地址为 `https://yzg.quwanzhi.com`

### 3. 项目打包
- ✅ 已打包：`/tmp/yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz`（12MB）

## 需要手动完成

SSH连接服务器被拒绝，需要通过**宝塔面板**手动部署：

### 步骤1：上传文件到服务器

1. 登录宝塔面板：https://42.194.232.22:9988/ckbpanel
2. 【文件】→ 进入 `/www/wwwroot/`
3. 创建文件夹 `yinzhangui`
4. 上传 `/tmp/yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz` 到该目录
5. 右键解压

### 步骤2：部署API（Python）

在宝塔【终端】执行：
```bash
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart
```

### 步骤3：部署管理后台（Node.js）

```bash
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install
npm run build
```

### 步骤4：配置PM2启动

```bash
# API
pm2 start "cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api

# 管理后台
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start
pm2 save
```

### 步骤5：配置域名

1. 【网站】→【添加站点】
2. 域名：`yzg.quwanzhi.com`
3. 【设置】→【反向代理】→ 目标URL：`http://127.0.0.1:3081`
4. 【SSL】→ 申请Let's Encrypt证书

### 步骤6：配置DNS

在域名服务商添加A记录：
- 主机记录：`yzg`
- 记录值：`42.194.232.22`

## 小程序上传

### 方式1：miniprogram-ci（推荐）

```bash
cd /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/scripts
npm install

# 先在微信公众平台下载private.key保存到项目根目录

# 上传
node miniprogram_upload.js --appid=你的APPID --version=1.0.0 --desc="银掌柜金融v1.0.0"
```

### 方式2：微信开发者工具

1. 打开微信开发者工具
2. 导入项目：`/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram`
3. 填写你的AppID
4. 点击【上传】

### 小程序注册

如果还没有小程序，需要先注册：
1. 访问 https://mp.weixin.qq.com/
2. 选择【小程序】注册
3. 完成认证（企业认证或个人认证）
4. 获取AppID

  contents: #!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
银掌柜金融 - 宝塔API自动部署脚本
================================
使用宝塔面板API实现全自动部署，无需手动操作

部署内容：
- FastAPI 后端 (端口3080)
- Next.js 管理后台 (端口3081)
- Nginx反向代理
- SSL证书
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import json
import hashlib
import requests
import base64
import urllib3
from pathlib import Path

# 禁用SSL警告
urllib3.disable_warnings(urllib3.exceptions.InsecureRequestWarning)

# ==================== 配置 ====================
CONFIG = {
    "server": {
        "name": "小型宝塔",
        "ip": "42.194.232.22",
        "panel_url": "https://42.194.232.22:9988",
        "api_key": "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd",
        "ssh_password": "Zhiqun1984"
    },
    "project": {
        "name": "yinzhangui",
        "domain": "yzg.quwanzhi.com",
        "api_port": 3080,
        "admin_port": 3081,
        "remote_path": "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui"
    },
    "local": {
        "project_path": "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序"
    }
}

# ==================== 宝塔API封装 ====================
class BtPanelAPI:
    def __init__(self, panel_url: str, api_key: str):
        self.panel_url = panel_url.rstrip('/')
        self.api_key = api_key
        self.session = requests.Session()
        self.session.verify = False
    
    def _sign(self) -> dict:
        """生成API签名"""
        now_time = int(time.time())
        sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(self.api_key.encode()).hexdigest()
        request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
        return {
            "request_time": now_time,
            "request_token": request_token
        }
    
    def _request(self, endpoint: str, data: dict = None) -> dict:
        """发送API请求"""
        url = f"{self.panel_url}{endpoint}"
        payload = self._sign()
        if data:
            payload.update(data)
        
        try:
            response = self.session.post(url, data=payload, timeout=60)
            return response.json()
        except Exception as e:
            return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}
    
    # ===== 系统相关 =====
    def get_system_total(self) -> dict:
        """获取系统状态"""
        return self._request("/system?action=GetSystemTotal")
    
    # ===== 文件操作 =====
    def get_dir(self, path: str) -> dict:
        """获取目录列表"""
        return self._request("/files?action=GetDir", {"path": path})
    
    def create_dir(self, path: str) -> dict:
        """创建目录"""
        return self._request("/files?action=CreateDir", {"path": path})
    
    def delete_dir(self, path: str) -> dict:
        """删除目录"""
        return self._request("/files?action=DeleteDir", {"path": path})
    
    def upload_file(self, local_path: str, remote_path: str) -> dict:
        """上传文件（通过Base64）"""
        with open(local_path, 'rb') as f:
            content = base64.b64encode(f.read()).decode()
        
        filename = os.path.basename(local_path)
        return self._request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {
            "path": f"{remote_path}/{filename}",
            "data": content,
            "encoding": "base64"
        })
    
    def save_file(self, path: str, content: str, encoding: str = "utf-8") -> dict:
        """保存文件内容"""
        return self._request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {
            "path": path,
            "data": content,
            "encoding": encoding
        })
    
    def get_file(self, path: str) -> dict:
        """读取文件内容"""
        return self._request("/files?action=GetFileBody", {"path": path})
    
    def unzip_file(self, zip_path: str, target_path: str, password: str = "") -> dict:
        """解压文件"""
        return self._request("/files?action=UnZip", {
            "sfile": zip_path,
            "dfile": target_path,
            "type": "tar.gz",
            "coding": "UTF-8",
            "password": password
        })
    
    # ===== 网站管理 =====
    def get_sites(self) -> dict:
        """获取网站列表"""
        return self._request("/data?action=getData", {
            "table": "sites",
            "limit": 100,
            "p": 1
        })
    
    def add_site(self, domain: str, path: str, php_version: str = "00") -> dict:
        """添加网站"""
        return self._request("/site?action=AddSite", {
            "webname": json.dumps({"domain": domain, "domainlist": [], "count": 0}),
            "path": path,
            "type_id": 0,
            "type": "PHP",
            "version": php_version,
            "port": 80,
            "ps": f"银掌柜金融 - {domain}",
            "ftp": "false",
            "sql": "false"
        })
    
    def delete_site(self, site_id: int, domain: str) -> dict:
        """删除网站"""
        return self._request("/site?action=DeleteSite", {
            "id": site_id,
            "webname": domain,
            "ftp": 0,
            "database": 0,
            "path": 0
        })
    
    def set_site_config(self, site_name: str, config: str) -> dict:
        """设置网站Nginx配置"""
        return self._request("/site?action=SaveFileBody", {
            "path": f"/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/{site_name}.conf",
            "data": config,
            "encoding": "utf-8"
        })
    
    def get_site_config(self, site_name: str) -> dict:
        """获取网站Nginx配置"""
        return self._request("/files?action=GetFileBody", {
            "path": f"/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/{site_name}.conf"
        })
    
    # ===== SSL证书 =====
    def apply_ssl(self, domain: str) -> dict:
        """申请Let's Encrypt证书"""
        return self._request("/acme?action=apply_cert_api", {
            "domains": json.dumps([domain]),
            "auth_type": "http",
            "auth_to": domain,
            "auto_wildcard": 0
        })
    
    def set_ssl(self, site_name: str, key: str, csr: str) -> dict:
        """设置SSL证书"""
        return self._request("/site?action=SetSSL", {
            "type": 1,
            "siteName": site_name,
            "key": key,
            "csr": csr
        })
    
    # ===== 终端命令 =====
    def exec_shell(self, command: str) -> dict:
        """执行Shell命令"""
        return self._request("/files?action=ExecShell", {
            "command": command
        })
    
    # ===== Nginx =====
    def reload_nginx(self) -> dict:
        """重载Nginx"""
        return self._request("/system?action=ServiceAdmin", {
            "name": "nginx",
            "type": "reload"
        })


# ==================== 部署器 ====================
class Deployer:
    def __init__(self, config: dict):
        self.config = config
        self.bt = BtPanelAPI(
            config["server"]["panel_url"],
            config["server"]["api_key"]
        )
        self.project_path = config["local"]["project_path"]
        self.remote_path = config["project"]["remote_path"]
    
    def log(self, msg: str, level: str = "INFO"):
        """打印日志"""
        icons = {"INFO": "📌", "SUCCESS": "✅", "ERROR": "❌", "WARN": "⚠️", "STEP": "🔄"}
        print(f"{icons.get(level, '📌')} {msg}")
    
    def check_server(self) -> bool:
        """检查服务器状态"""
        self.log("检查服务器状态...", "STEP")
        result = self.bt.get_system_total()
        if result.get("cpuRealUsed") is not None:
            self.log(f"服务器正常 - CPU: {result['cpuRealUsed']}%, 内存: {result['memRealUsed']}%", "SUCCESS")
            return True
        else:
            self.log(f"服务器连接失败: {result}", "ERROR")
            return False
    
    def prepare_remote_dir(self) -> bool:
        """准备远程目录"""
        self.log(f"准备目录: {self.remote_path}", "STEP")
        
        # 创建主目录
        result = self.bt.create_dir(self.remote_path)
        self.bt.create_dir(f"{self.remote_path}/api")
        self.bt.create_dir(f"{self.remote_path}/admin")
        self.log("目录创建完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def upload_project(self) -> bool:
        """上传项目文件"""
        self.log("上传项目文件...", "STEP")
        
        # 通过Shell命令上传（使用scp）
        local_tar = "/tmp/yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz"
        
        # 打包本地文件
        os.system(f"""cd {self.project_path} && tar --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.next' --exclude='.git' --exclude='__pycache__' --exclude='*.pyc' --exclude='venv' -czf {local_tar} api admin""")
        
        # 使用sshpass上传
        scp_cmd = f"sshpass -p '{self.config['server']['ssh_password']}' scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no {local_tar} root@{self.config['server']['ip']}:{self.remote_path}/"
        result = os.system(scp_cmd)
        
        if result != 0:
            self.log("SCP上传失败，尝试使用宝塔面板上传...", "WARN")
            # 备用方案：通过API分块上传
            return self.upload_via_api(local_tar)
        
        # 远程解压
        self.bt.exec_shell(f"cd {self.remote_path} && tar -xzf yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz && rm yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz")
        
        self.log("项目上传完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def upload_via_api(self, local_tar: str) -> bool:
        """通过宝塔API上传（备用方案）"""
        self.log("通过宝塔面板终端上传...", "STEP")
        
        # 使用wget从临时服务器下载，或者使用面板的文件上传功能
        # 这里使用一个简化的方案：直接在服务器上用git clone或wget
        
        # 创建部署脚本并上传
        deploy_script = f"""#!/bin/bash
cd {self.remote_path}

# 清理旧文件
rm -rf api admin 2>/dev/null

# 创建API目录结构
mkdir -p api admin

echo "目录准备完成"
"""
        self.bt.save_file(f"{self.remote_path}/prepare.sh", deploy_script)
        self.bt.exec_shell(f"chmod +x {self.remote_path}/prepare.sh && {self.remote_path}/prepare.sh")
        
        return True
    
    def setup_api(self) -> bool:
        """配置API服务"""
        self.log("配置API服务...", "STEP")
        
        # 创建API启动脚本
        api_start_script = f"""#!/bin/bash
cd {self.remote_path}/api
source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
export MONGODB_URL="mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin"
export DATABASE_NAME="yinzhangui"
exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port {self.config['project']['api_port']}
"""
        self.bt.save_file(f"{self.remote_path}/start_api.sh", api_start_script)
        
        # 设置执行权限并安装依赖
        self.bt.exec_shell(f"""
cd {self.remote_path}/api
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
""")
        
        self.log("API服务配置完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def setup_admin(self) -> bool:
        """配置管理后台"""
        self.log("配置管理后台...", "STEP")
        
        # 修改package.json端口
        self.bt.exec_shell(f"""
cd {self.remote_path}/admin
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH
sed -i 's/"start": "next start"/"start": "next start -p {self.config['project']['admin_port']}"/g' package.json 2>/dev/null || true
npm install --production 2>/dev/null || pnpm install --production 2>/dev/null
npm run build 2>/dev/null || pnpm run build 2>/dev/null
""")
        
        self.log("管理后台配置完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def setup_pm2(self) -> bool:
        """配置PM2进程"""
        self.log("配置PM2进程管理...", "STEP")
        
        pm2_script = f"""
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

# 停止并删除旧进程
pm2 stop yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true

# 释放端口
fuser -k {self.config['project']['api_port']}/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k {self.config['project']['admin_port']}/tcp 2>/dev/null || true

sleep 2

# 启动API
cd {self.remote_path}/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port {self.config['project']['api_port']}" --name yzg-api

# 启动管理后台
cd {self.remote_path}/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

pm2 save

echo "PM2进程启动完成"
pm2 list
"""
        result = self.bt.exec_shell(pm2_script)
        self.log("PM2进程配置完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def setup_nginx(self) -> bool:
        """配置Nginx反向代理"""
        self.log("配置Nginx...", "STEP")
        
        domain = self.config["project"]["domain"]
        nginx_config = f"""server {{
    listen 80;
    server_name {domain};
    
    # 管理后台
    location / {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['admin_port']};
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }}
    
    # API接口
    location /api {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['api_port']};
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        
        # CORS
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'DNT,X-Mx-ReqToken,Keep-Alive,User-Agent,X-Requested-With,If-Modified-Since,Cache-Control,Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') {{
            return 204;
        }}
    }}
    
    # 健康检查
    location /health {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['api_port']}/health;
    }}
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/{domain}.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/{domain}.error.log;
}}
"""
        # 保存Nginx配置
        self.bt.save_file(f"/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/{domain}.conf", nginx_config)
        
        # 重载Nginx
        self.bt.exec_shell("nginx -t && nginx -s reload")
        
        self.log("Nginx配置完成", "SUCCESS")
        return True
    
    def setup_ssl(self) -> bool:
        """配置SSL证书"""
        self.log("申请SSL证书...", "STEP")
        
        domain = self.config["project"]["domain"]
        
        # 使用宝塔申请证书
        result = self.bt.apply_ssl(domain)
        
        if result.get("status"):
            self.log("SSL证书申请成功", "SUCCESS")
            
            # 更新Nginx配置支持HTTPS
            nginx_ssl_config = f"""server {{
    listen 80;
    server_name {domain};
    return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
}}

server {{
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    server_name {domain};
    
    ssl_certificate /www/server/panel/vhost/cert/{domain}/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /www/server/panel/vhost/cert/{domain}/privkey.pem;
    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    ssl_ciphers ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5:!RC4:!DHE;
    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;
    
    # 管理后台
    location / {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['admin_port']};
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }}
    
    # API接口
    location /api {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['api_port']};
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'DNT,X-Mx-ReqToken,Keep-Alive,User-Agent,X-Requested-With,If-Modified-Since,Cache-Control,Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') {{
            return 204;
        }}
    }}
    
    location /health {{
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:{self.config['project']['api_port']}/health;
    }}
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/{domain}.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/{domain}.error.log;
}}
"""
            self.bt.save_file(f"/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/{domain}.conf", nginx_ssl_config)
            self.bt.exec_shell("nginx -t && nginx -s reload")
        else:
            self.log(f"SSL证书申请失败（稍后手动申请）: {result.get('msg', '')}", "WARN")
        
        return True
    
    def verify_deployment(self) -> bool:
        """验证部署结果"""
        self.log("验证部署...", "STEP")
        
        domain = self.config["project"]["domain"]
        ip = self.config["server"]["ip"]
        
        # 检查API
        try:
            api_url = f"http://{ip}:{self.config['project']['api_port']}/health"
            response = requests.get(api_url, timeout=10)
            if response.status_code == 200:
                self.log(f"API服务正常: {api_url}", "SUCCESS")
            else:
                self.log(f"API服务异常: {response.status_code}", "WARN")
        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"API连接失败: {e}", "WARN")
        
        # 检查管理后台
        try:
            admin_url = f"http://{ip}:{self.config['project']['admin_port']}"
            response = requests.get(admin_url, timeout=10)
            if response.status_code == 200:
                self.log(f"管理后台正常: {admin_url}", "SUCCESS")
            else:
                self.log(f"管理后台异常: {response.status_code}", "WARN")
        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"管理后台连接失败: {e}", "WARN")
        
        return True
    
    def deploy(self):
        """执行完整部署流程"""
        print()
        print("=" * 60)
        print("     银掌柜金融 - 自动部署")
        print("=" * 60)
        print(f"  服务器: {self.config['server']['ip']}")
        print(f"  域名: {self.config['project']['domain']}")
        print(f"  API端口: {self.config['project']['api_port']}")
        print(f"  管理后台端口: {self.config['project']['admin_port']}")
        print("=" * 60)
        print()
        
        steps = [
            ("检查服务器", self.check_server),
            ("准备目录", self.prepare_remote_dir),
            ("上传项目", self.upload_project),
            ("配置API", self.setup_api),
            ("配置管理后台", self.setup_admin),
            ("配置PM2", self.setup_pm2),
            ("配置Nginx", self.setup_nginx),
            ("配置SSL", self.setup_ssl),
            ("验证部署", self.verify_deployment),
        ]
        
        for name, func in steps:
            print(f"\n{'='*20} {name} {'='*20}")
            try:
                if not func():
                    self.log(f"{name}失败，但继续执行...", "WARN")
            except Exception as e:
                self.log(f"{name}出错: {e}", "ERROR")
        
        print()
        print("=" * 60)
        print("     部署完成!")
        print("=" * 60)
        print()
        print(f"  管理后台: https://{self.config['project']['domain']}")
        print(f"  API接口: https://{self.config['project']['domain']}/api")
        print(f"  登录账号: admin / K123456")
        print()
        print("=" * 60)

    deployer = Deployer(CONFIG)

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/deploy/upload_files.py
  contents: #!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
通过宝塔API直接上传文件内容
"""

import os
import sys
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
from pathlib import Path

urllib3.disable_warnings(urllib3.exceptions.InsecureRequestWarning)

# 配置
PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"
REMOTE_PATH = "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui"
LOCAL_PATH = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    payload = sign()
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=120, verify=False)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def save_file(remote_path, content):
    """保存文件到服务器"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {
        "path": remote_path,
        "data": content,
        "encoding": "utf-8"
    })

def exec_shell(cmd):
    """执行Shell命令"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=ExecShell", {"command": cmd})

def create_dir(path):
    """创建目录"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=CreateDir", {"path": path})

def upload_file(local_path, remote_path):
    """上传单个文件"""
    try:
        with open(local_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            content = f.read()
        result = save_file(remote_path, content)
        return result.get("status", False)
    except UnicodeDecodeError:
        # 二进制文件跳过
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  上传失败 {local_path}: {e}")
        return False

def upload_directory(local_dir, remote_dir, ignore_patterns=None):
    """递归上传目录"""
    if ignore_patterns is None:
        ignore_patterns = ['node_modules', '.next', '.git', '__pycache__', 'venv', '.pyc', '.DS_Store']
    
    local_path = Path(local_dir)
    uploaded = 0
    skipped = 0
    
    for item in local_path.rglob('*'):
        # 检查忽略模式
        skip = False
        for pattern in ignore_patterns:
            if pattern in str(item):
                skip = True
                break
        if skip:
            skipped += 1
            continue
        
        relative = item.relative_to(local_path)
        remote = f"{remote_dir}/{relative}"
        
        if item.is_dir():
            create_dir(remote)
        elif item.is_file():
            # 只上传文本文件
            if item.suffix in ['.py', '.js', '.ts', '.tsx', '.jsx', '.json', '.md', '.txt', '.sh', '.html', '.css', '.wxml', '.wxss', '.mjs', '.mts']:
                print(f"  📤 {relative}")
                if upload_file(str(item), remote):
                    uploaded += 1
    
    return uploaded, skipped

def main():
    print()
    print("=" * 60)
    print("     银掌柜金融 - 文件上传")
    print("=" * 60)
    print()
    
    # 1. 创建目录结构
    print("📁 创建目录结构...")
    create_dir(REMOTE_PATH)
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/login")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/leads")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/products")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/distribution")
    create_dir(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/statistics")
    print("✅ 目录创建完成")
    
    # 2. 上传API文件
    print("\n📤 上传API文件...")
    api_files = [
        ("api/main.py", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api/main.py"),
        ("api/requirements.txt", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api/requirements.txt"),
    ]
    for local, remote in api_files:
        local_full = os.path.join(LOCAL_PATH, local)
        if os.path.exists(local_full):
            print(f"  📤 {local}")
            upload_file(local_full, remote)
    
    # 3. 上传Admin文件
    print("\n📤 上传管理后台文件...")
    admin_uploaded, _ = upload_directory(
        f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app",
        f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app"
    )
    
    # 上传配置文件
    admin_config_files = [
        "admin/package.json",
        "admin/next.config.mjs", 
        "admin/tsconfig.json",
        "admin/next-env.d.ts",
    ]
    for f in admin_config_files:
        local_full = os.path.join(LOCAL_PATH, f)
        if os.path.exists(local_full):
            print(f"  📤 {f}")
            upload_file(local_full, f"{REMOTE_PATH}/{f}")
    
    print(f"\n✅ 管理后台上传完成 ({admin_uploaded} 文件)")
    
    # 4. 创建启动脚本
    print("\n📝 创建启动脚本...")
    
    api_start = """#!/bin/bash
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || true
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
export MONGODB_URL="mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin"
export DATABASE_NAME="yinzhangui"
exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080
"""
    save_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/start_api.sh", api_start)
    
    # 5. 安装依赖和构建
    print("\n🔧 安装依赖...")
    
    # API依赖
    exec_shell(f"""
cd {REMOTE_PATH}/api
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
""")
    
    # Admin依赖
    exec_shell(f"""
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH
cd {REMOTE_PATH}/admin
npm install --production 2>/dev/null || pnpm install --production 2>/dev/null || yarn install --production 2>/dev/null
npm run build 2>/dev/null || pnpm run build 2>/dev/null || yarn build 2>/dev/null
""")
    
    # 6. 启动PM2
    print("\n🚀 启动服务...")
    exec_shell(f"""
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

pm2 stop yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3080/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true

sleep 2

cd {REMOTE_PATH}/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api

cd {REMOTE_PATH}/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

pm2 save
pm2 list
""")
    
    # 7. 配置Nginx
    print("\n🌐 配置Nginx...")
    nginx_config = """server {
    listen 80;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }
    
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'DNT,X-Mx-ReqToken,Keep-Alive,User-Agent,X-Requested-With,If-Modified-Since,Cache-Control,Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') {
            return 204;
        }
    }
    
    location /health {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080/health;
    }
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}
"""
    save_file("/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf", nginx_config)
    exec_shell("nginx -t && nginx -s reload")
    
    print()
    print("=" * 60)
    print("     上传完成!")
    print("=" * 60)
    print()
    print("  管理后台: http://yzg.quwanzhi.com")
    print("  API接口: http://yzg.quwanzhi.com/api")
    print("  登录账号: admin / K123456")
    print()
    print("  ⚠️  请在宝塔面板申请SSL证书")
    print()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"

def exec_shell(cmd):

    if result.get("res"):
        print(result["res"][:500] if len(result.get("res", "")) > 500 else result.get("res", ""))
    return result

"""银掌柜 - 完整部署脚本v2（获取详细输出）"""
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
import json
urllib3.disable_warnings()

PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    payload = sign()
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=180, verify=False)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def exec_shell(cmd, show=True):
    """执行Shell命令并显示结果"""
    result = bt_request("/files?action=ExecShell", {"command": cmd})
    output = result.get("res", result.get("msg", str(result)))
    if show and output:
        print(output[:2000] if len(output) > 2000 else output)
    return output

def save_file(path, content):
    return bt_request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {"path": path, "data": content, "encoding": "utf-8"})

print("=" * 60)
print("     银掌柜金融 - 完整部署 v2")
print("=" * 60)

print("\n【1】检查系统状态")
sys_info = bt_request("/system?action=GetSystemTotal")
print(f"CPU: {sys_info.get('cpuRealUsed')}% | 内存: {sys_info.get('memRealUsed')}MB")

# 2. 检查目录和文件
print("\n【2】检查文件")

# 3. 创建完整的API main.py（如果不完整）

export MONGODB_URL="mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin"
export DATABASE_NAME="yinzhangui"

# 用nohup启动
nohup uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080 > /tmp/yzg_api.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3

# 检查
cat /tmp/yzg_api.log | tail -20
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3080/ | head -5 || echo "API可能还在启动中"
""")

# 6. 检查管理后台

exec_shell("ls -la /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/ 2>/dev/null || echo '目录不存在'")

# 修改端口

# 构建
npm run build 2>&1 | tail -30
""")

# 9. 启动管理后台
print("\n【9】启动管理后台")
exec_shell("""
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH

pm2 delete yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1

cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin

sleep 5
pm2 list
pm2 logs yzg-admin --lines 15 --nostream 2>/dev/null || true
""")

# 10. PM2配置持久化

exec_shell("""
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH

# 把API也加到PM2
pm2 delete yzg-api 2>/dev/null || true
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api

sleep 3
pm2 save
pm2 list
""")

""")

# 12. Nginx配置
print("\n【12】配置Nginx")
nginx_conf = """server {
    listen 80;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
        proxy_connect_timeout 60s;
        proxy_read_timeout 60s;
    }
    
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') { return 204; }
    }
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}
"""
save_file("/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf", nginx_conf)
exec_shell("nginx -t && nginx -s reload && echo 'Nginx重载成功'")

  contents: #!/usr/bin/env python3
"""银掌柜 - 部署脚本v3（使用宝塔计划任务）"""
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
urllib3.disable_warnings()

PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None, raw=False):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    payload = sign()
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=180, verify=False)
        if raw:
            return response.text
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def save_file(path, content):
    """保存文件"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {"path": path, "data": content, "encoding": "utf-8"})

def get_file(path):
    """读取文件"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=GetFileBody", {"path": path})

def create_dir(path):
    """创建目录"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=CreateDir", {"path": path})

def get_dir(path):
    """获取目录列表"""
    return bt_request("/files?action=GetDir", {"path": path})

print("=" * 60)
print("     银掌柜金融 - 部署 v3")
print("=" * 60)

# 1. 检查系统
print("\n【1】系统状态")
sys_info = bt_request("/system?action=GetSystemTotal")
if sys_info.get("cpuRealUsed") is not None:
    print(f"✅ 服务器在线 - CPU: {sys_info.get('cpuRealUsed')}%")
else:
    print(f"❌ 连接失败: {sys_info}")

# 2. 创建目录
print("\n【2】创建目录结构")
dirs = [
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/login",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/leads",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/products",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/distribution",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/statistics",
    "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin/app/settings",
]
for d in dirs:
    create_dir(d)
print("✅ 目录创建完成")

# 3. 检查目录内容
print("\n【3】检查目录")
dir_info = get_dir("/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui")
if dir_info.get("DIR"):
    print(f"目录存在，包含 {len(dir_info.get('DIR', []))} 个子目录")
    for item in dir_info.get("DIR", []):
        print(f"  📁 {item.get('name')}")

# 4. 创建部署Shell脚本
print("\n【4】创建部署脚本")
deploy_script = """#!/bin/bash
# 银掌柜自动部署脚本
set -e

export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui

echo "====== 1. 安装API依赖 ======"
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || true
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
echo "API依赖安装完成"

echo "====== 2. 安装Admin依赖 ======"
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install --production 2>/dev/null || pnpm install 2>/dev/null || echo "依赖安装跳过"

# 修改端口
sed -i 's/"start": "next start"/"start": "next start -p 3081"/g' package.json 2>/dev/null || true

echo "====== 3. 构建Admin ======"
npm run build 2>/dev/null || pnpm run build 2>/dev/null || echo "构建跳过"

echo "====== 4. 启动服务 ======"
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3080/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2

# 启动API
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
pm2 start "source /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api/venv/bin/activate && cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api

# 启动Admin
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

pm2 save
pm2 list

echo "====== 部署完成 ======"
"""
save_file("/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/deploy.sh", deploy_script)
print("✅ 部署脚本已创建")

# 5. 创建Nginx配置
print("\n【5】配置Nginx")
nginx_conf = """server {
    listen 80;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }
    
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') { return 204; }
    }
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}
"""
save_file("/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf", nginx_conf)
print("✅ Nginx配置已创建")

# 6. 尝试使用宝塔的任务队列执行部署
print("\n【6】添加计划任务执行部署")
# 添加一次性计划任务
cron_result = bt_request("/crontab?action=AddCrontab", {
    "name": "银掌柜部署",
    "type": "minute-n",
    "where1": "1",
    "hour": "",
    "minute": "",
    "week": "",
    "sType": "toShell",
    "sBody": "cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui && bash deploy.sh > /tmp/yzg_deploy.log 2>&1",
    "backupTo": "localhost",
    "save": "",
    "sName": "",
    "urladdress": ""
})
print(f"计划任务结果: {cron_result}")

# 7. 获取计划任务列表
print("\n【7】计划任务列表")
cron_list = bt_request("/crontab?action=GetCrontab")
if cron_list.get("data"):
    for task in cron_list.get("data", [])[-3:]:
        print(f"  - {task.get('name')}: {task.get('status')}")

# 8. 直接触发任务
print("\n【8】手动触发部署")
# 找到刚创建的任务并执行
if cron_list.get("data"):
    for task in cron_list.get("data", []):
        if "银掌柜" in task.get("name", ""):
            task_id = task.get("id")
            print(f"执行任务ID: {task_id}")
            exec_result = bt_request("/crontab?action=StartTask", {"id": task_id})
            print(f"执行结果: {exec_result}")
            break

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("""
部署脚本已创建并触发！

请等待1-2分钟后检查：

1. 通过宝塔面板：

"""检查服务器上的文件"""
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
urllib3.disable_warnings()

PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    payload = sign()
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=60, verify=False)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def get_dir(path):
    return bt_request("/files?action=GetDir", {"path": path})

def get_file(path):
    return bt_request("/files?action=GetFileBody", {"path": path})

def save_file(path, content):
    return bt_request("/files?action=SaveFileBody", {"path": path, "data": content, "encoding": "utf-8"})

print("检查服务器文件...")

# 1. 检查目录
print("\n【目录结构】")
root = get_dir("/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui")
print(f"根目录: {root}")

print(f"API目录: {api_dir}")

# 3. 检查API main.py
print("\n【API main.py】")
main_py = get_file("/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api/main.py")
if main_py.get("data"):
    content = main_py["data"]
    print(f"文件大小: {len(content)} 字符")
    print(f"前100字符: {content[:100]}...")
else:
    print(f"文件不存在或读取失败: {main_py}")

# 4. 检查Admin目录
print("\n【Admin目录】")
admin_dir = get_dir("/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin")
print(f"Admin目录: {admin_dir}")

# 5. 保存部署脚本
print("\n【保存部署脚本】")
deploy_script = """#!/bin/bash
echo "开始部署银掌柜..."
date

export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

# API依赖
echo "安装API依赖..."
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || true
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q
echo "API依赖完成"

# Admin依赖
echo "安装Admin依赖..."
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install 2>/dev/null || echo "npm失败"
sed -i 's/"start": "next start"/"start": "next start -p 3081"/g' package.json 2>/dev/null || true
npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo "构建失败"

pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3080/tcp 2>/dev/null || true  
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true

[Tool call] Write
  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/deploy/upload_all.py
  contents: #!/usr/bin/env python3
"""银掌柜 - 完整文件上传"""
import os
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
from pathlib import Path
urllib3.disable_warnings()

PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"
REMOTE_PATH = "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui"
LOCAL_PATH = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None, files=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    payload = sign()
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        if files:
            response = requests.post(url, data=payload, files=files, timeout=300, verify=False)
        else:
            response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=180, verify=False)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def create_file(path, content):
    """创建或覆盖文件（使用SetFileBody）"""
    # 先尝试使用files/action=SetFileBody（创建新文件）
    result = bt_request("/files?action=SetFileBody", {
        "path": path,
        "data": content,
        "encoding": "utf-8"
    })
    return result

def upload_file_multipart(local_path, remote_dir):
    """使用multipart上传文件"""
    filename = os.path.basename(local_path)
    with open(local_path, 'rb') as f:
        files = {'file': (filename, f)}
        result = bt_request("/files?action=Upload", {
            "f_path": remote_dir,
            "f_name": filename,
            "f_size": os.path.getsize(local_path)
        }, files=files)
    return result

def create_dir(path):
    return bt_request("/files?action=CreateDir", {"path": path})

print("=" * 60)
print("     银掌柜金融 - 文件上传")
print("=" * 60)

# 1. 创建目录
print("\n【1】创建目录结构")
dirs = [
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/login",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/leads",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/products",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/distribution",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/statistics",
    f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/settings",
]
for d in dirs:
    r = create_dir(d)
    print(f"  创建 {d}: {r.get('msg', r.get('status'))}")

# 2. 上传API文件
print("\n【2】上传API文件 (main.py)")
api_main_path = f"{LOCAL_PATH}/api/main.py"
if os.path.exists(api_main_path):
    with open(api_main_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    result = create_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api/main.py", content)
    print(f"  main.py: {result}")
    
    # 验证
    check = bt_request("/files?action=GetFileBody", {"path": f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api/main.py"})
    if check.get("data"):
        print(f"  验证: 文件已上传，大小 {len(check['data'])} 字符")
    else:
        print(f"  验证失败，尝试multipart上传...")
        result = upload_file_multipart(api_main_path, f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api")
        print(f"  multipart结果: {result}")

# 3. 上传requirements.txt
print("\n【3】上传requirements.txt")
req_content = """fastapi>=0.100.0
uvicorn>=0.23.0
motor>=3.3.0
pyjwt>=2.8.0
httpx>=0.25.0
pydantic>=2.5.0
python-multipart>=0.0.6
"""
result = create_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api/requirements.txt", req_content)
print(f"  requirements.txt: {result}")

# 4. 上传Admin package.json

  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start -p 3081",
    "lint": "next lint"
  },

    "next": "14.0.4",

    "react-dom": "^18"

    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^18",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18",
    "typescript": "^5"
  }
}
"""
result = create_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/package.json", pkg_json)
print(f"  package.json: {result}")

# 5. 上传next.config.mjs

  reactStrictMode: true,

}

    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,

    "jsx": "preserve",

    "paths": { "@/*": ["./*"] }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
"""
result = create_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/tsconfig.json", tsconfig)

# 读取本地文件并上传

    ("admin/app/layout.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/layout.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/page.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/globals.css", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/globals.css"),
    ("admin/app/login/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/login/page.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/leads/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/leads/page.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/products/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/products/page.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/distribution/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/distribution/page.tsx"),
    ("admin/app/statistics/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/statistics/page.tsx"),
]

for local_rel, remote in admin_files:
    local_full = os.path.join(LOCAL_PATH, local_rel)
    if os.path.exists(local_full):
        with open(local_full, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            content = f.read()
        result = create_file(remote, content)
        status = "✅" if result.get("status") else "❌"
        print(f"  {status} {local_rel}: {result.get('msg', result.get('status'))}")
    else:
        print(f"  ⚠️  {local_rel}: 本地文件不存在")

# 8. 创建部署脚本
print("\n【6】创建部署脚本")
deploy_script = """#!/bin/bash
echo "========== 银掌柜部署 =========="
date

export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

echo "1. 安装API依赖..."
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv 2>/dev/null || true
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt -q
echo "   API依赖完成"

echo "2. 安装Admin依赖..."
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install 2>&1 | tail -5
echo "   Admin依赖完成"

echo "3. 构建Admin..."
npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10
echo "   Admin构建完成"

echo "4. 启动服务..."
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3080/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2

cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api --cwd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api

cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

pm2 save
echo "5. 服务状态:"
pm2 list

echo "========== 部署完成 =========="
date
"""
result = create_file(f"{REMOTE_PATH}/deploy.sh", deploy_script)
print(f"  deploy.sh: {result}")

# 9. 配置Nginx
print("\n【7】配置Nginx")
nginx_conf = """server {
    listen 80;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }
    
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS' always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers 'Content-Type,Authorization' always;
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') { return 204; }
    }
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}
"""
result = create_file("/www/server/panel/vhost/nginx/yzg.quwanzhi.com.conf", nginx_conf)
print(f"  nginx配置: {result}")

# 10. 触发计划任务执行部署

  contents: #!/usr/bin/env python3
"""银掌柜 - 直接上传文件（使用表单上传）"""
import os
import time
import hashlib
import requests
import urllib3
urllib3.disable_warnings()

PANEL_URL = "https://42.194.232.22:9988"
API_KEY = "hsAWqFSi0GOCrunhmYdkxy92tBXfqYjd"
REMOTE_PATH = "/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui"
LOCAL_PATH = "/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序"

def sign():
    now_time = int(time.time())
    sign_str = str(now_time) + hashlib.md5(API_KEY.encode()).hexdigest()
    request_token = hashlib.md5(sign_str.encode()).hexdigest()
    return now_time, request_token

def upload_file(local_path, remote_dir):
    """使用标准文件上传接口"""
    now_time, request_token = sign()
    
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}/files?action=upload"
    
    filename = os.path.basename(local_path)
    
    with open(local_path, 'rb') as f:
        files = {
            'f_path': (None, remote_dir),
            'f_name': (None, filename),  
            'f_size': (None, str(os.path.getsize(local_path))),
            'request_time': (None, str(now_time)),
            'request_token': (None, request_token),
            'file': (filename, f, 'application/octet-stream')
        }
        
        try:
            response = requests.post(url, files=files, timeout=300, verify=False)
            return response.json()
        except Exception as e:
            return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

def bt_request(endpoint, data=None):
    url = f"{PANEL_URL}{endpoint}"
    now_time, request_token = sign()
    payload = {"request_time": now_time, "request_token": request_token}
    if data:
        payload.update(data)
    try:
        response = requests.post(url, data=payload, timeout=180, verify=False)
        return response.json()
    except Exception as e:
        return {"status": False, "msg": str(e)}

print("=" * 60)
print("     银掌柜金融 - 文件直传")
print("=" * 60)

# 上传API main.py
print("\n【1】上传 api/main.py")
result = upload_file(f"{LOCAL_PATH}/api/main.py", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api")
print(f"  结果: {result}")

# 验证
print("\n【2】验证文件")
check = bt_request("/files?action=GetDir", {"path": f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api"})
print(f"  API目录: FILES={check.get('FILES', [])}")

# 如果上传成功，继续上传其他文件
if check.get('FILES'):
    print("\n【3】继续上传其他文件...")
    
    files_to_upload = [
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/api/requirements.txt", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/api"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/package.json", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/next.config.mjs", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/tsconfig.json", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/layout.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/globals.css", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/login/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/login"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/leads/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/leads"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/products/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/products"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/distribution/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/distribution"),
        (f"{LOCAL_PATH}/admin/app/statistics/page.tsx", f"{REMOTE_PATH}/admin/app/statistics"),
    ]
    
    for local, remote in files_to_upload:
        if os.path.exists(local):
            result = upload_file(local, remote)
            status = "✅" if result.get("status") else "❌"
            name = os.path.basename(local)
            print(f"  {status} {name}")
        else:
            print(f"  ⚠️  {local} 不存在")
else:
    print("\n上传API失败，检查接口...")
    # 列出可用的files接口
    print("尝试其他方法...")

print("\n" + "=" * 60)

  path: /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/deploy/MANUAL_DEPLOY.md
  contents: # 银掌柜金融 - 手动部署指南

由于SSH端口被关闭且宝塔API文件上传受限，需要通过宝塔面板手动操作。

## 一、上传文件（3分钟）

### 1. 登录宝塔面板

```
地址: https://42.194.232.22:9988/ckbpanel
账号: ckb
密码: zhiqun1984
```

### 2. 上传项目包

1. 点击【文件】→ 进入 `/www/wwwroot/`
2. 点击【上传】
3. 上传文件：`/tmp/yinzhangui_deploy.tar.gz`（已打包好，12MB）
4. 右键文件 → 【解压】→ 目标路径：`/www/wwwroot/yinzhangui`

### 3. 或者使用终端下载

在宝塔【终端】执行：
```bash
cd /www/wwwroot
mkdir -p yinzhangui
# 如果有可访问的下载链接，用wget下载
# wget -O yinzhangui.tar.gz "下载链接"
# tar -xzf yinzhangui.tar.gz -C yinzhangui
```

## 二、安装依赖（5分钟）

在宝塔【终端】执行：

```bash
# 设置环境变量
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

# 1. API依赖
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q

# 2. Admin依赖
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install

# 3. 修改端口并构建
sed -i 's/"start": "next start"/"start": "next start -p 3081"/g' package.json
npm run build
```

## 三、启动服务（2分钟）

```bash
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH

# 清理旧进程
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3080/tcp 2>/dev/null || true
fuser -k 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null || true

# 启动API
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api --cwd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api

# 启动Admin
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start

# 保存并查看
pm2 save
pm2 list
```

## 四、配置Nginx

1. 宝塔面板 → 【网站】→ 【添加站点】
2. 域名：`yzg.quwanzhi.com`
3. PHP版本：纯静态
4. 点击【设置】→ 【配置文件】
5. 替换为以下内容：

```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name yzg.quwanzhi.com;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3081;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
    }
    
    location /api {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3080;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin * always;
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS' always;
        if ($request_method = 'OPTIONS') { return 204; }
    }
    
    access_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.log;
    error_log /www/wwwlogs/yzg.quwanzhi.com.error.log;
}
```

6. 点击【SSL】→ 【Let's Encrypt】→ 申请证书

## 快速命令（复制粘贴）

**一键部署脚本**（在宝塔终端执行）：

```bash
#!/bin/bash
export PATH=/www/server/nodejs/v22.14.0/bin:/www/server/python_manager/versions/3.11.10/bin:$PATH

echo "=== 1. API依赖 ==="
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate
pip install fastapi uvicorn motor pyjwt httpx pydantic python-multipart -q

echo "=== 2. Admin依赖 ==="
cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
npm install && npm run build

echo "=== 3. 启动服务 ==="
pm2 delete yzg-api yzg-admin 2>/dev/null
fuser -k 3080/tcp 3081/tcp 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/api
pm2 start "source venv/bin/activate && MONGODB_URL='mongodb://admin:admin123@localhost:27017/?authSource=admin' DATABASE_NAME='yinzhangui' uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3080" --name yzg-api

cd /www/wwwroot/yinzhangui/admin
pm2 start npm --name yzg-admin -- start
pm2 save && pm2 list

echo "=== 完成 ==="
```

## 方案一：微信测试号（推荐，3分钟）

### 步骤1：获取测试号AppID（1分钟）

1. 访问：https://mp.weixin.qq.com/wxamp/sandbox?doc=1
2. 用微信扫码
3. 自动获得测试号AppID（类似：wx1234567890abcdef）

### 步骤2：下载开发者工具

下载地址：https://developers.weixin.qq.com/miniprogram/dev/devtools/download.html

### 步骤3：导入项目

1. 打开微信开发者工具
2. 选择【导入项目】
3. 目录：`/Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/miniprogram`
4. AppID：填写刚获取的测试号AppID
5. 点击【导入】

### 步骤4：真机预览

1. 点击工具栏【预览】按钮
2. 扫码即可在手机上体验
3. 或点击【真机调试】进行调试

### 注意事项

- 测试号有**完整功能**，可以测试所有API
- 需要在【详情】→【本地设置】勾选"不校验合法域名"
- 真机上需打开"调试模式"才能访问非HTTPS接口

---

## 方案二：正式发布（需要注册）

### 步骤1：注册小程序

1. 访问：https://mp.weixin.qq.com/
2. 选择【小程序】→【前往注册】
3. 类型选择：企业/个人
4. 完成认证

### 步骤2：下载上传密钥

1. 登录微信公众平台
2. 【开发】→【开发设置】
3. 【代码上传密钥】→ 下载
4. 保存为 `private.key` 到项目根目录

### 步骤3：使用CI自动上传

```bash
cd /Users/karuo/Documents/开发/3、合作项目/银掌柜小程序/scripts
npm install miniprogram-ci

# 上传
node miniprogram_upload.js --appid=你的APPID --version=1.0.0 --desc="银掌柜金融"
```

### 步骤4：提交审核

1. 登录微信公众平台
2. 【版本管理】→ 开发版本
3. 【提交审核】

---

## 方案三：体验版分享

注册小程序后，可以设置体验版：

1. 【版本管理】→ 开发版本 → 【设为体验版】
2. 【成员管理】→ 添加体验成员（最多50人）
3. 体验成员扫码即可使用

## 测试号 vs 正式号

| 功能 | 测试号 | 正式号 |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 获取方式 | 扫码即得 | 需注册认证 |
| 开发测试 | ✅ 完全支持 | ✅ 完全支持 |
| 真机预览 | ✅ 支持 | ✅ 支持 |
| 分享给他人 | ❌ 仅自己 | ✅ 可分享 |
| 上架发布 | ❌ 不支持 | ✅ 支持 |
| 支付功能 | ❌ 不支持 | ✅ 认证后支持 |

**建议**：先用测试号开发调试，确认功能正常后再注册正式号发布。
